Cook roux, whisking constantly, until it turns a rich mahogany brown color. This can take 20 to 30 minutes; watch heat carefully and whisk constantly or roux will burn. Remove from heat; continue whisking until mixture stops cooking.
Make the gumbo: Place celery, onion, green bell pepper, and garlic into the work bowl of a food processor, and pulse until all vegetables are very finely chopped.
Stir vegetables into roux, and mix in sliced sausage. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until vegetables are tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Combine water and beef bouillon cubes in a large Dutch oven or soup pot and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Stir until bouillon cubes dissolve, then whisk roux mixture into the boiling water.

Reduce heat to a simmer and mix in sugar, salt, hot pepper sauce, Cajun seasoning, bay leaves, thyme, stewed tomatoes, and tomato sauce. Simmer soup over low heat for 1 hour; mix in 2 teaspoons of file gumbo powder at the 45-minute mark.
Meanwhile, melt 2 tablespoons bacon drippings in a skillet over medium heat. Add okra and vinegar and cook for 15 minutes; remove okra with a slotted spoon, and stir into the simmering gumbo.
Mix in crabmeat, shrimp, and Worcestershire sauce, and simmer until flavors have blended, 45 more minutes. Stir in 2 more teaspoons of file gumbo powder just before serving.
Serve hot and enjoy!

good-ole-southern-frogmore-stew.name: Good Ole' Southern Frogmore Stew
instructions: Bring the water to a boil in a very large pot. Squeeze the lemon juice into the water, then throw in the halves. Add the onion, garlic, salt and crab boil. Reduce heat to a simmer, cover, and cook for about 10 minutes.

Add the potatoes and sausage; cover and simmer for 20 minutes. Add the corn and cook for 10 minutes. Remove from the heat and stir in the shrimp. Let sit covered for 5 minutes or until shrimp are pink. Drain, and serve with melted butter for dipping. Broth may be reserved and reused for cooking rice or other soups.

good-quesadilla.name: Good Quesadilla
instructions: Place one tortilla in a pan over medium heat. Cover the tortilla with 1 cup of the cheese, half of the pico de gallo and the jalapeños.
Cover with the rest of cheese and place the second tortilla on top.
Cook until the cheese begins melting, then flip and cook on the other side until all cheese is melted.
Plate and enjoy.

gooey-brown-butter-blondies-with-pecans.name: Gooey Brown Butter Blondies With Pecans
instructions: Cook butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until butter foams, then browns, 5–8 minutes. Transfer brown butter to a medium bowl; let cool slightly. Add egg, brown sugar, vanilla, and salt and beat until mixture is light and falls back onto itself in a slowly dissolving ribbon, about 3 minutes. Fold in flour.
Preheat oven to 350°. Butter a 13x9” baking dish and dust with flour. Toast pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.

Whisk baking powder, salt, and 2¼ cups flour in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat brown sugar and 1 cup butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating between additions; mix until pale and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Mix in vanilla.

Reduce speed to low and mix in dry ingredients. Fold in half of pecans. Scrape two-thirds of batter into prepared baking dish; smooth top, pushing batter to edges. Alternating, dollop brown butter mixture and remaining batter on top. Smooth and sprinkle remaining pecans over.
Bake until blondie is golden brown and firm (a tester will not come out clean), 30–35 minutes. Let cool before slicing. Serve with ice cream.
DO AHEAD: Blondies can be made 1 day ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

gooey-brownies.name: Gooey Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 2.2-quart glass baking dish with aluminum foil; coat with cooking spray.
Sift ¾ cup flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda together into a bowl; set aside.
Beat sugar, butter, and vanilla extract with an electric mixer in a separate bowl until smooth and fluffy; beat in eggs, one at a time, until thoroughly combined.

Add flour mixture to sugar mixture, in two to three additions, mixing slowly until batter is just combined. Toss chocolate chips and walnuts with remaining 1 ½ tablespoons flour in a bowl; fold into batter.
Pour batter into the prepared baking dish; level top using a rubber spatula.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are set and start to pull away from the sides of the pan, 20 to 30 minutes. Cool until center firms up.

gooey-caramel-cinnamon-rolls.name: Gooey Caramel Cinnamon Rolls
instructions: Mix water and yeast together in a bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes.
Whisk buttermilk and oil into the yeast mixture. Stir in flour, salt, and baking soda until dough comes together.
Turn dough out onto a floured work surface; knead until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Let dough rest for 15 minutes.
Whisk 3/4 cup brown sugar, 4 tablespoons melted butter, and cinnamon together in a bowl.
Roll dough out into a 12-inch long rectangle about 1/4-inch thick. Spread cinnamon mixture evenly on top. Roll up lengthwise into a log; cut into 1-inch slices using a serrated knife.

Whisk remaining 3/4 cup brown sugar, 6 tablespoons melted butter, and molasses together in a small bowl. Pour into a greased 9x13-inch baking pan. Arrange dough slices on top. Cover and let rise at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown on top, 20 to 25 minutes.

gooey-smores-dip.name: Gooey S'mores Dip
instructions: Spread chocolate chips in the bottom of a glass baking dish. Arrange marshmallows on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until chocolate softens and marshmallows are golden brown, 5 to 10 minutes. Let dip cool, about 5 minutes.
Serve graham crackers alongside the dip.

gooey-vegan-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Gooey Vegan Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cream together coconut oil, white sugar, and brown sugar in a bowl using an electric mixer. Gradually add applesauce and mix to combine. Blend in vanilla extract.
Combine flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt in a bowl. Gradually add flour mixture to the bowl with the coconut oil mixture and mix until batter is smooth. Fold in white chocolate chips.
Roll dough out into 2-inch balls and place onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake cookies in the preheated oven until edges are crispy, about 12 minutes.

googles-braised-chicken-and-kale.name: Google's Braised Chicken And Kale

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: center ribs and stems removed, leaves cut into 1” strips

instructions: Sprinkle chicken with paprika; season with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add chicken skin side down and cook, turning occasionally, until brown on all sides, 8–10 minutes; transfer to a plate.

Add onion and garlic to pot and cook, stirring often, until softened, 8–10 minutes. Return chicken to pot; add broth, wine, and herbs. Bring to a boil; cover. Reduce heat; simmer until chicken is cooked through, 30–40 minutes.
Add kale to pot. Cover; cook until wilted, about 5 minutes. Discard herbs. Serve chicken and kale with lemon wedges.

goombay-smash.name: Goombay Smash

ingredients.item: Malibu rum or other coconut-flavored rum

instructions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice; add pineapple juice, orange juice, and all rum. Cover and shake until very cold. Fill 2 short glasses with ice. Strain cocktail mixture over, dividing equally. Garnish with pineapple wedges and orange slices.

goose-pate-recipe-comedera.name: Goose Pâté Recipe
goose-pate-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de paté de oca fácil
instructions: Limpia el hígado de venas o nervios visibles.
Marina el hígado con el coñac, la sal, pimienta, nuez moscada y la hoja de laurel por 30 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, calienta una sartén con la grasa de oca y sofríe la chalota junto al diente de ajo hasta que transparenten.
Incorpora el hígado y sella ligeramente. No debes sobrecocer.
Retira la sartén del fuego y pasa los ingredientes a un procesador o licuadora. No añadas la hoja de laurel.
Procesa hasta que quede una pasta fina.
Agrega el huevo y procesa nuevamente hasta que se integre.
Pasa el paté a una terrina o molde rectangular y hornea a baño María a 160 °C durante 45 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, retira del horno y deja enfriar completamente.
Refrigera en la parte menos fría de la nevera por unas 12 horas para que los sabores se asienten y la textura mejore.
¡Disfruta como desees!

gorditas.name: Gorditas
instructions: {'step': 'Combine corn masa flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.', 'number': '1'}
{'step': 'Add a little water at a time until a firm dough forms.', 'number': '2'}
{'step': 'Divide dough into equal pieces and roll between your hands to form small balls.', 'number': '3'}
{'step': 'Press dough into 1/4-inch circles.', 'number': '4'}

gorditas-con-camarones.name: Gorditas Con Camarones

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Guajillo or dried new mexico chiles

ingredients.prep: stems removed, or 2 canned chipotle chiles in adobo
sliced avocado, cilantro leaves with tender stems, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Stir masa, 1 Tbsp. lard, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton salt, and 1 cup water in a medium bowl until a soft and slightly sticky dough forms. If dry, mix in another 1 Tbsp. water. Cover and let sit at least 30 minutes and up to 3 hours.

Meanwhile, bring guajillo chiles, morita chiles, coriander, and 1½ cups water to a boil in a small saucepan. Cover, remove from heat, and let sit, stirring occasionally, 30 minutes to allow chiles to soften. Transfer to a blender and purée until smooth; set aside.

Place rack in lowest position in oven; preheat to 500°. Brush a rimmed baking sheet with 2 Tbsp. lard. Divide dough into 4 pieces and form into balls. Set on work surface and cover with a damp kitchen towel. Place 1 ball between 2 sheets of parchment or wax paper. Using a small skillet or saucepan, gently press ball into a 5"-diameter disk. Carefully peel away parchment; place on prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining balls.

Bake gorditas until outer edges are lightly golden, 10–12 minutes. Turn over and bake until golden brown and crisp, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to plates and let cool 10 minutes. Insert a paring knife into side of gordita and, using a slow sawing motion, cut open along one side (keep other side intact).

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. lard in a large skillet over high. Cook shrimp until lightly browned and just cooked through, about 1 minute per side. Transfer to a medium bowl. Reduce heat to medium and cook garlic in same skillet, tossing often, until beginning to brown, about 1 minute. Add thyme sprigs, vinegar, agave, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and reserved chile purée. Cook, stirring occasionally, until brick red and the consistency of a thick sauce, 6–8 minutes. Add shrimp and any juices and cook 1 minute. Remove from heat; add butter and stir constantly until melted and sauce is glossy. Season with more salt if needed. Remove and discard thyme.
Fill gorditas with shrimp mixture, onion, avocado, and cilantro. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

gorditas-mexicanas.name: Gorditas Mexicanas
instructions: Bring 2 cups water to a boil in a saucepan. Add chicken, chicken bouillon, onion, and garlic. Cover and simmer until chicken is no longer pink the middle, about 40 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat a pancake grill to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Mix corn flour, 1 1/4 cups water, and salt together in a bowl until a smooth, moist dough is formed. Add more water if the dough seems too dry. Divide dough into 8 to 10 medium-sized balls and pat each into a 1/4-inch thick round.
Cook dough rounds on the preheated grill until cooked on the outside, about 3 minutes per side. Pull the edges out while still hot, making a little indention in the center of each gordita.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Deep fry gorditas until golden brown on both sides, 2 to 5 minutes per gordita. Set aside on a wire cooling rack.
Pour beans into a small saucepan and warm over medium heat.
Drain chicken, reserving cooking liquid. Remove meat from the bones and transfer meat to a food processor. Add a few tablespoons of cooking liquid and chop to desired consistency.
Spread a layer of warm beans on each gordita, then top with chopped chicken, lettuce, tomato, avocado, and cotija cheese. Finish with a dollop of sour cream.

gordos-of-lasagna.name: Gordo's Of Lasagna
instructions: Cook and stir sausage, beef, onion, and garlic in a large, deep skillet over medium heat until browned. Stir in pasta sauce, tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, 3/4 cup parsley, Italian seasoning, sugar, salt, and pepper; bring to a simmer. Reduce the heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until flavors blend, about 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook lasagna in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until cooked through but firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and rinse in cold water.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Stir ricotta, Parmesan, Cheddar, eggs, and remaining 1/4 cup parsley together in a large bowl until smooth.

Spread 1 cup tomato sauce in the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Cover sauce with a layer of lasagna noodles, then spread some ricotta mixture over top. Spread a layer of tomato sauce over ricotta, then place another layer of noodles. Repeat the layering procedure once more. Spread remaining sauce over the final layer of noodles. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over top. Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until lasagna is hot throughout and bubbling, 30 to 40 minutes. Remove the aluminum foil and continue to bake until cheese is golden, about 10 more minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.

gorgonzola-and-prosciutto-tortellini-sal.name: Gorgonzola And Prosciutto Tortellini Salad
instructions: Slice prosciutto into strips that are 1 inch long and 1/4 inch wide.

Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil; stir in tortellini and return to a boil. Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the tortellini float to the top and the filling is hot, about 3 minutes. Drain and cool under cold running water to stop the cooking process.
Mix oil, vinegar, garlic, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper together in a jar. Put the lid on the jar and shake into an emulsion.

Place tortellini, prosciutto, Gorgonzola cheese, bell peppers, and onion in a large bowl. Pour the vinaigrette over the top and toss lightly with 2 large spoons. Enjoy immediately or allow the flavors to meld for 3 to 4 hours in the refrigerator.

gorgonzola-butter.name: Gorgonzola Butter
instructions: In a food processor, combine Gorgonzola cheese and butter. Process until smooth.

gorgonzola-cream-sauce.name: Gorgonzola Cream Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place a heavy skillet over medium heat. Pour cream into skillet, bring to a simmer, and cook cream until it reduces by half, about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally. Season with salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Pour dried ravioli into boiling water and cook, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender, 16 to 18 minutes. Drain pasta, reserving a cup of pasta water.
Gently fold cooked ravioli into cream sauce and turn heat to low. Mix in Gorgonzola cheese, stirring gently until melted. If sauce is too thick, thin it with a little pasta cooking water.
Stir in 2 tablespoons parsley and Parmesan cheese. Transfer to a serving bowl and sprinkle with diced apple, walnuts, and 1 teaspoon parsley.

gorilla-bread.name: Gorilla Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch tube pan.

Cut bread dough apart 2 1/2-inch pieces. Chop cream cheese into 1/2-inch cubes. Flatten the same number of dough pieces into small circles as you have pieces of cream cheese (reserve remaining dough). Fold a piece of cream cheese into each flattened dough circle and pinch the seams closed. Roll all the filled and unfilled pieces of dough into balls.
Combine sugar with cinnamon in a bowl and roll all the dough balls in the cinnamon sugar; set aside. Bring butter and brown sugar to a boil in a saucepan, reduce heat, and simmer for 1 minute.

Layer half the filled and unfilled dough balls with half the walnuts and raisins in the prepared tube pan; pour half the brown sugar syrup over the mixture. Layer remaining dough balls, walnuts, and raisins into the pan and pour remaining syrup over the gorilla bread.

Bake gorilla bread in the preheated oven until golden brown and the dough has baked through, 35 to 45 minutes. Let bread cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a serving platter. To serve, pull the bread apart.

gorts-reprieve-irish-coffee.name: Gort's Reprieve Irish Coffee

ingredients.prep: ground nutmeg, cinnamon, and allspice (for serving)

instructions: Stir coffee, whiskey, liqueur, simple syrup, and bitters in a glass to combine. Top with whipped cream, nutmeg, cinnamon, and allspice and garnish with mint leaf and coffee beans.

gougeres.name: Gougères

ingredients.item: (1 0.5 cups) grated comté cheese or gruyère

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Bring butter, salt, nutmeg, and 1 cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan, stirring until butter is melted. Remove from heat, add flour, and stir to combine.

Cook mixture over medium heat, stirring vigorously with a wooden spoon, until mixture pulls away from sides of pan and forms a ball, about 2 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring vigorously, until a dry film forms on bottom and sides of pan and dough is no longer sticky, about 2 minutes longer. Remove pan from heat and let dough cool slightly, about 2 minutes. Mix in whole eggs one at a time, incorporating fully between additions. Mix in cheese and pepper.

Scrape dough into a piping bag fitted with a ½” round tip (alternatively, use a plastic bag with a ½” opening cut diagonally from 1 corner). Pipe 1” rounds about 2” apart onto 2 parchment-lined baking sheets. Whisk egg yolk and 1 tsp. water in a small bowl; brush rounds with egg wash.
Bake gougères until puffed and golden and dry in the center (they should sound hollow when tapped), 20–25 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Dough can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill. Gougères can be baked 2 hours ahead; reheat before serving.

goulash-recipe-lezzet.name: Goulash Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı un (yemeğin suyunu koyulaştırmak için)

instructions: 1. Zeytinyağı ve tereyağını tencereye ekleyip ısıtın.
2.  Soğanı ekleyip pembeleşene kadar soteleyin.
3. Doğranmış biberi ekleyip 1–2 dakika soteleyin.
4.  Ardından marine edilmiş dana kuşbaşı etini tencereye alın.
5. Sarımsağı ekleyin ve etin tüm yüzeyleri hafifçe kavrulana kadar karıştırın.
6. Domates ve biber salçasını bir kasede sıcak su ile açın ve etin üzerine dökün.
7.  Karıştırarak 2–3 dakika kavurun.
8. 1 şişe maden suyu ve 1–2 su bardağı sıcak suyu tencereye ekleyin.
9.  Tuz, karabiber, kimyon, kekik ve toz kırmızı biberi ilave edin.
10. Tencerenin altını kısın, kapağını kapatın ve et yumuşayana kadar yaklaşık 45–60 dakika pişirin.
11. 2 yemek kaşığı unu 2 kepçe yemeğin suyundan alarak karıştırın ve homojen bir karışım elde edin.
12.  Bu karışımı tencereye ekleyin ve 5 dakika kadar karıştırarak koyulaştırın.
13. Gulaşı sıcak olarak pilav, makarna veya patates püresi ile servis edebilirsiniz.
14.  Üzerine taze maydanoz serpiştirerek servis edebilirsiniz.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

goulash-spicy-red-beef-soup-argiro.name: Goulash – Spicy Red Beef Soup
goulash-spicy-red-beef-soup-argiro.original_name: Γκούλας (goulash) – Πικάντικη κόκκινη σούπα με μοσχάρι
instructions: Στεγνώνουμε καλά με απορροφητικό χαρτί το μοσχάρι . Το πασπαλίζουμε με αλάτι, πιπέρι και το αλεύρι και ανακατεύουμε να πάει παντού.

Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε μια κατσαρόλα σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά και σοτάρουμε το κρέας για περίπου 5 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει ομοιόμορφα. Το μεταφέρουμε σε ένα μπολ και το διατηρούμε σκεπασμένο και ζεστό.
Στην ίδια κατσαρόλα και στο ίδιο λάδι όπου ροδίσαμε το μοσχάρι, σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι και το πράσο για 5 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο και τον πελτέ και συνεχίζουμε το σοτάρισμα για 1 λεπτό.
Επαναφέρουμε στο σκεύος το σοταρισμένο κρέας μαζί με όλα τα υγρά που έχει αφήσει στο μπολ.
Ρίχνουμε τα μοσχαρίσια κόκαλα, τη δάφνη, την πάπρικα, το κύμινο, την τριμμένη ντομάτα και το ζωμό.
Μόλις πάρει βράση η σούπα, ξαφρίζουμε σχολαστικά την επιφάνεια.
Χαμηλώνουμε μετά την εστία σε μέτρια ένταση και σιγοβράζουμε την κρεατόσουπα σκεπασμένη για 2 ώρες.
Προσθέτουμε στη συνέχεια τις πατάτες και τα καρότα και βράζουμε για 30 λεπτά ακόμα. Στο τέλος οι πατάτες πρέπει σχεδόν να λιώνουν όταν τις τσιμπάμε με το πιρούνι και το μοσχάρι να είναι πολύ μαλακό.
Ελέγχουμε και διορθώνουμε το αλάτι και το πιπέρι.
Αφαιρούμε τα κόκαλα και μοιράζουμε την κρεατόσουπα σε βαθιά πιάτα.
Ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο, πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο μπούκοβο και συνοδεύουμε με φρέσκο φρυγανισμένο ψωμί .

gourmet-dog-teleculinaria.name: Gourmet Dog
instructions: Descasque a cebola e a cenoura, corte a cebola em rodelas ou tiras e rale a cenoura. Leve ao lume uma frigideira com o azeite. Quando estiver quente, junte a cebola e as salsichas e core-as.

Polvilhe as salsichas com a salsa picada e retire-as do lume. Faça um golpe nos pães, no sentido do comprimento, e recheie-os com as salsichas, a cebola, a cenoura, batata-palha a gosto e o queijo ralado.

Coloque os pães num tabuleiro, forrado com papel vegetal, e leve-os ao forno, pré-aquecido a 190ºc, por cerca de 8 minutos. Retire e sirva de imediato, acompanhando com os molhos e com a alface, cortada em juliana.
Antes de retirar as salsichas do lume, pique-as com um garfo para perderem a água.

gourmet-mushroom-risotto.name: Gourmet Mushroom Risotto

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Warm broth in a saucepan over low heat. Meanwhile, warm 2 tablespoons olive oil in a deep-sided large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add sliced portobello and white mushrooms; cook and stir until soft, about 3 minutes. Remove mushrooms and their liquid to a bowl; set aside.
Add remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil to the saucepan. Stir in shallots and cook for 1 minute. Add rice; cook and stir until rice is coated with oil and pale, golden in color, about 2 minutes.
Pour in wine, stirring constantly until wine is fully absorbed. Add 1/2 cup warm broth to the rice, and stir until the broth is absorbed.
Continue adding broth, 1/2 cup at a time, stirring constantly, until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender, yet firm to the bite, about 15 to 20 minutes.
Remove from heat. Stir in reserved mushrooms and their liquid, butter, chives, and Parmesan cheese.
Season with salt and pepper and serve immediately.

gourmet-pastelillos-meat-pies.name: Gourmet Pastelillos (meat Pies)

ingredients.item: Sazon seasoning with coriander and achiote

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir beef in hot oil until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir in onion, tomato sauce, olives, sofrito, sazòn, garlic, and oregano. Bring to a simmer and cook until mixture is thickened, about 15 minutes.
Spoon 1 heaping tablespoon meat mixture into the middle of a disco. Moisten the edges, fold dough to form a half-moon, and press with a fork to seal. Repeat with remaining meat mixture and discos.

Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C). Working in batches, fry pastelillos in hot oil until golden brown and bubbly, about 3 minutes. Drain on paper towels before serving.

gourmet-patty-melts.name: Gourmet Patty Melts
instructions: Mix sirloin, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, salt, and pepper together by hand in a medium bowl. Form into 4 hamburger patties and wrap in plastic wrap. Place in the refrigerator until flavors have melded, 4 hours to overnight.

Heat butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat until melted. Add onions and saute until they begin to caramelize, about 15 minutes, reducing heat to medium-low if they seem to be sizzling too much.

Spray a large skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium heat. Place hamburger patties in the skillet and cook for 3 minutes per side, topping each patty with a slice of Cheddar cheese after flipping.
Place patties on toasted rye bread. Top with warm onions, Dijon mustard, and remaining bread.

gourmet-pub-burgers.name: Gourmet Pub Burgers
instructions: Mix ground beef, bread crumbs, shallot, Dijon mustard, egg, garlic, salt, and black pepper together in a large bowl. Refrigerate mixture to incorporate flavors, 20 minutes to 2 hours.
Form ground beef mixture into 6 patties.
Heat a skillet over medium heat; lay pancetta slices in a single layer in the hot skillet. Cook until pancetta begins to sweat, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove pancetta from skillet and keep warm.
Preheat grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.

Cook patties on the preheated grill until burgers are cooked to your desired degree of doneness, about 4 minutes per side for medium-well burgers. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 71°C (70 degrees C).
Place 1 burger into each of the buns; top burger with a pancetta slice.

gourmet-rib-eye-steak.name: Gourmet Rib Eye Steak
instructions: Preheat oven to 93°C (95°C).
Generously season all sides of the steak with salt and pepper.

Transfer to a wire rack on top of a baking sheet, then bake for about 45 minutes to an hour until the internal temperature reads about 52°C (51° C) for medium-rare. Adjust the bake time based on if you like your steak more rare or more well-done.
Heat the canola oil in a pan over high heat until smoking.
Sear the steak for 30 seconds on the first side, then flip.
Add the butter, garlic, rosemary, and thyme, and swirl around the pan.
Transfer the garlic and herbs on top of the steak and baste the steak with the butter using a large spoon.
Baste for about 30 seconds, then flip and baste the other side for about 15 seconds.
Turn the steak on its side and cook to render off any excess fat.

Rest the steak on a cutting board or wire rack for about 10 minutes. Slicing the steak before the resting period has finished will result in a lot of the juices leaking out, which may not be desirable.
Slice the steak into ½ -inch (1 cm) strips, then fan out the slices and serve.
Enjoy!

gourmet-roasted-shrimp-with-garlic-and-s.name: Gourmet Roasted Shrimp With Garlic And Spicy
gourmet-roasted-shrimp-with-garlic-and-s.original_name: Sarımsaklı Ve Acılı Gurme Karides Kavurma
instructions: 1. Pratik yemek tarifleri arasında iyi bir seçim.
2.  Sarımsakların kabuklarını soyup halka şeklinde dilimleyin.
3.  Zeytinyağı ve sarımsakları tavaya alıp ısıtın.
4.  Sarımsakların kokusu çıkmaya başlayınca Gurme Karidesleri tavaya ilave edip 8 dakika daha kavurmaya devam edin.
5.  Tuz, acı biber sosu ve kırmızı toz biberle tatlandırıp tavayı ocaktan alın.
6.  Servis tabağına alıp maydanoz yapraklarıyla süsleyin.
7.  Servis yapın.

gourmet-salmon-dinner.name: Gourmet Salmon Dinner
instructions: Make the creamy shallot potato puree: Melt 3 tablespoons of butter in a medium pan over medium-high heat. Add the shallots and cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the garlic and another tablespoon of butter and continue to cook for another 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently, until the shallots are browned.
Add the milk, white pepper, and salt and stir to incorporate.
Transfer the shallot mixture to a food processor and process until smooth.
Mash potatoes in a large bowl. Add the shallot puree and continue to mash until fully incorporated. Set aside.
Make the sautéed vegetables: Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the mushrooms and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until starting to soften.

Push the mushrooms to one side of the pan and add a bit more oil. Add the asparagus and season everything with salt and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes, until the vegetables are tender. Remove from the heat and set aside.
Make the salmon: On a cutting board, cut 4 slits in the salmon skin, roughly ¼-inch (6 mm) apart and ½-inch (12 mm) into the salmon flesh. Season with salt, pepper, and thyme leaves.

Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a medium pan over medium-high heat. Add the salmon, skin-side down. Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until a lighter pink color has reached ⅓-½ of the way up the side of the salmon.

Flip the salmon and immediately add the butter, garlic, and a few sprigs of thyme. Stir the garlic and thyme around the pan to infuse the flavors and spoon the butter over the salmon for 2 minutes more, until the salmon is cooked through. Remove the salmon from the pan.
Add the potato puree to plates and top with the sautéed vegetables and salmon.
Enjoy!

gourmet-sweet-potato.name: Gourmet Sweet Potato
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Place an oven rack in the center position. Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Bake sweet potatoes in the preheated oven on the center rack until a knife inserted into the centers easily glides through, about 35 minutes. Let cool enough to handle, then peel and mash in a large bowl.
Add eggs, sugar, 1/4 cup butter, heavy cream, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt to mashed potatoes; mix well and transfer to the prepared baking dish.
Combine remaining 1/4 cup butter, brown sugar, pecans, and flour in a medium bowl. Mix with a pastry blender or your fingers to the consistency of course meal. Sprinkle over sweet potato mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is crisp and lightly browned, about 30 minutes.

gourmet-sweet-potato-souffle.name: Gourmet Sweet Potato Soufflé
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil over medium-high heat. Add sweet potatoes, cover, and cook until soft, about 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly grease a 2-quart soufflé dish. Sprinkle the dish with 1 tablespoon white sugar, shaking the dish to evenly coat the bottom and sides.

Place sweet potatoes into the bowl of a food processor. Add eggs, cream, 3/4 cup sugar, butter, vanilla, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg. Process until mixture is smooth. Pour into prepared soufflé dish.
Bake the sweet potato mixture in preheated oven for 20 minutes. Lower oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake the sweet potato mixture until edges are slightly browned, about 40 minutes more. Serve warm or at room temperature.

governor-tacos-with-shrimp-comedera.name: Governor Tacos With Shrimp

ingredients.item: 1/4 kg de queso para asar (oaxaca o asadero)
1/4  de cebolla (o media cebolla, si es muy pequeña)
40 gr de mantequilla (o si no, aceite vegetal.)

instructions: Comenzaremos por lavar el pimentón o pimiento, quitarle la cabeza y cortarlo en juliana (en cintas). En el proceso, le quitaremos las semillas y las partes blancas de adentro.
También pelaremos y picaremos la cebolla y el ajo. En el caso de la primera, La picaremos en cubos pequeños, y en el caso del segundo, lo picaremos finamente o lo trituraremos.
Ahora nos encargaremos del apio. Lo lavaremos y los picaremos muy finamente. Reservaremos todos los vegetales.

Luego, ya con los camarones bien limpios y escurridos, los cortaremos en trocitos más pequeños (puedes dejar algunos completos para que el taco sea visualmente más interesante. De hecho, muchos se saltan este paso y ya no pican los camarones).
En una sartén, calentaremos casi toda la mantequilla (guardáremos un poquito para luego calentar las tortillas).
Con la mantequilla caliente, saltearemos el ajo y la cebolla, a fuego medio-bajo (para no arriesgarnos a que se cocinen de más, o a que la mantequilla se queme).
Después de cocinar el ajo y la cebolla entre 4 y 5 minutos, para que esta última comience a tornarse transparente, agregaremos el pimiento picado y el apio.
Cocinaremos los vegetales un par de minutos más, y agregaremos entonces los camarones.
Mezclaremos todo lo que está en el sartén, y sazonaremos con una pizca de sal, otra de pimienta y un toquecito de orégano al gusto.
Después, picaremos el limón y rociaremos la preparación con su jugo.

Luego, dejaremos cocinar un par de minutos más y entonces, agregaremos el queso. Para este último paso, hay que ser lo suficientemente rápidos. La idea es que el queso se funda un poco y se mezcle bien con el resto de los ingredientes, pero no que se cocine al punto de tostarse, o de que la mezcla tome una consistencia que no nos convenga para nuestros tacos. Lo que haremos es que mezclaremos bien el queso con el resto del guiso, dejaremos que se funda ligeramente y retiraremos el relleno de la sartén.

En otro sartén calentaremos lo que quedó de la mantequilla, y luego pasaremos las tortillas para que también se calienten. Les daremos una vuelta rápida, por ambos lados, y luego las rellenaremos con el guiso preparado con los camarones.

goxua-traditional-basque-dessert-pequere.name: Goxua, Traditional Basque Dessert
instructions: Colocamos todos los ingredientes (azúcar, leche, maicena, huevos y vainilla) en el vaso de la batidora y mezclamos hasta obtener una mezcla homogénea y sin grumos. Luego, vertemos esta mezcla en un cazo y lo colocamos a fuego medio. Continuamos cocinando y removiendo constantemente hasta que la crema pastelera se espese y adquiera la consistencia deseada. Una vez lista, dejamos que la crema se temple un poco. Para evitar que se forme una capa dura en la superficie al enfriarse, cubrimos directamente con film transparente tocando la crema

Para preparar el almíbar, comenzamos calentando el azúcar y el agua en una cazuela a fuego medio. Continuamos la cocción hasta observar que el azúcar se ha disuelto completamente. En ese momento, añadimos el ron y dejamos que la mezcla reduzca ligeramente, ajustando el fuego para evitar que se evapore demasiado rápido. Una vez alcanzado el punto deseado, retiramos del fuego y reservamos el almíbar para su posterior uso.

Para comenzar, precalentamos el horno a 180°C, activando tanto la resistencia superior como la inferior. Luego, colocamos los huevos y el azúcar en un bol grande y comenzamos a batir con unas varillas eléctricas. Es importante batir enérgicamente durante al menos 5 minutos, hasta obtener una masa bien inflada y de color blanquecino, que debe duplicar su volumen inicial. A continuación, procedemos a tamizar la harina. La añadimos gradualmente a la mezcla de huevos y azúcar, incorporándola con cuidado mediante una espátula. Es clave realizar movimientos envolventes y delicados para evitar que la mezcla pierda aire y volumen. Una vez la harina esté completamente integrada, vertemos la masa en un molde, que puede ser redondo de aproximadamente 28 cm de diámetro o rectangular de unos 25 x 35 cm. Es importante que el molde esté previamente forrado con papel para hornear y que sea lo suficientemente grande para que el bizcocho no quede demasiado fino. Introducimos el molde en el horno y cocinamos el bizcocho durante aproximadamente 10 minutos. Para comprobar si está listo, pinchamos el centro con un palillo; si sale limpio, el bizcocho está listo. Si no, lo dejamos algunos minutos más hasta que esté completamente cocido. Finalmente, retiramos el bizcocho del horno y lo dejamos enfriar sobre una rejilla antes de desmoldar. Este paso es crucial para que el bizcocho mantenga su estructura y no se humedezca con el calor residual

Primero, colocamos la nata fría en un bol amplio, idealmente refrigerado previamente para facilitar el montado. Añadimos una cucharada de azúcar al bol. Es importante que tanto la nata como el bol estén fríos para ayudar a que la nata se monte adecuadamente y adquiera la consistencia deseada. Usando unas varillas eléctricas, comenzamos a batir la nata. Continuamos batiendo hasta que la nata se vuelva firme y mantenga su forma. Es crucial no batir de más para evitar que se convierta en mantequilla. Una vez montada, trasladamos la nata a una manga pastelera con la boquilla de nuestra elección. Esto nos facilitará la aplicación posterior sobre el postre. Guardamos la manga pastelera en la nevera hasta el momento de su uso. Mantener la nata refrigerada es esencial para preservar su textura y firmeza hasta el momento de decorar o complementar nuestro postre
Ponemos una base de nata en el fondo de la cazuelita de barro u otro recipiente individual

Para continuar con la preparación del goxua, sigue estos pasos detalladamente:  Una vez que el bizcocho se haya enfriado completamente, utiliza una cazuela del tamaño de los recipientes donde vas a montar los goxuas o un cortador redondo de la misma medida para cortar discos de bizcocho. Es importante asegurarte de que los discos tengan el tamaño adecuado para encajar perfectamente en el recipiente o vaso donde montarás el postre.  Con los discos ya cortados, procede a emborracharlos con el almíbar que preparaste anteriormente. Para ello, puedes usar una brocha de cocina o simplemente sumergir brevemente cada disco en el almíbar, asegurándote de que queden bien impregnados pero sin que se deshagan. Toma los discos de bizcocho ya emborrachados y colócalos cuidadosamente sobre la capa de nata montada que tienes en la manga pastelera. Si estás usando vasos o recipientes individuales, coloca un disco en la base de cada uno, o si estás montando el postre en un recipiente más grande, distribuye los discos sobre la nata de forma ordenada
Ponemos la crema pastelera en una manga y rellenamos por encima, del bizcocho, haciendo copetes.
Por último añadimos el caramelo líquido o bien añadimos azúcar y con un soplete caramelizamos todo el azúcar.

gracies-barmbrack.name: Gracie's Barmbrack
instructions: Place dried fruit in a bowl and pour in tea; let soak for 2 hours.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a loaf pan with cooking spray and line with parchment paper.
Beat flour, brown sugar, and egg into fruit mixture until batter is well mixed; pour into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven on the center rack until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean, 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours.

grad-cap-cookies.name: Grad Cap Cookies

ingredients.item: Miniature chocolate covered peanut butter cups

instructions: Cut string licorice into 2-inch pieces and pull apart to make small strings. Set aside.

Place one miniature peanut butter cup upside down on a work surface. Top with a dab of frosting. Center one chocolate-covered graham cracker onto frosting to form a cap with a mortarboard. Gently press cracker onto peanut butter cup.

Place a small dab of frosting in the center of graham cracker and attach licorice string tassel. Allow tassel to drape over edge of cracker. Place a candy-coated milk chocolate piece in the center of cracker over end of tassel to make button.
Repeat with remaining candies and crackers to make 50 graduation caps with tassels.

graham-cracker-carmelitas.name: Graham Cracker Carmelitas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Break each graham cracker into 4 equal pieces, creating 48 total; arrange closely together on a baking sheet.

Melt margarine in a heavy sauepan over medium heat. Add brown sugar; cook and stir until boiling and frothy, then boil 2 minutes more, stirring constantly. Off heat, fold in pecans; pour over graham crackers, spreading evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven until caramel mixture has baked into graham crackers, 8 to 10 minutes. Immediately transfer bars to a sheet of aluminum foil.

grain-and-hazelnut-sorrels-kitchen-robot.name: Grain And Hazelnut Sorrels (kitchen Robot)
grain-and-hazelnut-sorrels-kitchen-robot.original_name: Azevias de grão e avelã (robot de cozinha)

ingredients.item: Açúcar e canela em pó para passar

instructions: Prepare a massa: coloque no copo do robot a manteiga e o azeite e programe a 100ºC, durante 2 minutos, na velocidade 2. Adicione a água, a farinha, as sementes de cardomomo e o sal e ligue 20 segundos na velocidade 6. Retire e deixe repousar durante 2 horas.
Prepare o recheio: coloque a avelã no copo limpo e ligue 5 segundos na velocidade 5. Retire e reserve. Deite o grão no copo, ligue 1 minuto na velocidade 9, retire e reserve.

Coloque a água e o açúcar no copo limpo e programe na temperatura vapor, durante 10 minutos, na velocidade 1. Adicione a avelã, o grão e o sal e ligue 20 segundos na velocidade 5. Retire o copo da base do robot e deixe arrefecer.
Acrescente depois as gemas batidas, a canela e a raspa das laranjas e programe a 100ºC, durante 5 minutos, na velocidade 1.

Sobre uma superfície polvilhada com farinha, estenda a massa com a ajuda do rolo. Disponha por cima pequenas porções do recheio, cubra com massa, corte as azevias em formato de meia-lua e feche bem. Frite-as em óleo quente abundante, retire e escorra. Passe-as por açúcar e canela e sirva.

grain-bowl-with-blackened-shrimp-avocado.name: Grain Bowl With Blackened Shrimp, Avocado, And Black Beans
instructions: Combine water and dirty rice mix in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cover. Cook until water is absorbed, about 45 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand 5 minutes. Fluff rice with a fork and set aside until needed.
While rice is cooking, combine shrimp, chili powder, paprika, cumin, onion powder, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Heat oil in a medium cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add shrimp and cook until no longer pink, about 2 minutes per side.
Mix corn, red bell pepper, cilantro, lime juice, and olive oil together in a bowl to make corn salad.
Combine avocado, cilantro, yogurt, garlic, olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a food processor. Pulse until dressing is smooth.
Assemble bowls by dividing cooked rice, cooked shrimp, corn salad, black beans, and sliced avocado evenly. Drizzle with dressing and garnish with lime wedges.

grain-bowls-with-eggs.name: Grain Bowls With Eggs

ingredients.prep: such as freekeh, farro, rye berries, and/or barley

instructions: Cook grains in a small pot of boiling salted water until al dente. Drain and let cool in a medium bowl.

Meanwhile, melt 2 Tbsp. ghee in a small nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add shallot and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallot is beginning to brown and crisp around edges, 5–6 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in ginger, mustard seeds, and turmeric. Let cool slightly. Season with salt. Add cucumbers and half of shallot mixture to grains and toss to combine. Add lime juice; season with salt. Transfer grain mixture to a medium bowl. Wipe out skillet.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. ghee in skillet over medium-high. Add eggs and cook, undisturbed, until very deeply browned underneath, 2–3 minutes; season with salt. Carefully turn (if desired) and cook until all of the whites are opaque, about 5 seconds.
Divide grains between bowls. Top with eggs, remaining shallot mixture, and cilantro. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

grain-bowls-with-grilled-corn-steak-and-.name: Grain Bowls With Grilled Corn, Steak, And Avocado

ingredients.prep: such as quinoa, farro, rice, or barley

instructions: Season steak with 1 tsp. salt and 1 tsp. pepper. Let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat or heat grill pan over medium-high. Grill steak, turning occasionally, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of steak registers 120–52°C for medium-rare (2–3 minutes per side for skirt; 3–4 minutes per side for flank). Transfer to a cutting board and let rest at least 10 minutes or until cool.
Meanwhile, grill corn until charred on all sides, about 10 minutes. Transfer to cutting board and let cool.
Slice corn off cobs into a large bowl. Add grains, feta, scallions, oil, lime juice, and 1/2 tsp. salt and stir to combine. Divide corn mixture among bowls.

Thinly slice steak against the grain (to make slicing easier for skirt steak, cut into 5"–6" segments, then slice against the grain). Top bowls with steak and avocado. Drizzle jalapeño sauce over; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Steak and corn can be grilled 3 days ahead. Transfer to separate airtight containers and chill.

grain-pie-with-almonds-teleculinaria.name: Grain Pie With Almonds
instructions: Deite a água e o açúcar num tacho, leve ao lume e conte 3 minutos, depois de começar a ferver.
Acrescente o grão, previamente passado por água e bem escorrido, triture tudo com a varinha mágica, depois adicione a amêndoa e retire do lume. Por fim, junte as gemas e os ovos e mexa.

Forre uma tarteira com a massa folhada, recheie-a com o preparado anterior e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante cerca de 40 minutos ou até ficar douradinha. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

grain-salad-teleculinaria.name: Grain Salad
instructions: Abra as latas de grão, escorra-o, passe-o por água e escorra novamente. Reserve.
Descasque a cebola e os dentes de alho e pique-os finamente. Limpe os pimentos de sementes e corte-os em cubinhos.
Num tacho, aqueça o azeite, junte a cebola, os dentes de alho e os pimentos e deixe cozinhar, até que tudo fique macio.
Acrescente o grão, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe apurar. Sirva a salada quente, polvilhada com salsa picada.

grain-salad-with-olives.name: Grain Salad With Olives

ingredients.prep: halved, seeds removed, finely chopped (peel and flesh), plus more juice if desired

instructions: Cook farro in a large wide pot over medium heat, stirring often, until golden brown and toasted (it should start to smell like popcorn), about 4 minutes.
Remove pot from heat and pour in cold water to cover grains by 1 inch; throw in a generous amount of salt (a healthy handful should do it).

Set pot over medium-high heat and bring water to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, skimming surface occasionally of any foam that may rise to the top, until grains are tender but still have some bite, 25–35 minutes.
Drain and transfer farro to a large bowl.
Meanwhile, using the side of a chef’s knife, coarsely crush olives to break them up into large craggy pieces; discard pits.
Place crushed olives in a large bowl and add chopped lemon and shallots. Toss to combine; season with salt and pepper.
Let mixture sit 5 minutes to allow shallots to slightly pickle and flavors to meld.
Heat olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add olive mixture to the saucepan and cook, swirling occasionally, until ingredients are warmed through and shallots are slightly softened, about 4 minutes.
Scrape vinaigrette into bowl with farro and toss to combine.
Taste grain salad and season with salt, pepper, and a little lemon juice if desired.
Just before you’re ready to eat, fold herbs (mint and/or cilantro, and parsley) into the salad.

grain-salad-with-pickled-onions-and-herb.name: Grain Salad With Pickled Onions And Herbs
instructions: Cook broccoli in a large pot of boiling salted water (leave florets attached to stem so it’s easier to get in and out of the pot) over medium-high heat just until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate. Cook kale (again, leave on the stem to cook it) by dipping into the water just long enough to let the color turn bright green, about 10 seconds. Transfer to plate with broccoli; reserve pot of water. Let vegetables cool, then squeeze out any excess water.

Cook freekeh in salted water in reserved pot at a rolling boil, stirring occasionally, until al dente, 20–25 minutes for cracked freekeh or 40–50 minutes for whole. Drain freekeh well, transfer to a medium bowl, and let cool until just warm.
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Let cool; set aside.
Combine onion, garlic, oil, lemon juice, capers, red pepper, and fennel in another medium bowl; season with salt and black pepper. Let dressing sit until ready to use.
Cut broccoli florets off of stems and thinly slice stems. Cut kale from stalks and coarsely chop. Add vegetables to freekeh in bowl and toss to combine.
Add basil, cilantro, and mint to dressing; season again with salt and black pepper, if needed.
Add half of dressing to freekeh along with reserved pistachios; season with salt and toss to combine. Spoon remaining dressing over.
Do Ahead: Freekeh can be cooked 5 days ahead. Let cool, then transfer to an airtight container and chill. Dressing (without herbs) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

grain-salad-with-puffed-red-quinoa-and-l.name: Grain Salad With Puffed Red Quinoa And Labneh

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: amaranth, bulgur, and/or barley; from about 1 cup dried)

ingredients.item: Labneh (lebanese strained yogurt) or plain greek yogurt
Mild sprouts (such as pea and/or sunflower)

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Spread out ½ cup cooked quinoa on a rimmed baking sheet and bake, tossing once, until quinoa is dry and no longer sticks together, 30–45 minutes.

Heat vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat until almost smoking (oil needs to be very hot). Remove from heat, add dried quinoa, and quickly cover. Cook, shaking saucepan vigorously, just until quinoa is puffed, which will happen almost immediately. Transfer quinoa to paper towels to drain.

Whisk sugar, ½ cup olive oil, and 3 Tbsp. lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with kosher salt and pepper. Toss in shallot, chives, cooked grains, remaining 1 cup cooked quinoa, and half of puffed quinoa; season with kosher salt and pepper.
Spread labneh on plates. Top with salad, sprouts, and remaining puffed quinoa. Drizzle with oil and lemon juice; season with sea salt.

grain-salad-with-tomatoes-and-cucumbers.name: Grain Salad With Tomatoes And Cucumbers
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Cook farro in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium heat, stirring often, until golden brown and toasted (it should start to smell like popcorn and some grains may pop), about 4 minutes. Remove pot from heat and pour in cold water to cover grains by 1"; throw in a healthy handful of salt. Set pot over medium-high heat and bring water to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, skimming foam occasionally from surface, until grains are tender but still have some bite, 25–35 minutes. Drain and transfer farro to a large bowl.
Meanwhile, toast pine nuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Let cool.

Add pine nuts, cucumbers, both kinds of tomatoes, red onion, lemon juice, oil, and vinegar to bowl with farro and toss everything together to combine. Taste and season with salt, pepper, and more lemon juice, if desired.
Top salad with basil just before serving.
Do Ahead: Farro can be cooked 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

grain-sorrel-recipe-for-food-processor-t.name: Grain Sorrel Recipe For Food Processor
grain-sorrel-recipe-for-food-processor-t.original_name: Azevias de grão receita para robot de cozinha

ingredients.item: 2 saquetas (15 g no total)  saquetas de açúcar baunilhado

instructions: Coloque no copo do robot todos os ingredientes indicados para a massa, exceto a farinha, e programe a 37ºC, durante 2 minutos, na velocidade 1. Junte a farinha e programe mais 20 segundos na velocidade 6. Por fim, ligue mais 5 minutos na velocidade especial para massas.
Retire a massa para a bancada polvilhada com farinha, trabalhe-a mais um pouco e molde-a em bola. Tape com um pano húmido e deixar levedar, até duplicar de volume.

Prepare o recheio: deite o grão-de-bico no copo do robot e programe a 50ºC, durante 3 minutos, na velocidade mínima. Coloque-o num pano de cozinha limpo e esfregue-o ligeiramente para lhe retirar a pele. Volte a deitar no copo e ligue 1 minuto, progressivamente nas velocidade 5, 7 e 9. Retire e reserve.

Coloque no copo limpo os açúcares, a água, as cascas de limão e laranja e o pau de canela e programe na temperatura vapor, durante 10 minutos, na velocidade 1 inversa. Elimine as cascas e o pau de canela, junte o grão e ligue 20 segundos na velocidade 6. Acrescente a amêndoa e programe na temperatura vapor, durante 5 minutos, na velocidade 1 (com a abertura da tampa destapada). Deixe arrefecer.

Estenda a massa com a ajuda do rolo, até ficar com 2 a 3 mm de espessura. Corte círculos e, no centro de cada um, disponha um pouco do recheio de grão. Feche em meia-lua, unindo bem as extremidades. Frite as azevias em óleo bem quente, escorra-as sobre papel absorvente e polvilhe-as com açúcar e canela, previamente misturados.

grain-soup-teleculinaria.name: Grain Soup
instructions: Descasque, lave e corte em pedaços a abóbora, a cebola, o chuchu e o nabo. Corte também em pedaços o alho-francês. Lave bem a couve e corte-a em juliana.
Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, o alho-francês e a cebola e deixe refogar até ficar louro. Acrescente água, tempere com sal, junte o nabo, a abóbora e o chuchu e deixe cozer bem.

Adicione depois metade do grão escorrido, deixe ferver alguns minutos e triture tudo. Acrescente, por fim, a couve, o restante grão e um raminho de hortelã e deixe a couve ficar cozida. Sirva a sopa de imediato.

grain-with-vegetables-teleculinaria.name: Grain With Vegetables
instructions: Limpe o alho-francês, rejeite a parte verde e corte-o em rodelas finas; limpe e corte o pimento em tiras; retire as extremidades à curgete e corte-a em meias-luas; fatie os cogumelos.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira grande com um fio de azeite e refogue o alho-francês. Acrescente os restantes legumes e tempere com sal, pimenta, a paprica fumada, o molho de soja e sumo de limão.

Deixe cozinhar, em lume médio, mexendo sempre até os legumes ficarem cozinhados mas ainda crocantes. Adicione o grão cozido e deixe saltear durante mais 5 minutos. Salpique com hortelã picada e sirva morno ou frio.

grain-free-dog-food.name: Grain-free Dog Food
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place carrots, apples, and water into a pot. Bring to a boil, then cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer until soft, 10 to 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, crack eggs into a bowl and set aside. Place eggshells onto a baking sheet.
Bake eggshells in the preheated oven until dry, 5 to 7 minutes.
Remove eggshells from the oven and pulverize using a mortar and pestle or a coffee grinder.

Combine ground chicken, chicken livers, reserved eggs, ground eggshells, and sunflower oil in a large skillet. Heat over medium heat, mixing occasionally, until chicken is browned and crumbly and livers are no longer pink, 5 to 7 minutes.
Place spinach on top of meat mixture, then cover with a lid and steam until soft, about 5 minutes.
Mash softened carrots and apples in a bowl with a potato masher and add to meat mixture. Mix until well combined.

grain-free-organic-dog-food.name: Grain-free Organic Dog Food
instructions: Wash and trim ends of carrots. Peeling is unnecessary if using organic ones. Cut into small enough pieces to chop in a food processor and set aside. Chop apples, green beans, blueberries, and spinach in the food processor and set aside.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil and 1 tablespoon coconut oil in a large (at least 10-quart) stockpot and saute carrots until softened, about 5 minutes. Add apples, green beans, blueberries, and spinach and cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until cooked through, 5 to 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil and 1 tablespoon coconut oil a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground beef in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Add to stockpot. Add pumpkin puree, remaining olive oil and coconut oil and mix everything until well combined. Cover and allow to cool.
Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight. Divide desired portions into resealable plastic bags, removing as much air as possible, and freeze until needed.

grain-free-tahini-granola.name: Grain-free Tahini Granola

ingredients.prep: such as pistachios, pecans, walnuts, and/or almonds

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper or foil. Toss nuts and coconut in a large bowl. Whisk maple syrup, tahini, oil, salt, and cardamom in a medium bowl until combined. Pour tahini syrup over nut mixture and toss with a spatula until evenly coated. Scrape onto prepared sheet. Bake granola, tossing and rotating sheet from front to back every 10–15 minutes, until golden brown, 30–35 minutes total.
Let cool on baking sheet (granola will crisp as it cools), about 20 minutes. Break into pieces before serving.
Do Ahead: Granola can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.

grains-in-herby-buttermilk.name: Grains In Herby Buttermilk
instructions: Toast grains in a dry medium heavy pot over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until just slightly darkened and beginning to smell nutty, about 4 minutes. Pour in 4 cups water, then add onion, garlic, lemon zest, and a couple of big pinches of salt; stir to combine. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally and skimming any foam from surface as needed, until grains are tender (pull out a few grains and take a bite to test), 35–45 minutes; pluck out and discard onion, garlic, and lemon zest.

Meanwhile, purée parsley, dill, buttermilk, and a big pinch of salt in a blender until bright green and smooth. Pour into a medium bowl, add yogurt, and whisk until your arm gets a bit tired—3 minutes should do the trick (whisking the mixture well will ensure that the yogurt doesn’t split and get grainy when you add it to the grains).

Pour buttermilk mixture over grains. Increase heat to medium and bring to a bare simmer. Cook just until heated through, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and squeeze in juice from lemon half. Stir well, then taste grains and season with more salt if needed. Skim any foam from surface.
Ladle grains into bowls. Drizzle some oil into each bowl and top with coarsely ground pepper.

grains-with-vegetables-special-recipe-fo.name: Grains With Vegetables (special Recipe For Pregnant Women)
grains-with-vegetables-special-recipe-fo.original_name: Grão com vegetais (receita especial para grávidas)

ingredients.item: Pimenta acabada de moer q. b.

instructions: . Descasque a cenoura e corte-a em rodelas ou em palitos. Lave a curgete e a beringela e corte-as em pedaços. Limpe o feijão-verde e corte-o em pedaços grandes. Descasque a abóbora e corte-a aos cubos.

Descasque a cebola e os alhos, pique-os finamente e coloque-os num tacho juntamente com o azeite e os tomates previamente picados (sem a pele). Leve ao lume, deixe cozinhar até a cebola ficar loura e junte-lhe a cenoura e o feijão-verde.

Tape o tacho e deixe cozinhar 3 minutos. Adicione os restantes legumes, mexa, tape e deixe cozer por mais 5 minutos. Acrescente o grão, tempere com sal e pimenta moída, envolva e volte a tapar o tacho. Deixe cozer por mais 10 minutos e sirva polvilhado com salsa picada.
Calorias: 306 Kcal por dose  Interesse nutricional: rica em fibras alimentares, proteínas de origem vegetal e antioxidantes

gram-millers-bread-and-butter-pickles.name: Gram Miller's Bread And Butter Pickles

ingredients.item: -pint canning jars with lids and rings

instructions: Mix cucumbers and onions together in a bowl. Stir in salt and let sit for 2 hours.

Stir vinegar, water, sugar, celery seed, mustard seed, ginger, and turmeric together in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil; add cucumber mixture and continue to boil until cucumbers and onions are tender, about 5 minutes.

Sterilize the jars and lids in boiling water for at least 5 minutes. Pack the hot cucumber mixture into the hot, sterilized jars, filling the jars to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a knife or a thin spatula around the insides of the jars after they have been filled to remove any air bubbles. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any food residue. Top with lids, and screw on rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars into the boiling water using a holder. Leave a 2-inch space between the jars. Pour in more boiling water if necessary to bring the water level to at least 1 inch above the tops of the jars. Bring the water to a rolling boil, cover the pot, and process for 15 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart, until cool. Once cool, press the top of each lid with a finger, ensuring that the seal is tight (lid does not move up or down at all). Store in a cool dark area.

gram-opals-sugar-cookies.name: Gram Opal's Sugar Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.
Sift flour, baking soda, and 1/8 teaspoon salt together in a bowl.

Beat 1 cup butter, white sugar, and egg in a bowl with an electric mixer until creamy, 2 to 3 minutes. Add flour mixture, vanilla extract, and lemon extract to butter mixture; stir until dough is well blended. Roll cookie dough into walnut-size balls and place 2 inches apart onto prepared cookie sheets. Press each ball down with the bottom of a glass to flatten slightly.
Bake in the preheated oven until baked through, 6 to 7 minutes. Cool.

Stir confectioners' sugar, 1/4 cup melted butter, hot water, and vanilla together in a bowl until sugar is completely dissolved and icing is smooth. Spread icing on cooled cookies and top each cookie with a pecan.

gramas-cornflake-peanut-butter-cookies.name: Grama's Cornflake Peanut Butter Cookies
instructions: Bring sugar and corn syrup to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Stir in butter and peanut butter until thoroughly combined, then remove from the heat.
Place cornflakes into a large bowl. Pour peanut butter mixture over top and mix until cornflakes are well coated.
Drop 1-tablespoon scoops of the mixture onto a waxed-paper lined baking sheet. Flatten slightly if desired, then allow to cool for 30 minutes before serving.

gramma-momos-ww-pancakes.name: Gramma Momo's Ww Pancakes
instructions: Whisk whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl. Mix in brown sugar, breaking it up into pea-sized pieces. Beat eggs in a separate bowl and stir milk, applesauce, and vanilla extract into eggs. Make a well in the dry ingredients and pour in the milk mixture; stir until just combined. If batter is too thick, add more milk.

Grease a skillet or griddle with vegetable oil and place over medium-high heat. Scoop 2 tablespoons of batter onto the hot skillet and cook pancake until browned on the bottom and bubbles appear in the top, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip the pancake and cook until browned, 2 or 3 more minutes. Repeat with remaining batter.

grammas-apple-bread-pudding.name: Gramma's Apple Bread Pudding
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 7x11-inch baking dish.

To make the bread pudding: Combine bread, apples, and raisins in a large bowl. Combine milk, brown sugar, and butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir until butter is melted. Pour over bread mixture in the bowl; mix until evenly coated. Pour bread mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Whisk eggs, cinnamon, and vanilla together in a small bowl. Pour egg mixture over bread mixture in the baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until the center is set and apples are tender, 40 to 50 minutes.
Meanwhile, make the vanilla sauce: Mix milk, butter, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, and stir in vanilla. Serve over pudding.

grammys-overnight-lasagna.name: Grammy's Overnight Lasagna
instructions: Cook the ground beef in a large saucepan over medium-high heat until browned and no longer pink, about 5 minutes; drain fat. Stir in the marinara sauce, water, and salt. Bring to a boil. Remove sauce from heat.

Arrange 6 noodles in a 9x13-inch baking dish, breaking if necessary to fit. Spoon 1/2 of the sauce over noodles. Top with 1/2 of the cottage cheese and 1/2 of the mozzarella cheese. Repeat layers with remaining noodles, sauce, cottage cheese, and mozzarella cheese. Top with Parmesan cheese. Cover tightly with foil; refrigerate overnight.
Preheat an oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake lasagna, covered, until noodles are soft, cheese is melted, and sauce is bubbly, about 1 hour. Allow to sit for 10 minutes before serving.

gramps-ranch-dip.name: Gramp's Ranch Dip
instructions: Mix sour cream, ranch dressing mix, black pepper, garlic powder, and jalapeno pepper in a bowl; refrigerate at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to mingle before serving.

grand-aioli.name: Grand Aioli

ingredients.prep: wax beans, and/or sugar snap peas; sliced cucumbers; cherry tomatoes; radishes; and/or boiled fingerling potatoes)

instructions: Combine egg yolks, mustard, garlic, and a pinch of salt in a medium bowl set on top of a kitchen towel laid across a small heavy pot (this setup will anchor the bowl while you whisk so you have a free hand for pouring). Whisking constantly, add oil to egg mixture, starting with just a few drops and gradually increasing amount to a fine steady stream. Stop adding if there is any unincorporated oil in the bowl; going slow is key. Keep whisking until emulsified, then whisk in lemon juice. Taste and season aioli with more salt if needed. Serve with vegetables and proteins of choice.

grand-duke-apple-pie-teleculinaria.name: Grand Duke Apple Pie
instructions: Prepare a base: triture as bolachas com a canela, a raspa de limão e o sal, até obter um género de areia. Derreta a manteiga e adicione ao preparado anterior, envolvendo bem. Com esta massa, forre uma tarteira e reserve no frio.

Prepare o creme: descasque as maçãs, retire-lhes o caroço e corte-as em lâminas. Coloque num tacho e adicione o sumo de limão, o açúcar e o vinho do Porto. Leve ao lume e deixe cozer, até a maçã se desfazer.
Nessa altura, retire do lume e adicione as gemas, previamente desfeitas nas natas. Leve novamente ao lume, mexendo sempre até as gemas cozerem.
Retire do lume e junte a manteiga. Deite o creme na tarteira com a massa, alise, deixe arrefecer e leve ao frio. Sirva de seguida.

grand-marnier-souffle.name: Grand Marnier Soufflé
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Brush the insides of two (8-ounce) ramekins with 1 tablespoon melted butter; sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar. Place on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil.

Melt 5 teaspoons butter in a saucepan over medium-low heat; cook and stir flour in hot butter until golden brown and fragrant, about 2 minutes. Pour in milk and cook, stirring continuously, until smooth and thick, 3 to 4 minutes. Pour into a large bowl. Stir in orange liqueur and zest. Add egg yolks and vanilla; mix until smooth.

Whisk egg whites in a second large bowl until frothy. Slowly add 2 tablespoons sugar and whisk until combined. Add remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and continue to whisk until meringue holds its shape and is thick but not stiff.
Fold 1/2 of the meringue into egg yolk mixture until combined. Gently fold in remaining meringue until well mixed. Transfer to the prepared ramekins, leaving 1/4-inch space at the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until risen and browned, about 16 minutes.

grand-mernier-sorbet-recipe-comedera.name: Grand Mernier Sorbet Recipe
grand-mernier-sorbet-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sorbete de Grand Mernier

ingredients.item: 300 ml de jugo de naranja natural recién exprimido
1 cdita de ralladura fina de naranja
1 cdita de jugo de limón fresco

instructions: En una cacerola pequeña, agrega el agua, el azúcar y la pizca de sal. Calienta a fuego medio mientras mezclas hasta que el azúcar se disuelva completamente. No es necesario hervir intensamente.
Cuando el jarabe esté transparente, retíralo del fuego y deja enfriar durante unos minutos.
Añade al jarabe el jugo de naranja fresco, el jugo de limón, la ralladura de naranja y la miel de azahar si decides utilizarla. Mezcla bien para integrar los sabores.
Agrega el Grand Marnier una vez que la mezcla esté templada. Esto preserva mejor los aromas del licor y evita que el alcohol se evapore.
Agrega el Grand Marnier una vez que la mezcla esté templada. Esto preserva mejor los aromas del licor y evita que el alcohol se evapore.

Si deseas una textura más sedosa, bate ligeramente una clara de huevo hasta que esté espumosa y mézclala suavemente con la preparación. Este paso es opcional, pero aporta una textura más aireada al sorbete.

Vierte la mezcla en un recipiente ancho y colócala en el congelador. Cada 30 minutos, retira el recipiente y raspa el sorbete con un tenedor para romper los cristales de hielo. Repite este proceso durante unas 3 horas para lograr una textura fina.
Cuando el sorbete esté firme pero cremoso, sírvelo en copas frías. Puedes decorar con ralladura de naranja, hojas de menta o una fina piel de naranja confitada.

grand-vizier-kebab-lezzet.name: Grand Vizier Kebab
instructions: 1. Kuyruk yağı, kuzu boşluğu eti, maydanoz, sarımsak, tuz, karabiber ve pul biberi mutfak robotunda kıyma haline getirin.
2.  Yassı kebap şişlerine 150’şer gr olacak şekilde geçirin.
3.  Kömür ateşinde ya da ızgarada pişirin.
4.  Sos için gerekli malzemeleri tavada zeytinyağında kavurun.
5.  Sosu servis tabağına alın.
6.  Üzerine pişirdiğiniz kebabı yerleştirin ve servis yapın.

grandaddys-sweet-potato-meringue-pie.name: Grandaddy's Sweet Potato Meringue Pie
instructions: Place the sweet potatoes into a large pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain and allow to steam dry for a minute or two. Transfer the sweet potatoes into a mixing bowl, and allow to cool for about 10 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 9-inch pie dish with unbaked pie crust.
Mash the sweet potatoes smoothly, and mix in butter, 3/4 cup of sugar, salt, milk, egg yolks, cinnamon, and vanilla extract. Pour the filling into the pie crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until the filling is set and the pie crust is beginning to brown, 25 to 30 minutes.

Place the egg whites into a clean mixing bowl, and beat until stiff with an electric mixer set on medium, 3 to 5 minutes. Beat in 1/4 cup sugar and 1/2 teaspoon of vanilla extract, until the mixture holds firm peaks and is glossy. Remove the pie from the oven and spoon meringue over the sweet potato filling, swirling the meringue into attractive peaks. Return to oven, and bake until the meringue turns golden brown, about 10 minutes, watching carefully to avoid burning. Allow to cool before serving.

grandma-linas-duck-rice-teleculinaria.name: Grandma Lina's Duck Rice
grandma-linas-duck-rice-teleculinaria.original_name: Arroz de pato da avó Lina
instructions: Para preparar este arroz de pato, comece por arranjar o pato, corte-o em quartos e coza-os em água temperada com sal, juntamente com uma cebola e dois alhos descascados e lavados, os grãos de pimenta e as folhas de louro. Deixe cozer durante cerca de 1 hora e 30 minutos ou até que a carne fique bastante macia. Depois escorra, deixe amornar, retire a pele e os ossos e desfie. Passe o caldo pelo passador de rede e reserve 1,5L.

Ligue o forno a 180° C. Descasque a restante cebola e alhos, pique-os finamente, deite-os para um tacho, junte o azeite, leve ao lume e deixe refogar até ficar douradinho. Adicione depois o arroz e a raspa da casca de uma laranja e deixe fritar durante 3 minutos, mexendo de vez em quando. Regue depois com o caldo, rectifique os temperos, mexa, tape o tacho e leve ao forno durante 20 minutos.

Retire do forno, mexa o arroz com um garfo grande para soltar, regue depois com o sumo da laranja que raspou, junte o pato desfiado e envolva. Deite num tabuleiro de louça ou pirex e leve novamente ao forno até aquecer bem. Retire do forno, decore com as restantes laranjas lavadas e cortadas em meias-luas finas, polvilhe com a salsa picada e sirva.

grandmas-apple-pie-argiro.name: Grandma's Apple Pie

ingredients.item: 200 grχαλβάς με σοκολάτα σπασμένος σε κομματάκια
200 grχαλβάς με σοκολάτα σπασμένος σε κομματάκια

instructions: Ρίχνουμε το ταχίνι και τον χυμό πορτοκαλιού σε ένα μπολ και ανακατεύουμε μέχρι να διαλυθεί το ταχίνι.
Προσθέτουμε το αλεύρι και τα υπόλοιπα υλικά και ζυμώνουμε μέχρι να έχουμε μια μαλακή ζύμη. Ίσως χρειαστεί λίγο επιπλέον αλεύρι.
Σκεπάζουμε τη ζύμη με μεμβράνη και την αφήνουμε να ξεκουραστεί για 30 λεπτά.
Χωρίζουμε τη ζύμη στα δύο. Ανοίγουμε το πρώτο κομμάτι σε φύλλο και το στρώνουμε σε λαδωμένο ταψί (34 εκ.).
Απλώνουμε τη γέμιση πάνω στο πρώτο φύλλο.
Ανοίγουμε το δεύτερο φύλλο και το στρώνουμε πάνω από τη γέμιση.
Ενώνουμε τις άκρες των φύλλων με τα δάχτυλα.
Τρυπάμε την επιφάνεια με πιρούνι για να φεύγουν οι υδρατμοί.
Λαδώνουμε την επιφάνεια και ραντίζουμε με λίγο νερό.
Ψήνουμε στους 180°C, στις αντιστάσεις, στην προτελευταία σχάρα, για περίπου 1 ώρα μέχρι να ροδίσει.
Βγάζουμε από τον φούρνο και αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Κόβουμε, σερβίρουμε και πασπαλίζουμε με άχνη και κανέλα.

grandmas-cake-with-cookies-and-pastry-cr.name: Grandma's Cake With Cookies And Pastry Cream
grandmas-cake-with-cookies-and-pastry-cr.original_name: Tarta de la abuela con galletas y crema pastelera

ingredients.item: 200 g de chocolate fondant (chocolate de postre)
200 g de nata 35% mg (crema de leche, nata para montar)
3 paquetes de galletas cuadradas (entre 200 y 250 g)

instructions: En un cazo, calentamos el litro de leche junto con la piel de limón y las ramas de canela. Cuando comience a hervir, retiramos del fuego, tapamos y dejamos reposar unos 10 minutos para que la leche absorba los sabores.

Mientras la leche se infunde, en un bol grande batimos las 6 yemas de huevo con el azúcar hasta obtener una mezcla homogénea. Añadimos la maicena poco a poco mientras seguimos batiendo para evitar grumos. Si utilizas el preparado de natillas, añádelo en este paso.
Después de que la leche haya reposado, retiramos la piel de limón y la canela, y la añadimos lentamente a la mezcla de yemas, batiendo continuamente para que no se cuajen las yemas.

Volvemos a colocar la mezcla en el cazo a fuego medio, removiendo constantemente hasta que espese. Esto puede tardar unos minutos. Retiramos del fuego y dejamos enfriar, cubriendo la crema con film transparente para evitar que se forme costra.
En un molde rectangular ponemos la primera capa de galletas, humedecemos cada galleta con un poco de leche y vamos disponiendo las galletas alineadas.
Vertemos la crema pastelera sobre la primera capa de galletas
Luego formamos de nuevo otra capa de galletas humedecidas en un poco de leche.

En un cazo ponemos la nata y el chocolate al fuego bajo y dejamos que se derrita el chocolate. Una vez el chocolate se ha derretido, retiramos el cazo del fuego y añadimos la mantequilla, mezclamos bien, y volcamos la cobertura sobre la tarta.
Llevamos la tarta de la abuela a la nevera durante toda la noche o un mínimo de 4 horas; mi recomendación es que la dejéis reposar durante toda la noche en la nevera.

grandmas-carrot-cake-argiro.name: Grandma's Carrot Cake
instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο μας στους 170°C βαθμούς.
Βουτυρώνουμε μια φόρμα του κέικ δαχτυλίδι 23 εκ.
Στρώνουμε μια λαδόκολλα μέσα στην φόρμα του κέικ.
Βάζουμε σε ένα μπολ τα αυγά με τη ζάχαρη και με το μίξερ χειρός τα χτυπάμε να αφρατέψουν για 6 με 7 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το λάδι και χτυπάμε σε χαμηλή ταχύτητα για 1 με 2 λεπτά.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε το αλεύρι, το αλάτι, τη σόδα, την κανέλα και το σουσάμι.
Με ένα σύρμα τα ανακατεύουμε και τα προσθέτουμε στο μίγμα αυγών.
Προσθέτουμε τα καρότα και απαλά τα ανακατεύουμε με ένα κουτάλι.
Τα αδειάζουμε στη φόρμα του κέικ και τα ψήνουμε για περίπου 55 λεπτά, μέχρι να βγαίνει καθαρή η λάμα από το μαχαίρι από το κέντρο του. Δεν το ξεφορμάρουμε ακόμα.
Βάζουμε το μέλι μαζί με το ξύσμα σε μια κατσαρόλα να ζεσταθεί και να αραιώσει η σύστασή του.
Τρυπάμε την επιφάνεια και περιχύνουμε με το αραιό μέλι.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει τελείως.
Αφού κρυώσει το κόβουμε σε κομμάτια και το σερβίρουμε πάνω σε μια πιατέλα.

grandmas-cheese-bread-argiro.name: Grandma's Cheese Bread

ingredients.item: 2κύβους νωπή μαγιά των 25 γράμ. (ή 2 φακελάκια ξερή μαγιά)
2κύβους νωπή μαγιά των 25 γράμ. (ή 2 φακελάκια ξερή μαγιά)

instructions: Αφαιρούμε πρώτα το περίβλημα από το λουκάνικο και το ψιλοκόβουμε.
Το σοτάρουμε σε δυνατή φωτιά για 3 με 4 λεπτά και τ ο αφήνουμε στην άκρη.
Διαλύουμε τη φρέσκια μαγιά σε ένα μπολάκι με τη ζάχαρη και 1 με 2 κουταλιές νερό.
Σκεπάζουμε το μπολ και αφήνουμε στην άκρη για 10 λεπτά, μέχρι να εμφανιστεί αφρός στην επιφάνεια.
Διαλύουμε το αλάτι στο νερό.
Βάζουμε το αλεύρι στον κάδο του μίξερ και ανοίγουμε λακκούβα με το χέρι.
Προσθέτουμε την ενεργοποιημένη μαγιά, το νερό και αρχίζουμε να ζυμώνουμε σε χαμηλή ταχύτητα με το γάντζο του μίξερ.
Ζυμώνουμε μέχρι η ζύμη να είναι εύπλαστη και να μην κολλάει στα χέρια.
Το ζύμωμα  μπορεί να γίνει και χωρίς μίξερ σε ένα μπολ με τα χέρια.
Βάζουμε τη ζύμη σε ένα ελαφρά λαδωμένο μπολ, τη σκεπάζουμε καλά και την αφήνουμε σε ζεστό σημείο να φουσκώσει. Εάν η θερμοκρασία του χώρου είναι υψηλή, θα φουσκώσει στη 1 ώρα.
Όταν η ζύμη φουσκώσει και διπλασιαστεί τη βγάζουμε πάνω στον πάγκο.
Τη χωρίζουμε σε τέσσερα όμοια κομμάτια.
Λαδώνουμε ένα ταψί 32 ή 34 εκ. και βουτάμε τα χέρια στο ελαιόλαδο,  με τα δάχτυλα ανοίγουμε τη ζύμη  σε χοντρό φύλλο μέσα στο λαδωμένο ταψί.
Γυρνάμε γύρω-γύρω και τεντώνουμε τη ζύμη ταυτόχρονα.
Η διάμετρος του φύλλου, πρέπει να είναι όση και η διάμετρος του ταψιού.
Πασπαλίζουμε σε όλη την επιφάνεια της ζύμης τρίμματα φέτας, λουκάνικο, φρέσκα βότανα, λιαστή ντομάτα, ή όποια άλλη γέμιση μας αρέσει.
Αν έχετε κάστανα, βάλτε σπασμένο κάστανο γιατί απογειώνει τη γεύση του.
Ανοίγουμε και το δεύτερο φύλλο με τον ίδιο τρόπο πάνω στον πάγκο μας και το βάζουμε πάνω από το πρώτο φύλλο (πάνω στη γέμιση δηλαδή).

Είναι σαν να φτιάχνουμε 4 χοντρά φύλλα, που βάζουμε το ένα πάνω στο άλλο και ενδιάμεσα να έχουμε γεμίσει με τα υλικά της αρεσκείας μας. Γέμιση μπορεί να είναι οτιδήποτε μας αρέσει ή ακόμα να είναι διαφορετική σε κάθε στρώση, άλλη με φέτα, άλλη με ρίγανη, άλλη με λιαστή ντομάτα.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε την ίδια διαδικασία και με τα τέσσερα φύλλα.
Αφού στρώσουμε όλα τα φύλλα με την γέμιση σε σειρά το ένα πάνω στο άλλο, πιάνουμε τις άκρες τους και τις γυρίζουμε στο κέντρο της ζύμης, σαν να κλείνουμε σε μπάλα τη ζύμη με τη γέμιση.
Αναποδογυρίζουμε τη μπάλα ζύμης στο ταψί, έτσι ώστε οι ενώσεις να έρθουν από κάτω και να ακουμπάνε στο ταψί.
Πατάμε με τα δάχτυλα την επιφάνεια, έτσι ώστε να απλώσει και να πάρει το σχήμα του ταψιού.
Αλείφουμε όλη την επιφάνεια με ελαιόλαδο και πασπαλίζουμε σουσάμι και χοντρό αλάτι.
Σκεπάζουμε με καθαρή πετσέτα και αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 40 σε ζεστό σημείο και να φουσκώσει να τεντώσει.
Ψήνουμε σε πολύ καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200°C για περίπου 40 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει.

grandmas-coconut-cake-argiro.name: Grandma's Coconut Cake
instructions: Στο μίξερ χτυπάμε το βούτυρο με τη ζάχαρη σε δυνατή ταχύτητα για 5 με 6 λεπτά να μαλακώσει και να γίνει κρέμα.
Ρίχνουμε έναν έναν τους κρόκους ώστε να τους απορροφάει το μίγμα.
Προσθέτουμε το γιαούρτι, το ξύσμα, τις βανίλιες, το baking powder και την καρύδα συνεχίζοντας το χτύπημα.
Στο μεταξύ χτυπάμε τα ασπράδια.
Χαμηλώνουμε την ταχύτητα του μίξερ και διαδοχικά προσθέτουμε στον κάδο τα ασπράδια, το αλεύρι και το σιμιγδάλι.
