Luego, incorpora la tocineta y termina de cocinar por 4 minuto más hasta que te quede una salsa blanca bien cremosa.
Precalienta el horno a 180° C.
Toma los huevos cuando estén reposados y retira la cáscara con cuidado.
Coloca los huevos en una bandeja para horno, luego baña con la salsa blanca y esparce el queso parmesano.
Hornea por aproximadamente 15 minutos hasta que los huevos queden cremosos y el queso haya gratinado.
Retira del horno, sirve y disfruta.

gratin-mussels-step-by-step-recipe-comed.name: Gratin Mussels: Step By Step Recipe
gratin-mussels-step-by-step-recipe-comed.original_name: Mejillones gratinados: receta paso a paso
instructions: Lo primero será seleccionar los mejillones, eliminando aquellos que vengan rotos o dañados. Los lavamos concienzudamente debajo del agua del grifo retirando las barbillas, restos de algas y cualquier suciedad que traigan.

En una olla grande vertemos un dedo de agua (solo queremos que el vapor los abra), añadimos los mejillones y ponemos a fuego alto durante 3-4 minutos. En este tiempo se abrirán en su totalidad y estarán listos.
Los retiramos del fuego y reservamos para que enfríen y podamos manejarlos. Al cabo de unos minutos los vamos retirando de la cazuela y los colocamos en una fuente sin la concha superior.
Pasamos el consomé por un colador de tela y reservamos.
Cortamos en dados muy pequeños la cebolla, los pimientos y los dientes de ajo. Lo ponemos en una sartén con el aceite de oliva. Añadimos también la hoja de laurel para que se cocine con las verduras.
Cuando los ingredientes estén dorados, añadimos el bacon cortado en dados muy pequeños y lo rehogamos durante 1 minuto.
Añadimos el pimentón y vertemos el vino blanco y removemos para que se integren bien con el resto de ingredientes.
A continuación añadimos, poco a poco y a demanda del sofrito, cucharadas del líquido que habíamos reservado de la cocción de los mejillones.
Lo dejamos que se cocine a fuego medio hasta que se consuma el líquido, porque este sofrito debe quedar más bien seco. Añadimos sal al gusto.

gratin-potatoes-with-bechamel-argiro.name: Gratin Potatoes With Béchamel
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες και τις κόβουμε σε μαντολίνο σε πολύ λεπτές σχεδόν διάφανες φέτες.
Βράζουμε νερό σε μια κατσαρόλα και προσθέτουμε λίγο αλάτι
Μόλις βράσει, ρίχνουμε τις πατάτες και βράζουμε για 10′.
Βουτυρώνουμε ένα μικρό πυρέξ και στα τοιχώματα.
Με τρυπητή κουτάλα στραγγίζουμε και μεταφέρουμε τις πατάτες στο βουτυρωμένο σκεύος. Τις στρώνουμε φροντίζοντας η μια φέτα να μισό καλύπτει την άλλη.
Κρατάμε 2 κ.σ. τριμμένα τυριά για την επιφάνεια και πασπαλίζουμε τις πατάτες με τα υπόλοιπα και την μισή παρμεζάνα.

gratin-salmon-pie-recipe-comedera.name: Gratin Salmon Pie Recipe
gratin-salmon-pie-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de pastel de salmón gratinado
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 200°C.
En una sartén agrega una cucharada de aceite de oliva y haz un sofrito con el pimiento, la cebolla y el diente de ajo.
Limpia el pescado y lo incorporas a la sartén.
Añade la salsa de tomate y el azafrán. Salpimentamos.
Pela las patatas y corta en rodajas finas.
Engrasa una fuente para horno con la mantequilla y cubre el fondo con la mitad de las patatas.
Agrega el sofrito de pescado y por encima, el resto de las patatas.
Incorporamos la salsa bechamel por encima y tapa la fuente con papel de aluminio.
Baja la temperatura del horno a 180º y hornea durante 20 minutos.
5 minutos antes de que termine, quita el papel de aluminio, para gratinarlo.
Sirve caliente.

gratin-with-rice-argiro.name: Gratin With Rice
instructions: Βράζουμε το ρύζι και το στραγγίζουμε σε σουρωτήρι.
Ψιλοκόβουμε τα λουκάνικα και τα λαχανικά.
Βάζουμε το ρύζι σε ένα μπολ και προσθέτουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα λουκανικά, το τριμμένο τυρί, τα λαχανικά, τον αρακά, το καλαμπόκι, το μπρόκολο και το καρότο.
Τα ανακατεύουμε με ένα κουτάλι και τα βάζουμε σε μικρό λαδωμένο ταψί.
Βάζουμε τα αυγά σε ένα μπολ.
Τα χτυπάμε με το σύρμα.
Προσθέτουμε την κρέμα, λίγο αλάτι, λίγο πιπέρι και το σχοινόπρασο.
Περιχύνουμε το ρύζι με τα υγρά υλικά.
Πασπαλίζουμε με το υπόλοιπο τυρί.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200ºC, στον αέρα, για 20 λεπτά.
Σερβίρουμε ζεστό το ρύζι ογκρατέν με σαλάτα εποχής.

gratin-with-vegetables-and-crackers-argi.name: Gratin With Vegetables And Crackers

ingredients.item: 12μέτρια τρυφερά καρότα καθαρισμένα και κομμένα σε λεπτές φέτες
1μικρή σελινόριζα κομμένη στα 4 και έπειτα σε λεπτές φέτες
12μέτρια τρυφερά καρότα καθαρισμένα και κομμένα σε λεπτές φέτες
1μικρή σελινόριζα κομμένη στα 4 και έπειτα σε λεπτές φέτες

instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο.
Θα ψήσουμε το ογκρατέν με λαχανικά στους 180ºC.
Βουτυρώνουμε οβάλ πυρίμαχο σκεύος.

gravy.name: Gravy

ingredients.item: Skimmed and strained roast turkey drippings

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C (232°C).
Arrange 3½ pounds turkey wings and 1 turkey neck (optional) on a rimmed baking sheet.
Roast the turkey, turning halfway through, until golden brown, about 45 minutes.
Transfer the roasted wings and neck to a stockpot. Pour off and discard any fat from the baking sheet.
Pour 2 cups water onto the baking sheet. Scrape up any browned bits with a wooden spoon and pour this liquid into the stockpot with the turkey.
Add 1 chopped large onion, 1 peeled and chopped large carrot, 1 chopped celery stalk, 4 sprigs parsley, 4 sprigs thyme, 12 whole peppercorns, 1 bay leaf, and 10 cups water to the stockpot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer; reduce heat to low and simmer gently until the stock is reduced by at least one-third, about 4 hours.
Strain the stock through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean saucepan.
If you have more than 6 cups of stock, simmer uncovered over medium heat until reduced to 6 cups.
Let the stock cool. Pour it into an airtight container; cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: The stock can be made up to 3 days ahead and kept chilled. It can also be frozen for up to 3 months.
Melt ⅓ cup unsalted butter in a small skillet over medium heat.
Whisk in ⅓ cup all-purpose flour.
Reduce heat to low; whisk until the roux is golden brown, about 2 minutes.
DO AHEAD: The roux can be made up to 2 days ahead. Let it cool, cover, and chill.
Bring 6 cups of the Make-Ahead Turkey Stock to a boil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1–2 cups skimmed and strained roast turkey drippings.
NOTE: If you are short on drippings, skim fat from the roasting pan and add 1–2 cups water. Scrape up browned bits with a wooden spoon; strain this liquid into the stock.
Season the mixture to taste with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Whisk in the prepared roux.
Reduce heat to low; simmer gently for 5 minutes for the gravy to thicken and flavors to meld. The gravy is now complete.

gravy-mayo.name: Gravy Mayo
instructions: Vigorously whisk mayonnaise, miso, and lemon juice in a medium bowl, breaking up miso with whisk, until almost completely smooth. Add gravy and vigorously whisk, breaking up lumps, until almost completely smooth. Stir in chives and thyme; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Gravy mayo can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

gravy-sauce-recipe-lezzet.name: Gravy Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 su bardağı et suyu veya tavuk suyu (isteğe göre sebze suyu da kullanılabilir)
1 tatlı kaşığı worcestershire sos veya soya sos (isteğe bağlı, aroma için)
Karamelize soğan veya mantar doğrayarak sosun içine ekleyebilirsiniz.
Tereyağı yerine bitkisel yağ kullanmak, sosun kalorisini düşürür.
Et suyu yerine sebze suyu kullanarak ve nişasta miktarını azaltarak daha hafif bir sos elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Orta boy bir tencerede tereyağını eritin.
2. Eritilmiş tereyağına unu ekleyin ve un kokusu çıkana kadar (yaklaşık 1–2 dakika) kavurun.
3. Karışıma yavaş yavaş et suyunu ekleyin ve topaklanmaması için sürekli çırpın.
4. Sos kaynamaya başladıktan sonra tuzu, karabiberi ve isteğe bağlı Worcestershire sosu ekleyin.
5. Kısık ateşte yaklaşık 5–7 dakika kadar koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
6. Daha pürüzsüz bir doku elde etmek isterseniz süzgeçten geçirerek servis edebilirsiniz.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

gravy-braised-turkey-legs-with-cipolline.name: Gravy-braised Turkey Legs With Cipolline Onions

ingredients.prep: drumsticks and thighs separated, patted dry
white and pale-green parts only, chopped

ingredients.item: Turkey stock or low-sodium chicken broth

instructions: Generously season turkey all over with salt and pepper. Let sit on a large rimmed baking sheet about 1 hour to bring to room temperature.

Heat oil and butter in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Place 1 cup flour on a plate and dredge turkey in flour, coating only the skin (do not shake off excess). Cook, outer side down, until very well browned (do not cook on inner side), 5–8 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Add yellow onion, leek, celery, garlic, and peppercorns to pot, season with salt, and cook, stirring often and scraping up brown bits from bottom of pot, until vegetables are softened and beginning to brown around the edges, 10–12 minutes.

Sprinkle in remaining 2 Tbsp. flour; cook, stirring, 2 minutes. Add wine, bring to a boil, stirring, and cook until pan is almost dry. Add thyme, bay leaves, and 3 cups stock, season with salt, and bring to a simmer. Place turkey back in pot, browned side up, and add stock as needed to almost completely cover without submerging browned skin (this will keep it from getting soggy). Bring liquid to a very gentle simmer and cook until turkey is cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted near bone of thigh registers 165°, 35–45 minutes. Transfer turkey to plate.

Add cipolline onions and remaining stock to pot and simmer until tender, 20–25 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer onions to plate with turkey. Simmer braising liquid until reduced to about 3 cups, 15–20 minutes.

Beat yolk and cream in a small bowl; stir in 1 Tbsp. braising liquid to warm. Whisking constantly, gradually add yolk mixture to braising liquid and remove from heat (if gravy boils after this point, it will curdle). Strain gravy into a large bowl. Wipe out pot. Return gravy to pot; taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed. Return turkey, browned side up, and cipolline onions to pot and keep warm over low heat until ready to serve.
Serve topped with parsley.
Do Ahead: Legs can be seasoned 1 day ahead. Chill uncovered. Bring to room temperature before using.

gravy-stuffed-stuffing-muffins.name: Gravy-stuffed Stuffing Muffins

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Make the gravy: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add sausage; cook and stir until browned and very crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Whisk in flour until it combines with butter and sausage fat to create a roux; cook and stir for 2 minutes. Add green onions; cook and stir just until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Pour in milk and cook, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. Continue to cook and stir until nice and thick. Stir in cayenne, salt, and pepper; cook for 1 more minute, then remove from the heat.
Transfer gravy to a bowl and let cool to room temperature, 15 to 20 minutes. Wrap and refrigerate until cold and thick, at least 2 hours, or until needed.
Make the muffins: Set a baking pan on the lowest rack of the oven and preheat to 204°C (200 degrees C). Generously butter a 12-cup muffin tin with 1 tablespoon butter.

Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion and celery; cook and stir until onion just starts to turn translucent, 4 to 5 minutes. Add poultry seasoning, salt, and pepper; cook and stir for 1 minute. Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Meanwhile, combine bread cubes, parsley, sage, and thyme in a large bowl.

Pour boiling broth mixture over bread mixture and stir until combined. Mix in eggs. Fill the prepared muffin cups to the top with stuffing mixture, then go around and evenly divide remaining stuffing on top of each muffin, piling it up nice and high.

Wet your finger and make a big hole in the center of each muffin, poking down pretty far but stopping about 1 inch from the bottom of the pan. Place about 2 tablespoons chilled gravy into each hole, centering it in the hole the best you can. Reserve remaining gravy for another use.
Dampen your hands and mold stuffing for each muffin over the top to cover the gravy center. Generously brush the tops with melted butter.
Bake on the middle rack of the preheated oven until muffins are firm and golden brown, about 20 minutes.
Let cool in the pan for 5 to 10 minutes, then carefully remove and serve.

great-grilled-smoky-vegetables-with-avoc.name: Great Grilled Smoky Vegetables With Avocado And Goat Cheese Crumbles

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place mushrooms, red bell peppers, and red onion in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Whisk olive oil, lime juice, grill seasoning, garlic, and cayenne pepper in a small bowl; pour over vegetables. Toss to coat and allow vegetables to marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Remove vegetables from the marinade, and shake off excess. Reserve remaining marinade.

Grill vegetables on preheated grill until tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer grilled vegetables to a large platter. Whisk remaining marinade with balsamic vinegar; pour over vegetables. Top with avocado and goat cheese, then season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with basil to serve.

great-mustard-relish.name: Great Mustard Relish
instructions: Add pickles to the bowl of a food processor; pulse into ¼-inch pieces. Transfer minced pickles to a bowl.
Add onions to the bowl of the food processor; pulse into ¼-inch pieces. Transfer minced onions to bowl with pickles.
Stir mustard into pickles and onions until well blended.

great-pizzas-argiro.name: Great Pizzas
instructions: Βάζουμε πρώτα σε ένα μπολ το αλεύρι, τη μαγιά, το ελαιόλαδο, τη ζάχαρη και το αλάτι και λίγο λίγο ρίχνουμε το χλιαρό νερό.
Ανακατεύουμε μέχρι η ζύμη να μην κολάει στα χέρια και τη ζυμώνουμε για 10 λεπτά μέχρι να γίνει απαλή και ελαστική.
Tη βάζουμε σε ελαφρώς λαδωμένο μπολ, τη σκεπάζουμε και την αφήνουμε να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο περίπου για 1 ώρα.
Βάζουμε τη ζύμη στον πάγκο και τη χωρίζουμε σε 6 κομμάτια.
Δίνουμε σε καθένα σχήμα λεπτού δίσκου και τα πασπαλίζουμε με το καλαμποκάλευρο.
Κόβουμε τις ντομάτες σε φέτες και αφαιρούμε τους σπόρους.
Βάζουμε σε κάθε πίτσα φέτες μοτσαρέλα, ντομάτα, λίγο βασιλικό και αλατοπιπερώνουμε.
Περιχύνουμε ελάχιστο ελαιόλαδο.
Ψήνουμε τα πιτσάκια σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 230 ο C στις αντιστάσεις στην τελευταία σχάρα για 15 με 20 λεπτά μέχρι να ροδίσουν.

great-recipe-for-salmon-in-blue-cheese-s.name: Great Recipe For Salmon In Blue Cheese Sauce.
great-recipe-for-salmon-in-blue-cheese-s.original_name: Estupenda receta de salmón en salsa de queso azul.
instructions: Retira la piel del lomo de salmón (en caso de tenerla).
Retira la capa exterior del puerro y la parte verde las hojas (guardamos para otras elaboraciones).
Lava bien y córtalo por la mitad, a lo largo. Después corta cada mitad en finas tiras, de 1/2 cm de grosor.
Calienta un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra en una sartén y pocha el puerro a fuego suave.
Cuando el puerro esté tierno incorpora el queso azul, la nata líquida, el salmón y sazona.
Cuece durante unos dos o tres minutos antes de retirar la sartén del fuego.
Sirve inmediatamente, espolvoreando el plato con perejil o cilantro fresco picado.

greatest-gazpacho.name: Greatest Gazpacho

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

ingredients.prep: chopped chives, freshly ground black pepper, and grilled or toasted country-style bread (for serving)

instructions: Cut 2" off of ½ English hothouse cucumber (about 7 oz.), peeled, seeded, and cut into ¼" pieces and set aside for serving; coarsely chop remaining cucumber and place in a large bowl. Cut one quarter of ½ large red bell pepper (about 3 oz.), stemmed, seeded, into ¼" pieces and set aside for serving; coarsely chop remaining bell pepper and add to bowl with chopped cucumber. Add 2 lb. very ripe red tomatoes, preferably heirloom, cut into ½" wedges, to bowl and toss with ½ large shallot (about 2 oz.), peeled and chopped, 1 garlic clove, finely chopped or grated, 2 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar and a pinch of kosher salt. Let stand 30 minutes at room temperature to let flavors meld.

Transfer tomato mixture, along with any accumulated juices, to a blender or food processor (in batches if necessary). Add 3 Tbsp. olive oil and purée on medium speed until smooth; season with additional salt and vinegar, if desired. Strain through a coarse-mesh sieve into a large bowl or pitcher. Cover and chill until cool, about 1 hour.

Divide gazpacho among bowls. Top with quartered cherry tomatoes, chopped chives, freshly ground black pepper, reserved cucumber, and red pepper pieces; drizzle with olive oil. Serve with toasted country-style bread alongside.
Do Ahead: Gazpacho can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.
Editor’s note: This traditional gazpacho recipe was first printed in August 2016, as BA’s Best Gazpacho. Head this way for more cold soup recipes from our friends at Epicurious →

grecian-baklava.name: Grecian Baklava
instructions: Make the syrup by bringing the water, 3/4 cup sugar, orange juice, honey, and 1 tablespoon cinnamon to a boil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer 10 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature.
Preheat an oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Butter a 10x15 inch baking dish.
Stir together 3/4 cup sugar, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, nutmeg, and ground walnuts until evenly blended; set aside.

Press 2 sheets of phyllo into the prepared dish and brush with melted butter. Continue adding phyllo sheets brushed with butter two at a time until you have 12 sheets total. Sprinkle 1/3 of the walnut mixture evenly over the phyllo, then add another 6 sheets, buttering between every two. Sprinkle 1/2 of the remaining walnut mixture evenly over the phyllo; top with another 6 buttered phyllo sheets. Finally, sprinkle the remaining walnut mixture onto the phyllo. Place the remaining phyllo on top of the baklava, buttering every two sheets. Brush the remaining butter onto the top of the baklava.

Bake in the preheated oven until the phyllo is golden brown and crispy, about 1 hour. Remove from the oven; pour the cooled syrup over the hot baklava. Cool to room temperature before cutting into 1-inch squares or diamonds to serve.

greek-baklava.name: Greek Baklava
instructions: Chop nuts and toss with cinnamon. Set aside.

Unroll phyllo dough. Cut whole stack in half to fit pan. Cover phyllo with a dampened cloth to keep from drying out as you work. Place two sheets of dough in pan, butter thoroughly with a pastry brush. Repeat until you have 8 sheets layered.
Sprinkle 2 to 3 tablespoons of nut mixture on top. Top with two sheets of dough, melted butter, nuts, layering as you go. The top layer should be about 6 to 8 sheets deep.

Using a sharp knife cut into diamond or square shapes all the way to the bottom of the pan. You may cut into 4 long rows then make diagonal cuts. Bake for about 50 minutes until baklava is golden and crisp.
Make sauce while baklava is baking. Boil sugar and water until sugar is melted. Add vanilla and honey. Simmer for about 20 minutes.
Remove baklava from the oven and immediately spoon sauce over it. Let cool.
Serve in cupcake papers. This freezes well. Leave it uncovered as it gets soggy if it is wrapped up.
Enjoy!

greek-carbonara-argiro.name: Greek Carbonara
instructions: Αποφλοιώνουμε τα λουκάνικα από το περίβλημα και τα ψιλοκόβουμε.
Σε αντικολλητικό σκεύος τα ροδίζουμε σε δυνατή φωτιά το λουκάνικο.
Προσθέτουμε το σπασμένο σκόρδο και την πάπρικα.
Αφήνουμε για 2′ και προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι και προσθέτουμε το θυμάρι.
Βράζουμε για 5′ λεπτά.

greek-cheesecake-argiro.name: Greek Cheesecake
instructions: Αρχικά συγκεντρώνουμε τα υλικά που θα χρειαστούμε στη συνταγή.
Θρυμματίζουμε πρώτα τα μπισκότα με τα φιστίκια στο μπλέντερ.
Τα βάζουμε σε μπολ. Πασπαλίζουμε με κανέλα και προσθέτουμε το μαλακό βούτυρο.
Ψιχουλιάζουμε το μίγμα για το τσιζκέικ με μυζήθρα και μέλι να γίνει σαν βρεγμένη άμμος.
Βουτυρώνουμε φόρμα δαχτυλίδι 23 ή 25 εκ.
Στρώνουμε στη βάση της φόρμας το μπισκότο και το πατάμε καλά με την ανάποδη του κουταλιού να κολλήσει.
Στον κάδο του μίξερ ρίχνουμε τη μυζήθρα, τη ζάχαρη, το μέλι και τη μαστίχα, τα χτυπάμε να ενωθούν καλά και να κρεμώσει η μυζήθρα για 2΄.
Προσθέτουμε ένα ένα τα αυγά και τα ανακατεύουμε να ενωθούν.
Αδειάζουμε την κρέμα τυριού στο μπισκότο.
Ψήνουμε το τσιζκέικ με μυζήθρα από την Αργυρώ στους 180 βαθμούς C για 30-35΄ να ροδίσει καλά.
Αφήνουμε το τσιζκέικ με μέλι και φιστίκια Αιγίνης, να κρυώσει και το ξεφορμάρουμε.
Γαρνίρουμε με μέλι, κανέλα και φιστίκια.

greek-chicken-and-potato-bowl.name: Greek Chicken And Potato Bowl

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine chicken thighs, 2 teaspoons kosher salt, pepper, rosemary, thyme, oregano, red pepper flakes, cayenne, garlic, lemon juice, and 1/4 cup olive oil in a large mixing bowl. Toss very thoroughly to combine, making sure the chicken thighs are completely and evenly coated with the marinade.
Wrap in plastic and marinate in the refrigerator for 6 to 12 hours.
Preheat the oven to 246°C (245 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with foil and grease generously with olive oil.
Meanwhile, halve potatoes lengthwise; slice each half into 3 equal pieces. Dice into cubes and set aside.
Transfer chicken thighs to the prepared sheet pan smooth-side up, spacing evenly. Reserve any excess marinade in the bowl.

Add the potatoes to the bowl the chicken was in, along with a splash of olive oil and a large pinch of salt. Toss well to coat evenly. Scatter potatoes onto the chicken and distribute as evenly as possible in between the chicken thighs to fill any empty spaces.
Roast in the center of the preheated oven until the chicken is cooked through, about 35 minutes. Remove chicken to a plate or dish and cover. Chicken can be cut into bite-sized pieces if desired.

While chicken and potatoes are cooking, whisk red wine vinegar, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper together for dressing. Taste and adjust vinegar or oil as needed. Whisk in parsley and oregano.

Toss the potatoes in the chicken fat and pan drippings, and return to the oven until well browned and crusty, 10 to 15 minutes. Let potatoes rest for a few minutes before removing them with a spatula.
To make bowls, toss together cucumbers, tomatoes, red onions, feta cheese, chicken, potatoes, and dressing until evenly combined. Serve on top of a bowl of greens.

greek-chicken-couscous-bowl.name: Greek Chicken Couscous Bowl
instructions: Mix rosemary, black pepper, salt, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, cardamom, and coriander together in a small bowl. Place chicken on a plate and season with spice mixture. Heat vegetable oil in a saucepan over medium heat until it starts to shimmer, 2 to 3 minutes. Add seasoned chicken to the pan and cook, covered, 4 to 5 minutes. Flip chicken over and cook, uncovered, until browned on the outside and no longer pink on the inside, 5 to 6 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Squeeze lemon juice over chicken and allow to cool 5 minutes. Slice into strips.
While chicken cooks, bring water to a boil in a saucepan and add salt to taste. Add couscous, stir once, and cover. Remove saucepan from heat and let couscous steam for 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork.
Mix cucumber, sour cream, yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, mint, dill, salt, and black pepper together in a bowl until tzatziki sauce is just combined.

Divide cooked couscous between 4 bowls. Top with cooked chicken, tzatziki sauce, broccoli, onion, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, parsley, and feta cheese. Serve immediately or store in airtight containers to reheat later.

greek-chicken-gyro-salad.name: Greek Chicken Gyro Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 375˚F (190˚C).
In a bowl, add the Greek yogurt, cucumber, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and salt, and stir to combine.
Place pita wedges on a baking sheet and bake until crisp, about 8 minutes.
In a bowl, add the lemon juice, 1 tablespoon olive oil, oregano, lemon zest, garlic, salt, black pepper, and chicken, and toss to coat.
Heat remaining olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the spinach, cherry tomatoes, red onion, cucumber, chicken, and pita chips together in a large bowl and drizzle with tzatziki dressing.
Enjoy!

greek-farro-salad.name: Greek Farro Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Rinse farro with water; drain. Place farro in a pot; pour in chicken broth to cover farro by at least one inch, adding water if needed. Stir in 1 teaspoon olive oil and sea salt.
Bring liquid to a boil; reduce heat to medium and simmer, uncovered, stirring frequently, until tender, about 35 minutes for whole grain farro or about 20 minutes for pearled farro.
Drain farro, rinse with cold water, and set aside to cool completely, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk 1/4 cup extra-virgin olive oil, lemon juice, Greek seasoning, and garlic together in a large bowl. Stir in tomato, cucumber, red pepper, red onion, and feta cheese.
Stir cooled farro into tomato mixture until completely coated with dressing; season with salt and pepper.

greek-feta-spread-with-roasted-peppers-h.name: Greek Feta Spread With Roasted Peppers (htipiti)
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Place bell peppers on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil; turn to coat. Roast peppers, turning every 15 minutes or so, until collapsed and very tender, 60–75 minutes. Let cool.
Meanwhile, whisk shallot, garlic, vinegar, a pinch of black pepper, and remaining ¼ cup oil in a small bowl to combine. Season with salt.

Remove stems, skins, and seeds from bell peppers; discard. Finely chop flesh and transfer to a medium bowl. Whisk dressing to reincorporate and pour over peppers; toss to coat. Gently toss in feta and 4 tsp. thyme. Cover and chill dip at least 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld. Taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed.
Top htipiti with more thyme and serve with pita chips.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

greek-flank-steak.name: Greek Flank Steak

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat a charcoal griller (such as Big Green Egg®) to 191°C (175 degrees C) and lightly oil the grate.
Lay flank steak on a flat work surface. Cut steak from one side through the middle horizontally to within 1/2 inch of the other side. Open the two sides and spread them out like an open book.

Arrange butcher's twine on a plate, enough to cover the length of the steak. Place each string about 1 inch apart. Place steak on top; season with salt and pepper. Lay down a thick bed of spinach on top. Scatter feta cheese, olives, and bacon over the spinach.
Roll steak up starting from the edge closest to you, pressing filling down to tighten the roll. Tie with butcher's twine.

Cook over direct heat, turning at least once, until steak is beginning to firm and is hot and slightly pink in the center, 6 to 7 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 60°C (60 degrees C).

greek-green-bean-salad-with-feta-and-tom.name: Greek Green Bean Salad With Feta And Tomatoes

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add beans and cook until soft, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain well.
Whisk oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl. Stir in parsley, shallot, and garlic.
Combine beans and tomatoes in a large bowl. Pour dressing over top and mix to combine. Stir in feta. Allow to sit for 20 minutes before serving.

greek-horiatiki-salad.name: Greek Horiatiki Salad
instructions: Cut tomatoes into wedges over a large serving bowl so that any extra juices land in the bowl with tomato wedges. Add onion slices and oregano, then season liberally with salt; mix to combine. Allow tomatoes to sit at room temperature until juices have released, at least 20 to 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Mix in bell pepper, cucumber, and olives just before serving. Top with feta cheese and drizzle with olive oil.

greek-layer-dip.name: Greek Layer Dip
instructions: Spread the hummus in a smooth layer in an 8x8-inch baking dish.
Layer the feta cheese, cucumber, tomato, and Kalamata olives on top.
Whisk together the olive oil and oregano in a small bowl, then drizzle over the Kalamata olives. Refrigerate up 24 hours before serving.

greek-lemon-and-chicken-soup-avgolemono.name: Greek Lemon And Chicken Soup (avgolemono)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large soup pot over medium-low heat. Add carrot, onion, and celery. Cook, stirring continuously, until vegetables start to soften and turn translucent, 5 to 10 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chicken broth, parsley, and oregano. Increase heat to medium-high and bring to a boil. Add chicken and orzo. Reduce heat to a simmer.
Meanwhile, whisk eggs in a heat-safe bowl or glass measuring cup. Add the lemon juice and whisk until well combined.

Slowly add a ladle of hot broth to the egg mixture, whisking quickly to avoid scrambling the eggs. Repeat with a few more ladles until the egg mixture is hot and steaming. Slowly pour the egg mixture into the saucepan and whisk until incorporated.

Add 1/2 of the lemon zest to the soup; reserve remaining zest for another use. Taste soup; if too lemony, add chicken bouillon. Add hot pepper sauce, salt, and pepper. Cook until orzo is tender yet firm to the bite, about 5 more minutes. Serve immediately.

greek-lemon-chicken-and-potatoes.name: Greek Lemon Chicken And Potatoes
instructions: Place chicken and potatoes in a large bowl. Add lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, dried oregano, salt, rosemary, black pepper, and cayenne. Toss until chicken and potatoes are evenly coated.
Place chicken pieces skin-side up in the prepared pan. Tuck potato pieces around chicken. Drizzle with 2/3 cup chicken broth. Spoon any remaining marinade from the bowl over chicken and potatoes.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Toss chicken and potatoes, then place chicken skin-side up again.
Continue baking until chicken is browned and cooked through, about 25 minutes more; an instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should register 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer chicken to a serving platter and keep warm; leave potatoes in the pan.
Turn on the broiler, or set oven to highest heat. Toss potatoes again to coat in pan juices. Place the pan under the broiler and broil until potatoes are crisped, about 3 minutes.
Transfer potatoes to the platter with chicken.
Place the roasting pan on the stovetop over medium heat. Add the remaining 1/3 cup chicken broth and scrape up browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Strain pan juices into a measuring cup and pour over chicken and potatoes.
Sprinkle with fresh oregano. Serve and enjoy!

greek-lemon-pie-with-country-leaf-argiro.name: Greek Lemon Pie With Country Leaf

ingredients.item: Ελαιόλαδο για την επάλειψη των φύλλων
Αμύγδαλο ασπρισμένο για ντεκόρ ή φιλέ αμυγδάλου
Ελαιόλαδο για την επάλειψη των φύλλων
Αμύγδαλο ασπρισμένο για ντεκόρ ή φιλέ αμυγδάλου

instructions: Σε κατσαρόλα βάζουμε το γάλα, τη ζάχαρη, το αλεύρι και τη βανίλια.
Ανακατεύουμε συνεχώς σε μέτρια φωτιά μέχρι να πήξει το μείγμα και να γίνει μια λεία κρέμα.
Αποσύρουμε την κατσαρόλα από τη φωτιά και προσθέτουμε το γιαούρτι, τον χυμό λεμονιού και το ξύσμα. Ανακατεύουμε καλά και γρήγορα, ώστε να ενσωματωθούν τα υλικά χωρίς να κόψει η κρέμα.
Αφήνουμε το μείγμα να κρυώσει ελαφρά και στη συνέχεια προσθέτουμε τα αυγά, χτυπημένα ελαφρά, ανακατεύοντας συνεχώς μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθεί.
Λαδώνουμε ένα ταψί και ανοίγουμε 3 φύλλα άζυμου ζυμαριού .
Τα τοποθετούμε στο ταψί, λαδώνοντας ενδιάμεσα κάθε φύλλο. Τα φύλλα ανοίγονται με την τεχνική της μακεδονικής σφολιάτας , χρησιμοποιώντας ελαιόλαδο αντί για βούτυρο.
Απλώνουμε ομοιόμορφα τη γέμιση πάνω στα φύλλα.
Γυρίζουμε τις άκρες προς τα μέσα και σχηματίζουμε κόθρο.
Πασπαλίζουμε την επιφάνεια με τα αμύγδαλα και ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 160°C στον αέρα για περίπου 1 ώρα, μέχρι να ροδίσει όμορφα.
Αφήνουμε τη λεμονόπιτα να κρυώσει πριν την κόψουμε και τη σερβίρουμε.

greek-lemon-potatoes.name: Greek Lemon Potatoes

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into thin wedges

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Arrange potatoes in a single layer in a large baking dish or roasting pan.
Mix water, lemon juice, olive oil, mustard, oregano, salt, and pepper together. Pour over the potatoes and stir to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven, carefully turning over halfway through, until potatoes are tender and nearly all excess liquid has evaporated, 75 to 90 minutes.

greek-lemon-rice.name: Greek Lemon Rice
instructions: Melt butter in a pot over low heat. Pour in rice and stir to coat in butter. Let simmer on low heat, stirring occasionally, until toasted but not burnt, about 10 minutes.
Pour chicken broth, lemon juice, salt, and bay leaves into rice mixture. Bring to a rapid boil; continue to boil for 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to a simmer, cover, and let simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove from heat and let sit, covered, for 10 minutes. Fluff with a fork and serve.

greek-lentil-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Lentil Salad Recipe
greek-lentil-salad-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada griega de lentejas
instructions: Inicia la receta preparando las lentejas. Para ello, te recomiendo lavar muy bien los granos al menos dos veces para retirar las impurezas.
Una vez lavados, coloca las lentejas en una olla con 600 ml de agua.
Pela los dientes de ajo y agrega a la olla. Incorpora la hoja de laurel y condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla y cocina a fuego medio alto por aproximadamente 30 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, toma una lenteja y prueba a ver si está cocida. Debe quedar al dente. Cuando tenga esa textura, apaga, y escurre muy bien las lentejas. Retira la hoja de laurel.
Deja reposar las lentejas en ambiente frío para preparar la ensalada.
Mientras, toma la cebolla morada, pela y corta en julianas. Luego, corta en cubos medianos o pequeños los tomates.
Toma el queso y corta en cubos medianos o pequeños también. Las aceitunas como son sin hueso, puedes dejarlas enteras o cortar en rodajas.
En un recipiente, vierte la mostaza, el aceite de oliva, el zumo de limón, sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla muy bien.
En un bol o tazón de cerámica, agrega las lentejas. Luego, incorpora el tomate, la cebolla, las aceitunas y el queso feta.
Por último, vierte la vinagreta. Mezcla muy bien todos los ingredientes con cuidado para que no se deshagan.
Sirve tu ensalada y degusta.

greek-mason-jar-steak-salad.name: Greek Mason Jar Steak Salad
instructions: Divide Greek dressing evenly among the 5 jars, forming the first layer. Divide tomato halves evenly among the jars, forming the next layer. Top the tomatoes with Kalamata olives and red onions.
Place 3 ounces of steak over the onions in each jar. Top steak with 2 cups romaine. Place 1/4 cup feta cheese over the romaine. Seal and refrigerate jars until ready to serve.
Divide croutons among 5 small resealable plastic bags.

greek-meatballs-with-green-beans-and-tom.name: Greek Meatballs With Green Beans And Tomatoes (make-ahead Freezer Meal)
instructions: {'level': '1', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper.'}

{'level': '2', 'description': 'Whisk together onion, feta cheese, bread crumbs, eggs, parsley, garlic, oregano, and lemon zest in a large bowl. Add turkey, salt, and pepper; mix until well combined.'}
{'level': '3', 'description': 'Use wet hands to form mixture into twenty 1 ½- to 2-inch meatballs. Transfer to the prepared baking sheet.'}

{'level': '4', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven until browned and slightly firm, 10 to 12 minutes; meatballs will not be fully cooked at this point. Let meatballs cool completely, about 20 minutes.'}

{'level': '5', 'description': 'Combine cooled meatballs and green beans in a large, resealable freezer bag. Tightly seal the bag, allowing as much air to escape as possible. Freeze for up to one month.'}
{'level': '6', 'description': 'When ready to cook, preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper.'}
{'level': '7', 'description': 'Empty frozen meatballs and beans onto a large, rimmed baking sheet. Add cherry tomatoes and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.'}
{'level': '8', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated 218°C (220 degree C) oven until veggies are tender and meatballs are cooked through, about 20 minutes.'}
{'level': '9', 'description': 'Meanwhile, stir together Greek yogurt, lemon juice, lemon zest, dill, and salt for tzatziki sauce.'}
{'level': '10', 'description': 'Serve meatballs and veggies with pita rounds and tzatziki sauce.'}

greek-moussaka-the-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Moussaka, The Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2  kilo de carne de ternera o cordero picada.
Pimienta negra molida (o blanca, en su defecto)

instructions: Comenzaremos por lavar muy bien las berenjenas y picarlas en rodajas de poco menos de un centímetro de ancho.
Luego, vamos a sumergirlas en un recipiente con agua durante 30 minutos, para quitarle el sabor amargo.

Podemos aprovechar ese tiempo para pelar y cortar las cebollas y el ajo: la primera en cubos pequeños y el segundo en trocitos mínimos, o incluso triturados. Luego, vamos a reservar ambos ingredientes.
Ahora es el turno de rallar los tomates, y también los reservaremos.
Luego vamos a sofreír los ajos y la cebolla en un sartén caliente, con un chorro de aceite.
Cuando la cebolla empiece a tornarse transparente, agregaremos la carne picada, y la dejaremos cocinar hasta que se dore. Es importante removerla constantemente para que se cocine de manera uniforme.

Cuando la carne tenga un aspecto un poco dorado, vamos a incorporar el tomate. Lo dejaremos cocinar unos 5 minutos, para luego incorporar el vino y las especias: una pizca de sal, una de pimienta, e igual para la paprika, el comino y las hierbas provenzales. Los amantes de las especias pueden aumentar la cantidad de comino y paprika (máximo una cucharadita cafetera).

Mezclar bien todo y dejar cocinar de 15 a 20 minutos más. La idea es que se evapore todo el líquido liberado por los tomates y la carne. Es importante revisar el plato constantemente, removerlo con frecuencia, y si fuera necesario, bajar la intensidad del fuego.
En este punto, aprovecharemos para precalentar el horno a 180 grados centígrados.
Luego, vamos a recuperar las rodajas de berenjenas, secarlas y cocinarlas en otro sartén con un chorrito de aceite. Haremos que se cada rueda se dore ligeramente por ambas caras.

Para hacer el siguiente paso, necesitamos tener cocidas las dos partes de la receta: las berenjenas y la carne. En el caso de esta última, recomiendo probarla y si hiciera falta, corregir la sazón con sal.

Lo siguiente será acomodar ambos ingredientes en un recipiente para horno, haciendo capas, como si se tratara de una lasaña. De entrada, una capa de berenjenas al fondo del recipiente, luego una de carne, y así sucesivamente. Deberíamos contar con suficiente material para al menos hacer dos capas vegetales y dos de carne cocida.
Luego vamos a bañar nuestras capas con la salsa bechamel. Al final, colocaremos una última capa con el queso rallado, para obtener un gratinado.
Listo, nuestra musaka irá directamente al horno, durante unos 20 minutos o hasta que se derrita el queso.

greek-orange-tart-teleculinaria.name: Greek Orange Tart

ingredients.item: 120 g de folhas de massa filo
Laranjas normais, laranjas mini kinkan (kumquat) e hortelã para decorar

instructions: Forre com papel vegetal uma forma redonda grande 25 cm de diâmetro, de fundo amovível. Numa tigela, bata os ovos com o açúcar. Adicione a raspa das laranjas e os iogurtes. Junte o óleo e depois a farinha, previamente misturada com o fermento, e envolva bem.

Esfarele as folhas de massa filo em pedaços pequenos, folha a folha, e envolva no preparado anterior. Deite-o na forma e decore a superfície com rodelas de laranja normal e de kinkan. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 20 a 25 minutos.
Prepare a calda: leve ao lume um tachinho com o sumo e a casca de laranja, a água, o açúcar e o pau de canela. Deixe ferver durante 5 minutos e depois retire.

Verifique com um palito se o bolo está cozido e retire do forno. Deite lentamente a calda na superfície do bolo, deixe arrefecer e desenforme. Retire o papel vegetal e corte em fatias. Sirva a tarte decorada com mais kinkan e raminhos de hortelã.

greek-pasta-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Pasta Salad Recipe
greek-pasta-salad-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada griega de pasta

ingredients.item: 250 gr de pasta corta (fusilli o penne)
150 gr de queso feta (cortados en cubos)
150 gr de tomates cherry (cortados a la mitad)

instructions: Cuece la pasta en una olla con agua con sal hasta que quede al dente. Sigue las instrucciones del empaque.
Una vez lista, escurre y enfríala con agua templada para cortar la cocción.
Escurre nuevamente y coloca en un bol. Incorpora una chorrito de aceite de oliva y mezcla.
En un bol pequeño, añade aceite de oliva, el vinagre balsámico, el orégano seco, sal y pimienta. Mezcla muy bien hasta formar el aderezo.
En el bol de la pasta, agrega la cebolla, los tomates, el pepino, el queso y las aceitunas.
Vierte el aderezo y mezcla muy bien y con cuidado hasta que todos los ingredientes queden incorporados.

greek-potatoes-with-feta-cheese-and-gree.name: Greek Potatoes With Feta Cheese And Greek Yogurt
greek-potatoes-with-feta-cheese-and-gree.original_name: Patatas griegas con queso feta y yogur griego
instructions: Cocemos las patatas y las cortamos en rodajas. En un recipiente apto para horno añadimos en la base las patatas, sobre ellas el atún desmigado, queso feta, nata, yogur griego, sal, orégano y pimienta (opcional). Batimos los huevos y los incorporamos por encima. Llevamos al horno hasta que los huevos batidos cuajen. Servimos caliente.

greek-quinoa-salad.name: Greek Quinoa Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring broth and quinoa to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until quinoa is tender and water has been absorbed, 15 to 20 minutes. Transfer quinoa to a large bowl and set aside to cool, about 10 minutes.

Mix tomatoes, parsley, kalamata olives, onion, feta cheese, olive oil, vinegar, and garlic into quinoa. Squeeze lemon juice over quinoa salad, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Chill in refrigerator, 1 to 4 hours.

greek-ribs.name: Greek Ribs
instructions: Combine baby back ribs, onion, olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, honey, garlic, salt, and pepper in a large resealable plastic bag. Turn to ensure ribs are well coated.
Marinate in the refrigerator, turning occasionally, 4 to 8 hours.
Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil; grease with cooking spray.
Arrange ribs on the prepared baking sheet, leaving space between them.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned, about 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 149°C (150 degrees C). Continue baking until ribs are tender, about 1 hour.

greek-rice-with-parsley-almonds-and-apri.name: Greek Rice With Parsley, Almonds, And Apricots
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Toss almonds with oil on a small rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Roast, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 10–12 minutes. Let cool, then chop.

Meanwhile, rinse rice in several changes of water until water runs clear. Bring rice, lemon zest, and 1½ cups water to a boil in a small saucepan; season with salt. Reduce heat, cover pan, and simmer until rice is tender, 18–20 minutes. Remove from heat, uncover, and scatter apricots over rice. Cover; let sit 10 minutes. Fluff rice with a fork, then mix in almonds, parsley, and lemon juice. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

greek-rigatoni-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Rigatoni Recipe
greek-rigatoni-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de rigatoni a la Gricia
instructions: Hierve agua con suficiente sal gruesa y cuece la pasta hasta que quede al dente.
Escurre la pasta y reserva media taza de la cocción de agua.
Corta el guanciale en cubos o tiras.
Calienta una sartén y saltea el guanciale hasta que suelte su grasa y quede crujiente.
Incorpora la pimienta y mezcla. Saltea para que ambos ingredientes se mezclen muy bien.
Agrega la pasta a la sartén y mezcla hasta que se vaya integrando con el guanciale y la pimienta negra.
Vierte de a poco la taza de cocción de la pasta y mezcla hasta que se emulsione y quede jugosa.
Apaga y añade el queso pecorino romano y mezcla energéticamente hasta que genere cremosidad.
Sirve y acompaña con más queso pecorino romano y pimienta negra. ¡Disfruta!

greek-salad.name: Greek Salad

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, thinly sliced
preferably a mix of sizes, halved, quartered, or sliced

instructions: Whisk 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 3 Tbsp. red wine vinegar, 2 tsp. Dijon mustard, and 1 tsp. dried oregano in a large bowl until emulsified; season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper.

Add 1 large cucumber, coarsely chopped, 1 medium green bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, thinly sliced, 1 small red onion, thinly sliced, 12 oz. tomatoes, preferably a mix of sizes, halved, quartered, or sliced, and ⅔ cup Kalamata olives, pitted, torn, to dressing and toss to coat. Add 6 oz. feta, cut into thin slabs; toss gently.

greek-salad-dressing.name: Greek Salad Dressing
instructions: Add the ingredients into a mason jar. Screw the lid on tightly and shake vigorously.
The dressing can remain in the fridge for 1-2 weeks.
Pour over your favorite salad ingredients and enjoy!

greek-salad-with-couscous-and-spicy-feta.name: Greek Salad With Couscous And Spicy Feta Cheese
instructions: Heat skillet over low heat. Add dried oregano and chili powder; cook and stir until fragrant and toasted, about 1 minute. Off heat, stir in 3 tablespoons olive oil. Pour seasoned oil over feta cheese in a bowl; marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring 1 cup water to a boil in a saucepan. Off heat, stir in couscous. Cover the saucepan; set aside until water is completely absorbed, about 10 minutes. Fluff couscous with a fork.
Stir cucumber, tomato, bell pepper, onion, olives, 2 tablespoons oil, and garlic into warm couscous.
Whisk ¼ cup oil, balsamic vinegar, white wine vinegar, and soy sauce together in a bowl; toss into couscous salad.
Place marinated feta on top couscous salad.

greek-sausage-sheftalia.name: Greek Sausage: Sheftalia
instructions: Combine ground pork, onion, parsley, salt, and black pepper in a medium bowl.

Fill a bowl with warm water; add vinegar. Place caul fat in vinegar water, keep submerged for 1 minute. Rinse in cold water, then place on a clean work surface. Carefully open caul fat; cut into 4-inch squares.

Place a small compressed handful of sausage mixture near edge of 1 fat square; fold sides over sausage mixture and roll up firmly. Repeat with remaining sausage mixture and fat squares until you have about 10 sausages.
Prepare a charcoal grill for high heat. Place sausages onto skewers.
Cook on the preheated grill until outsides are crispy and dark and insides are no longer pink, 20 minutes, turning frequently.

greek-souvlaki-with-tzatziki-sauce-peque.name: Greek Souvlaki With Tzatziki Sauce

ingredients.item: 1 kg de lomo de cerdo o solomillo de cerdo
Brochetas de acero inoxidable o madera para la parrilla
Cuchillo afilado para cortar la carne

instructions: Corta la carne en trozos de aproximadamente 2 cm de tamaño. Agrega aceite de oliva, ajo picado finamente, jugo de limón, vinagre, miel, orégano, sal y pimienta en un tazón grande y mezcla bien. Añade los trozos de carne y mézclalos con la marinada. Cubre con film transparente y deja reposar en el refrigerador durante el mayor tiempo posible (mínimo de 2 a 3 horas, si es posible, incluso de un día para otro).

Después de marinar, saca la carne del frigorífico y espera unos 30 minutos para que las brochetas alcancen la temperatura ambiente. Ensarta la carne en las brochetas de manera que haya un poco de espacio entre cada trozo. Si estás utilizando brochetas de madera, es recomendable remojarlas en agua durante al menos media hora antes de usarlas, para evitar que se quemen en la parrilla. Te recomendamos usar brochetas dobles de acero inoxidable, ya que mantienen los trozos de carne en su lugar y evitan que se deslicen al darles la vuelta durante la cocción

Prepara la parrilla o plancha y caliéntala durante varios minutos hasta alcanzar una temperatura de 250°C. Coloca las brochetas en la parrilla caliente y ásalas a fuego alto durante 3-4 minutos por cada lado, para obtener un dorado crujiente
Tradicionalmente, el Souvlaki se sirve con patatas fritas, tzatziki y ensalada griega, o envuelto en pan de pita con tzatziki, cebolla morada y perejil fresco

greek-spanakopita.name: Greek Spanakopita
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Heat vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onions; slowly cook and stir until softened. Stir in spinach, dill, and flour; cook until most moisture is absorbed, about 10 minutes. Off heat, stir in feta cheese, eggs, salt, and black pepper; set filling aside.

Separate 1 phyllo sheet from stack; place on a flat work surface. Evenly brush phyllo sheet with a light coating of butter. Place another phyllo sheet over buttered phyllo sheet; press phyllo sheets together. Cut layered phyllo sheets into long strips about 3-inches wide. (Keep remaining stack phyllo sheets covered with plastic wrap to keep from drying out.)

Lay 1 phyllo strip on the work surface with 1 narrow end facing you. Place a heaping tablespoon of filling 1 inch from the narrow end. Fold the bottom right corner over the filling to the left edge to form a triangle. Fold the triangle up the strip, bringing the point at the bottom left up to rest along the left edge. Turn the lower left corner over to touch the right edge. Continue turning the triangle over in this manner until you reach the end of the phyllo. Repeat Steps 3 and 4 (buttering, stacking, pressing, cutting, filling, and folding) with remaining phyllo and filling.
Place phyllo triangles on a large baking sheet; brush with remaining butter. (At this point, the pastries may be frozen. See Cook's Note.)
Bake in the preheated oven until phyllo is golden brown and crisp, 45 to 60 minutes.

greek-spinach-pies-spanakopita.name: Greek Spinach Pies (spanakopita)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350˚F (180˚C).
In a large pan over medium heat, cook the green onions and garlic in the olive oil until soft.
Add half the spinach, giving time for some to cook down before adding the rest.
Once the spinach has cooked down, transfer to a medium mixing bowl to cool slightly.
Add the feta, ricotta, egg, dill, parsley, salt and pepper, and mix until evenly spread.
Set in refrigerator.
Lay out one sheet of phyllo dough on a dry surface. Using a pastry brush, coat evenly with olive oil.
Add another sheet of phyllo dough on top of the oiled sheet and repeat the oiling process. Continue until there is a stack of 4 oiled sheets. Repeat process on a new stack with remaining 4 sheets.
Cut your dough into 4 sections using a pizza cutter.
With a single section, add a spoonful of your spinach mix and begin folding over your pastry, brushing each fold with oil. Repeat this process for the remaining sections.
Bake in a preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Enjoy!

greek-spinach-rice-spanakorizo.name: Greek Spinach Rice (spanakorizo)

ingredients.item: Packed finely chopped fresh mint leaves

instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add rice and stir until every grain is coated in oil and you hear it start to sizzle. Stir in 2 teaspoons large-grain kosher salt, pepper, cayenne, and green onions and cook for about 1 minute.
Add dill, mint, spinach, and 2 3/4 cups water. Mix until thoroughly combined and bring to a simmer.
Cover, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook until rice is tender, about 25 minutes. If rice is not quite ready at 25 minutes, add a splash of water, cover, and continue to cook until it is ready.
Uncover and stir well. Cover again and let sit for 5 minutes. Taste and adjust salt if necessary.
Divide rice mixture evenly into six bowls. Squeeze ½ lemon over each serving, then top with feta cheese, pickled onions, chili flakes, and a drizzle of olive oil.

greek-stuffed-chicken-breasts.name: Greek Stuffed Chicken Breasts

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Zest lemon; remove pith with a sharp knife. Slice flesh horizontally; reserve lemon slices.

Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in an oven-safe, nonstick skillet over medium heat until it shimmers, 2 to 3 minutes. Add onion; cook until translucent, 3 to 5 minutes. Add lemon zest and garlic; cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Add spinach to skillet; cook and stir until heated through, about 3 minutes. Transfer spinach-onion mixture to a bowl. Wipe skillet clean; set aside. Stir feta cheese and olives into spinach-onion mixture; season with salt and black pepper.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Lay 1 chicken breast flat onto your work surface. Cut a 2-inch slit, lengthwise, along edge of thick side of chicken breast using the tip of a sharp boning or paring knife to create a pocket, being careful not to cut through the bottom or opposite edge. Season pocket with salt and black pepper. Repeat with remaining chicken breast.
Stuff each pocket with ½ spinach-feta mixture; close slits with toothpicks. Dust chicken lightly with flour, salt, and black pepper.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in the same skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering, about 2 minutes. Add chicken, rib sides facing up; cook until browned, 3 to 5 minutes. Flip chicken, rib-sides down; place lemon slices on top and cook until browned, 3 to 5 minutes more.
Bake in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into centers registers 74°C (74 degrees C), about 35 minutes.

greek-style-horse-mackerel-lezzet.name: Greek Style Horse Mackerel
instructions: 1. Marine sosu için zeytinyağını geniş bir kaseye alın.
2.  Limon suyu ve ince kıydığınız yeşillikleri ilave edin.
3.  Tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırın.
4.  Yıkayıp temizlediğiniz balıkları yayvan bir kaba alın.
5.  Üzerine hazırladığınız sosu gezdirip yarım saat kadar marine edin.
6.  Balıkları marine sosuyla birlikte yapışmaz yüzeyli bir tavaya alarak kızartın.
7.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını çektirin.
8.  Sıcak servis yapın.

greek-tomato-feta-fritters-domatokefteth.name: Greek Tomato Feta Fritters (domatokeftethes)
instructions: Stir together tomatoes, zucchini, green onions, kosher salt, sugar, black pepper, oregano, and cayenne in a bowl to combine. Let sit for 15 minutes for the sugar and salt to draw out liquids from the vegetables.

Stir the tomato mixture; add parsley, mint, and basil. Crumble in feta cheese. Add flour and baking powder; mix with a spoon until combined. Batter should be relatively loose but will hold its shape on a spoon. If too loose, add more flour; if too dry, add some water until desired consistency is reached. Wrap the bowl in plastic wrap and let chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
Heat 1 inch of vegetable oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat to 177°C (175 degrees C), or use a deep fryer.
Place heaping tablespoonfuls of batter in the hot oil; reduce heat to medium. Fry until golden brown and cooked through, 2 to 3 minutes per side.
Flip once more and fry for an additional 30 seconds, if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

greek-tortellini-pasta-salad.name: Greek Tortellini Pasta Salad
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook tortellini in the boiling water until tender yet firm to the bite, 6 to 7 minutes. Drain well and transfer to a large bowl.
Add tomatoes, cucumbers, bell peppers, red onion, Kalamata olives, and feta cheese. Add salad dressing and mix thoroughly.
Chill in the refrigerator for 2 hours before serving.

greek-veggie-pizza.name: Greek Veggie Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Stir cucumber, sour cream, dill, oregano, balsamic vinegar, garlic powder, and onion powder together in a bowl; cover and chill.
Unwrap pizza and discard cardboard. Place red pepper, feta cheese, and olives on top of the pizza. Top with sliced tomato and sprinkle with black pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, about 15 minutes.
Remove pizza from the oven and top with red onion, basil, and Greek sauce to serve.

greek-wings-with-lemon-and-feta.name: Greek Wings With Lemon And Feta

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. chicken wings or 32 separated flats and/or drumettes

instructions: Whisk lemon zest and juice, garlic, oil, black pepper, salt, and oregano in a large bowl to combine. Add wings and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 2 hours and up to 12 hours.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Line 2 large rimmed baking sheets with foil; set a wire rack in each one if you have them. Remove wings from marinade; arrange on baking sheets. Bake wings, rotating baking sheets front to back and top to bottom halfway through, until deeply browned and crisp, about 1 hour.
Whisk oil, lemon juice, garlic, cayenne, and black pepper in a small bowl; season dressing with salt.
To serve, stir parsley into dressing. Arrange wings on a platter, drizzle dressing over, and scatter feta on top.

greek-yogurt-biscuits.name: Greek Yogurt Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together in a bowl. Cut in butter with a knife until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Place the bowl in the freezer for 5 minutes.
Stir in Greek yogurt until dough is combined. Add 1/4 cup seltzer; mix until dough is smooth. Add more seltzer if dough appears dry.

Place dough on a floured piece of parchment paper and pat into a flat rectangle. Fold the rectangle in thirds. Rotate dough 90 degrees, gather any crumbs, and flatten into a rectangle again. Repeat folding, turning, and flattening twice more.
Flatten dough to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut into twelve 2 1/2-inch rounds. Transfer rounds to a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 10 to 15 minutes.

greek-yogurt-breakfast-parfait.name: Greek Yogurt Breakfast Parfait
instructions: Add blueberries and strawberries to a small bowl. Sprinkle with sugar; stir to coat the berries.

Place 2 tablespoons granola in the bottom of 2 parfait glasses. Spoon 2 tablespoons yogurt on top and sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon lemon zest. Top with 1/3 of the berries. Repeat layers until the parfait glasses are full.

greek-yogurt-cake-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Greek Yogurt Cake - Recipe
greek-yogurt-cake-recipe-teleculinaria.original_name: Bolo de iogurte grego- Receita Fácil
instructions: Bata as claras em castelo bem firme e reserve. Misture as gemas com o açúcar e bata até ficarem esbranquiçadas. Adicione depois o iogurte, o óleo e raspa de limão a gosto, batendo sempre.
Acrescente a farinha peneirada, a fécula de batata e o fermento e envolva bem. Por fim, junte as claras em castelo, mexendo delicadamente para não quebrarem.

Deite o preparado numa forma 22 cm de diâmetro, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha, e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 30 minutos. Deixe arrefecer, desenforme e sirva polvilhado com açúcar em pó.

greek-yogurt-green-smoothie.name: Greek Yogurt Green Smoothie
instructions: Add the spinach, banana, Greek yogurt, ice, and water to a blender, and blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

greek-yogurt-labneh.name: Greek Yogurt Labneh

ingredients.item: Plain 2% fat or whole fage greek yogurt
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Line a large sieve with cheese-cloth; set over a medium deep bowl. Place yogurt in sieve. Gather edges of cheesecloth to cover yogurt. Place in refrigerator and let drain for 2-3 days.
Gently squeeze out any excess liquid; discard liquid in bowl (yogurt will be very thick and resemble soft goat cheese). Roll yogurt into 3/4 inches balls. Place in an 8-ounces glass jar.

Whisk oil, herbs, and lemon zest in a small bowl to combine. Season with salt and pepper. Pour over yogurt in jar. Cover; place in refrigerator and let marinate for at least 8 hours and up to 2 weeks.

greek-yogurt-pie-argiro.name: Greek Yogurt Pie
instructions: Ανοίγουμε τα φύλλα (12) στον πάγκο της κουζίνας και τα αφήνουμε απλωτά για 10 λεπτά να στεγνώσουν.
Τα θρυμματίζουμε εύκολα αφού ξεραθούν.
Βουτυρώνουμε καλά ή λαδώνουμε ένα μακρόστενο πυρίμαχο σκεύος.
Τοποθετούμε μέσα τα σπασμένα φύλλα όσο πιο απαλά γίνεται, χωρίς να τα πατάμε, και τα περιχύνουμε με το λιωμένο βούτυρο.
Σε μπολ χτυπάμε τα αυγά, το γιαούρτι, το γάλα και το ελαιόλαδο.
Προσθέτουμε το μοσχοκάρυδο και το πιπέρι.
Προσθέτουμε τα τυριά και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Περιχύνουμε τα σπασμένα φύλλα και αφήνουμε να σταθεί η πίτα και να ρουφήξει τα υγρά για 30 λεπτά.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 180°C, στις αντιστάσεις.
Χαράζουμε την πίτα σε κομμάτια.
Ψήνουμε για 1 ώρα μέχρι να φουσκώσει και να ροδίσει καλά.
Τη σερβίρουμε ζεστή, σαν κυρίως γεύμα.

greek-yogurt-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Greek Yogurt Pudding
instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria. Numa tigela, bata as natas em chantili e envolva-as com os iogurtes.
Escorra as folhas de gelatina, derreta-as no micro-ondas ou em banho-maria (sem deixar ferver), e depois junte-as ao preparado anterior, em fio e mexendo sempre.
Deite o creme numa forma, previamente untada com óleo, e leve ao frio até solidificar.

Arranje os morangos, corte-os em cubos e deite-os num tacho, junte o açúcar, envolva e leve a lume muito brando, até obter um doce. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer. Desenforme o pudim, deite o doce por cima e sirva com decoração a gosto.

greek-yogurt-ranch-dressing.name: Greek Yogurt Ranch Dressing
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, green onions, cilantro, ranch mix, garlic, and olive oil in a blender; blend until dressing is smooth.

greek-yogurt-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Yogurt Sauce Recipe
greek-yogurt-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de salsa de yogurt griego
instructions: 2 horas antes de comenzar la preparación de nuestra salsa de yogurt, vamos a pelar el pepino y a rallarlo (prestaremos atención a retirar las semillas).

Luego depositaremos la pulpa sobre un colador y espolvorearemos con un poco de sal de grano. El objetivo de esta operación es retirar toda el agua posible del pepino. Dejaremos que el colador repose sobre un bol, hasta continuar con el resto de la receta.
Pasadas las dos horas, comenzaremos a preparar el resto de la salsa. Destaparemos el yogur y retiraremos el agua que trae en la superficie (si cuenta con ella).
Pondremos el yogur en un bol o recipiente, y lo mezclaremos con el jugo de medio limón, una pizca de sal, otra de pimenta y un chorrito de aceite de oliva.
Luego, pelaremos el diente de ajo, lo rallaremos y lo agregaremos a la salsa.
Enseguida, recuperaremos el pepino, retiraremos el exceso de sal y también lo incorporaremos a nuestra salsa de yogur.

Por último, lavaremos muy bien las hojas de menta y las picaremos muy finamente. También las agregaremos a la salsa y finalmente, mezclaremos todo muy bien, hasta distribuir los ingredientes de manera uniforme.
Entonces, probaremos la salsa y si hace falta, corregiremos la sazón con más salsa o pimienta (si lo deseas, también puedes agregar un toque adicional de aceite o de menta).
Idealmente, antes de servir esta salsa de yogur griego, lo ideal es dejarla refrigerarse durante algunas horas.

greek-yogurt-with-spiced-pepita-and-cash.name: Greek Yogurt With Spiced Pepita And Cashew Crunch And Mango
instructions: Top yogurt with mango and Spiced Pepita and Cashew Crunch.

greek-zucchini-empanada-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Zucchini Empanada Recipe
greek-zucchini-empanada-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de empanada griega de calabacín
instructions: Corta el tallo de los calabacines y rállalos muy bien.
Coloca los calabacines rallados en una colador con un poco de sal y deja reposar por 20 minutos.
Pasado este tiempo, exprímelos hasta retirar el exceso de líquido.
Incorpora los calabacines exprimidos en un bol e incorpora los huevos, la sémola, la ricota, el eneldo, sal y pimienta.
Mezcla hasta que todo quede bien integrado.
Precalienta el horno a 180 ℃.
Toma un molde cuadrado o rendando y engrasa.
Coloca 6 hojas de la pasta filo, debes pincelarlas con mantequilla cada vez que coloques una encima de la otra.
Una vez armadas las primeras capas, incorpora el relleno y esparce muy bien por todo el centro.
Coloca las otras láminas de pasta filo, recuerda pincelar con mantequilla cada una. Dobla los bordes hacia adentro para cerrar la empanada.
Hornea a 180 ℃ por unos 45 minutos o hasta que la empanada esté dorada y crujiente.
Retira del horno, deja reposar, y córtala en las porciones del tamaño de tu preferencia.

greek-inspired-air-fryer-cornish-hen.name: Greek-inspired Air Fryer Cornish Hen

ingredients.prep: cornish game hens, meat and skin, raw

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 199°C (200 degrees C).
Whisk together olive oil, oregano, dill, garlic powder, onion powder, rosemary, and paprika together. Brush mixture on all sides of the hen, paying particular attention the the wings and legs.
Place hen in the basket of the air fryer and cook for 30 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before serving.

greek-inspired-fresh-oregano-and-giblet-.name: Greek-inspired Fresh Oregano And Giblet Pan Gravy

ingredients.item: Pan juices reserved in turkey roasting pan from salt-roasted turkey with lemon and oregano or from any other roast turkey
(or more) ultimate turkey stock or low-salt chicken broth

ingredients.prep: heart, and gizzard reserved from Ultimate Turkey Stock

instructions: Scrape reserved pan juices and any browned bits from turkey roasting pan into 8-cup measuring cup. Spoon off fat from surface and reserve 1/2 cup (or supplement with butter). Add enough Ultimate Turkey Stock to juices to measure 5 1/2 cups total. Pull meat from turkey neck. Chop neck meat, heart, and gizzard and reserve.

Place roasting pan over 2 burners. Add 1/2 cup reserved fat; heat over medium heat. Add onion. Sauté until soft, about 5 minutes. Whisk in flour. Cook until flour browns, about 3 minutes. Whisk in stock mixture, then wine. Boil until gravy thickens and coats spoon, scraping up any browned bits, 3 to 4 minutes. Mix in oregano, lemon juice, and giblets. Season with salt and pepper.

greek-inspired-gemelli-pasta-salad.name: Greek-inspired Gemelli Pasta Salad
instructions: Whisk olive oil, vinegar, garlic, oregano, Dijon, salt, and black pepper together in a small bowl until well combined.

Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook gemelli pasta at a boil, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, 8 to 11 minutes. Drain, rinse under cold water, drain again.
Transfer gemelli to a large bowl; add spinach, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, feta cheese, and olives. Toss salad with vinaigrette until evenly coated.

greek-inspired-grilled-turkey-sausage-br.name: Greek-inspired Grilled Turkey Sausage Brats

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.

Place sausages on the rack, and grill until sausages are cooked through, 10 to 16 minutes, turning occasionally. Your cooking time will depend on your grill and how close the sausages are to the heat. Check periodically with a meat thermometer until you reach 74°C (74 degrees C), which is well done.
Combine red onion, cucumber, tomatoes, and Kalamata olives in a small bowl. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice, and stir in the oregano, salt, and pepper.
Place the turkey sausages in the buns. Evenly distribute the Greek-style veggie mixture over the sausages, sprinkle with some feta cheese, and serve.

greek-inspired-grilled-wedge-salad.name: Greek-inspired Grilled Wedge Salad
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Whisk oil, balsamic vinegar, and mixed herbs in a small bowl. Add salt and pepper.
Place romaine halves cut-sides up on a work surface. Drizzle with oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Grill romaine, cut-sides down until slightly caramelized, 2 to 3 minutes.
Plate grilled romaine cut-sides up. Top with tomatoes, cucumber, onion, feta cheese, and olives. Drizzle with dressing and serve.

greek-inspired-seared-pork-chops.name: Greek-inspired Seared Pork Chops
instructions: Place pork chops between sheets of plastic wrap or parchment paper and pound to flatten to 1/2-inch thickness. Season both sides of the chops evenly with Greek seasoning.

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1 tablespoon oil. Place 2 chops in the hot skillet and sear for 2 minutes. Flip and cook until chops are no longer pink in the center, or to desired degree of doneness, 2 to 4 more minutes. Set aside and keep warm. Add 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet and repeat to cook remaining 2 chops.

Add remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet. Add tomatoes and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes are slightly blistered and softened, about 3 minutes. Add olives and lemon juice and cook for 2 minutes.
Serve tomato mixture over pork chops and sprinkle each serving with feta cheese and parsley.

greek-inspired-snack-board.name: Greek-inspired Snack Board

ingredients.item: Box seasoned wheat crackers (such as triscuit® dill

instructions: Combine feta cheese, cream cheese, yogurt, lemon juice, Greek seasoning, garlic, dill, and black pepper in a food processor. Blend until smooth. Transfer to a bowl and garnish with red pepper flakes. Refrigerate while you assemble the board.
Place pickled cauliflower, artichoke hearts, pickled okra, hummus, and olives in separate small serving bowls. Arrange bowls on a large cutting board or platter. Add dip bowl.

Arrange some of Cheddar cheese, tomatoes, grapes, carrots, bell peppers, cucumber, crackers, pita chips, salami, pepperoni, almonds, blackberries, and chickpeas around the bowls, without overcrowding. Keep extra ingredients in covered containers in the refrigerator so you can replenish the board as needed.

greek-inspired-turkey-meatloaf.name: Greek-inspired Turkey Meatloaf

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
Mix turkey, feta cheese, eggs, oregano, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl. Transfer to the loaf pan and shape into a loaf.

Bake in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads at least 74°C (74 degrees C), about 1 hour 15 minutes. Pour off juices and allow to cool in the pan for 30 minutes before slicing.

greek-style-beef-stew-stifado.name: Greek-style Beef Stew (stifado)
instructions: Place beef in a bowl and season generously with pepper and kosher salt. Cover and transfer to the refrigerator until ready to use; up to 1 day is fine.
Leaving the root ends in place, cut off the shallot tops. Remove and discard skins.
Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a heavy skillet over high heat. Add ½ of the beef and cook until nicely seared, 4 to 6 minutes per side. Remove to a plate and repeat to sear remaining beef.

Turn off the heat and add 1 tablespoon oil to the empty skillet. Add shallots and let the skillet cool for 2 to 3 minutes. Turn the heat back on to medium and toss shallots until browned, 2 to 4 minutes. Remove shallots to a plate.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet with onion, garlic, and a pinch of salt; cook and stir for about 1 minute. Stir in tomato paste and cook until toasted, about 2 minutes.

Add red wine vinegar and white wine and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Increase heat to medium-high and add sugar, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, oregano, bay leaves, and rosemary sprigs. Stir to combine and cook until reduced by about half, 2 to 3 minutes.
Add browned beef and shallots to the skillet and toss carefully until coated. Pour in 2 cups beef broth and bring to a simmer.

Reduce heat to low or medium-low. Cover and cook at a gentle simmer for 1 hour, then uncover and cook for at least 1 more hour, stirring occasionally to move the beef and shallots around. Add more broth if needed during the cooking time and skim off some fat if preferred.
The meat is done when a fork slides in easily, but the meat isn't falling apart on its own; it may take longer than 2 hours.
Taste and adjust seasonings before serving.
Serve and enjoy!

greek-style-chicken-salad.name: Greek-style Chicken Salad
instructions: Place cucumbers in a colander; set onto a plate. Toss cucumbers with 1 teaspoon salt. Let rest to draw about liquid, about 30 minutes. Pat dry with paper towels.
Place red onion and 1 cup cold water in a bowl. Let soak until the strong onion flavor is weakened, 5 to 10 minutes. Drain and rinse.

Combine cucumbers, red onions, Greek yogurt, Kalamata olives, dill, vinegar, lemon juice, garlic, lemon zest, oregano, and black pepper in a bowl. Fold in chicken, feta cheese, and tomatoes. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate salad for at least 1 hour.
Stir salad and serve on lettuce leaves.

greek-style-vegetable-casserole.name: Greek-style Vegetable Casserole

ingredients.prep: cut crosswise into four sections, then lengthwise into quarters

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Place zucchini, onion, and 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl; toss to coat. Season with salt. Transfer to a large baking dish (9x13" or larger) and roast until zucchini is slightly dried and beginning to turn brown, 12–15 minutes. Transfer zucchini and onion to a wire rack.

Meanwhile, toss remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, potatoes, green beans, tomatoes with their juices, garlic, lemon juice, and oregano in a medium bowl. Season with salt. Place mixture in same baking dish; top with roasted zucchini and onion. Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes. Remove foil and stir vegetables; bake until pan is nearly dry and potatoes are tender and beginning to brown, 25–35 minutes longer.
Sprinkle dill over and let casserole sit for 10 minutes. Garnish with feta and serve.

green-apple-celery-salad-lezzet.name: Green Apple Celery Salad
instructions: 1. Kerevizlerin kabuklarını soyup limonlu suda 5-10 dakika beklettikten sonra suyunu süzüp rendeleyin ve bir karıştırma kabına alın.
2.  Rendelediğiniz elmayı ilave edin.
3.  Ayrı bir kapta yoğurdu hafif çırpın.
4.  Ezdiğiniz sarımsak, mayonez, tuz ve zeytinyağını ekleyip karıştırın.
5.  Yoğurtlu karışımı elmalı kerevizlerin üzerine döküp iyice karıştırın.
6.  Salatayı bir servis tabağına alın.
7.  Üzerini ceviz içi ve kırmızı pul biberle süsleyerek servis yapın.
8. Pratik ve hafif cevizli kereviz salatası tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

green-apple-celery-soup-lezzet.name: Green Apple Celery Soup

ingredients.item: 1 adet büyük boy soğan (küp küp doğranmış)
4 adet orta boy kereviz (soyulmuş ve küçük parçalar halinde kesilmiş veya robotta ufaltılmış, 1-2 cm)
1.5 yeşil elma (4’e bölünmüş ve çekirdekleri çıkarılmış)

instructions: 1. Yeşil elma ile lezzetlendirilmiş çok sağlıklı bir çorbaTereyağı ve sıvı yağı tencerede ısıtın.
2.  Soğanları ekleyin ve pembeleşinceye dek kavurun.
3.  Sarımsak ve kerevizleri de ekleyip 3-4 dakika daha kavurun.
4.  Suyu ekleyin ve kaynayınca altını kısın.
5.  Suyun hafifçe fokurdaması yeterlidir.
6.  Kerevizlere çatal rahatça batacak kıvama gelinceye dek, yaklaşık 25-30 dakika pişirin.
7.  Burada, kerevizlerin boyutuna göre pişme süresi uzayabilir.
8.  Pişme süresi uzarsa az miktarda su ekleyebilirsiniz.
9.  Kerevizler yumuşayınca elma, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip 15 dakika daha pişirin.
10.  Hem elmalar hem de kereviz iyice yumuşayınca pürüzsüz olana dek blender’dan geçirin.
11.  Bu aşamada tuzunu, biberini kontrol edin ve dilerseniz ekstra lezzet için tereyağı ilave edin.
12.  Bu çorba biraz koyu kıvamlı oluyor, dilerseniz damak tadınıza göre su ekleyip seyreltebilirsiniz.
13. Dilerseniz, terbiyeli kereviz çorbası tarifine de göz atabilirsiniz.

green-apple-crumble-recipe-with-few-ingr.name: Green Apple Crumble Recipe With Few Ingredients
green-apple-crumble-recipe-with-few-ingr.original_name: Receta de crumble de manzana verde con pocos ingredientes
instructions: Iniciamos pelando y cortando las cuatro manzanas en cubos.
Luego de cortar las manzanas, procede a saltearlas en una sartén a fuego medio-bajo con solo 50 gramos de azúcar.
Remueve las manzanas y una vez estén blandas y doradas retira del fuego y reserva.
Para el crumble, agrega en un recipiente la manteca fría en cubos, la harina y el resto del azúcar.
Una vez estén todos los ingredientes en el recipiente, integra todo sin amasar. En este punto integra los ingredientes como se muestra en el video.
La consistencia de la masa debe quedar como un arenado. Por último agregar las nueces y almendras picadas que queden pedazos grandes.
Coloca en un recipiente para horno previamente enmantecado las manzanas
Luego agrega el crumble y lleva al horno precalentado a 180 grados unos 15 minutos o hasta que el crumble quede dorado.
¡Disfruta!

green-apple-martini.name: Green Apple Martini
instructions:
Purée 1 large green apple, scrubbed, cored, cut into 1" pieces, ¼ cup (50 g) sugar, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and ¼ cup water in a blender until smooth and sugar is dissolved. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small pitcher or large measuring glass, pressing on solids to extract as much juice as possible; discard solids.
Do Ahead: Apple syrup can be made 2 hours ahead; cover and keep chilled, or freeze in ice cube trays for up to 1 month (thaw before using).

Combine 1½ oz. vodka, ½ oz. clear store-bought apple juice, ½ oz. fresh lemon juice, ¼ oz. cognac, ¼ oz. Midori, and ½ oz. apple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside is very cold, about 20 seconds. Strain into a chilled martini glass with 1 maraschino cherry placed in it.
Editor’s Note: Head this way for more of our favorite vodka cocktails →

green-apple-sangria.name: Green Apple Sangria

ingredients.prep: removed in long strips with a vegetable peeler

instructions: Stir apples, orange zest and juice, cinnamon, brandy, lemon juice, sugar, and Cointreau in a large pitcher to combine. Let sit at room temperature for 1 hour.
DO AHEAD: Sangria base can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.
Add wine to sangria base and stir to combine. Pour sangria over ice, top off with club soda, and garnish with orange slices.

green-apple-celery-and-walnut-salad-in-j.name: Green Apple, Celery And Walnut Salad In Just 15 Minutes
