Sirve y acompaña con tiras de tortilla frita y chile guajillo frito troceado.

guajillo-shrimp-spicy-comedera.name: Guajillo Shrimp, Spicy

ingredients.item: 500 gr de camarones, pelados y lavados
6  chiles guajillos secos, desvenados y cortados en rodajas

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, organizando cada uno de nuestros ingredientes.
Ahora, procedemos a colocar un sartén a fuego medio y comenzarás a derretir la mantequilla.
Cuando la mantequilla esté derretida, le añadirás el ajo finamente picado y comenzarás a sofreír. Luego, agrega el chile, mezcla y deja cocinar sin que éstos se quemen.
Añade sal y pimienta a los camarones, e incorpóralos al sartén donde está el ajo, el chile y la mantequilla.
Mezcla y deja cocinar entre 7 a 10 minutos aproximadamente hasta que nuestros camarones estén bien doraditos y haya tomado todo el sabor del chile.
Pasado ese tiempo y estando los camarones en su punto. Apaga y sirve con arroz.
¡Degusta!

guatemalan-rice.name: Guatemalan Rice
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add rice, onion, and tomato; cook and stir until rice turns light golden brown, 3 to 4 minutes.
Stir water, carrot, celery, and chicken bouillon into the skillet. Simmer until most of the water is absorbed, about 8 minutes. Cover and simmer until rice is tender, 5 to 8 minutes more.

guava-and-cheese-cake-recipe-comedera.name: Guava And Cheese Cake Recipe
guava-and-cheese-cake-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de bizcocho de guayaba y queso
instructions: Separa las claras de las yemas de los huevos, luego bátelas a punto de turrón, cuanto tenga la textura deja de batir y reserva.
Corta la pasta de guayaba en trocitos y colócala en agua hasta diluirla dentro de una olla o sartén a fuego bajo hasta que se derrita por completo.

Agrega la mantequilla  al bol de la batidora hasta formar una mezcla ligera en la cual añadirá el azúcar. Bate hasta que no queden grumos para posteriormente incorporar el queso crema con la vainilla. Reserva esta mezcla que será la cobertura.
Ahora incorpora poco a poco las yemas a la batidora, seguidamente añade la harina previamente tamizada.
Precalienta el horno a 350 grados centígrados.
Añade esta mezcla a las claras de huevo de forma envolvente de abajo para arriba esta es la masa para el bizcocho.
En un molde untado de mantequilla y enharinado vacìa la mezcla.
Añade  la cobertura en la parte de la mezcla junto con la pasta de guayaba. (Mezcla con un palillo de madera como cuando haces la marmoleada)
Hornea durante 50 minutos o hasta que al pinchar con un palillo salga limpio en ese momento retira del horno y deja enfriar para cortar en porciones.

guava-and-goat-cheese-phyllo-pie.name: Guava And Goat Cheese Phyllo Pie

ingredients.item: Sheets fresh phyllo pastry or frozen
Vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Brush bottom and sides of a 9”-diameter baking dish or cake pan with some of ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted.

Place a stack of 7–9 sheets fresh phyllo pastry or frozen, thawed, on a work surface; cover with a barely damp kitchen towel. Remove 1 sheet from stack and brush with butter. With long side of sheet facing you, gently scrunch up phyllo into a long rope, then wrap into a very loose coil (phyllo will look messy, and that’s okay!). You should have what looks like a big phyllo rose. Place coil in center of prepared pan. Repeat process with remaining phyllo sheets and butter, arranging coils around the one in the center (as you would for a pan of cinnamon rolls).
Bake until pastry is golden brown and crisp, 15–20 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350°.

While the phyllo is cooling, combine 1 large egg, 1 large egg yolk, 4 oz. goat cheese, room temperature, ½ cup heavy cream, 3 Tbsp. sugar, ¾ tsp. vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a blender and blend on high speed until custard is completely smooth.

Pour custard over pastry (try to leave some crispy bits exposed). Return pan to oven and bake until custard is puffed but still slightly jiggly in the center, 15–20 minutes (start checking a couple minutes early). Let cool 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine 3 oz. guava paste, cut into small pieces, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small microwave-safe bowl and microwave on high power in 15-second increments, whisking after each, until smooth.
Drizzle guava syrup over pie. Serve warm or at room temperature.

guava-barbeque-sauce.name: Guava Barbeque Sauce

ingredients.item: Scotch bonnet chile pepper (or to taste)
Kosher salt and pepper to taste

instructions: Place the water, guava paste, vinegar, rum, tomato paste, lemon juice, onion, ginger, soy sauce, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, and scotch bonnet pepper into a saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat, whisking until evenly blended. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until the sauce has slightly thickened and is richly flavored, 10 to 15 minutes. The sauce should be pourable. If it has become too thick, thin it with some water. Serve hot or cold.

guava-jam-recipe-comedera.name: Guava Jam Recipe
instructions: Lava las guayaba, retira las puntas y corta en cubos.
Coloca la guayaba troceada con el agua y lleva al fuego. Cocina hasta que la fruta ablande.
Una vez la fruta esté tierna, licúa muy bien hasta que quede un jugo bien concentrado.
Cuela muy bien hasta retirar todas las semillas.
Vierte el concentrado de la guayaba en la olla y agrega el azúcar, el zumo de limón y la pizca de sal.
Mezcla y cocina a fuego medio - bajo hasta que tome consistencia de mermelada.  Debes mover de vez en cuando para que no se pegue el fondo.
Una vez, tenga la textura de mermelada, apaga y deja reposar un rato.
Vierte en envases de vidrio con tapas o uno hermético y deja enfriar por 2 horas para que tenga una mejor consistencia.

guava-meringade-step-by-step-recipe-come.name: Guava Meringade, Step By Step Recipe
guava-meringade-step-by-step-recipe-come.original_name: Merengada de guayaba, receta paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1  guayaba grande  (limpia y sin tallo ni semillas)

instructions: En un vaso de licuadora coloca la guayaba picada en cubos grandes. Vierte la leche y el azúcar y licúa por 40 segundos a alta velocidad.
Vierte el hielo y licua de acuerdo a como lo quieras, si quieres un granizado licúa por 30 segundos más.
Sirve en una vaso alto y disfruta.

guava-mojito.name: Guava Mojito
instructions: Fill a glass with ice.

Muddle 3 sprigs mint and sugar together in a cocktail shaker; add ice, rum, lime juice, and guava nectar. Cover and shake 10 times. Strain drink into glass filled with ice; add club soda and garnish with 1 mint sprig.

guava-grapefruit-and-rosemary-agua-fresc.name: Guava, Grapefruit, And Rosemary Agua Fresca
instructions: In a blender, combine all the ingredients, except the sugar, and blend well. Standard blender jars probably won’t fit all the ingredients so blend in batches.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a pitcher.
Add sugar (or your preferred sweetener) to taste, adjusting for your own preference and based on how sweet the fruit is to begin with.
Add enough ice to your liking.
As an option, you can garnish with a piece of an ingredient in the agua. For example, a sprig of rosemary, a stick of cinnamon, or slices of lemon.
Pour into ice-filled glasses.

guava-grapefruit-possets.name: Guava-grapefruit Possets

ingredients.item: . guava paste (preferably goya or la fe)

instructions: Bring cream, sugar, and grapefruit zest to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium-high, whisking occasionally, and cook (still whisking from time to time) until sugar is dissolved and cream is reduced by about a quarter (mixture should be just shy of 2 cups), 8–10 minutes.

Remove pan from heat; immediately add grapefruit juice, lemon juice, and salt; whisk vigorously just until combined. Strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass or a small bowl or other container with a spout.

Pour into 4 glasses, dividing evenly (about ½ cup each) and chill until set, at least 3 hours.
Do ahead: Possets can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.
Cook guava paste and ¼ cup water in small saucepan over medium, whisking vigorously, until paste is melted and mixture is smooth, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and add lemon juice, whisking well.
Spoon jelly over set possets (about 1½ Tbsp. per portion) and smooth surface with a spoon. Chill until jelly is cool, 10–15 minutes.

Just before serving, sprinkle tops of possets with salt.
Do ahead: Possets with jelly (but without sea salt) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

guia-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Guia Chicken

ingredients.item: Para decorar  meias luas de limão

instructions: Coloque num triturador o óleo, as malaguetas, os dentes de alho descascados, o conhaque e o pimentão-doce e triture tudo muito bem, até obter uma pasta. Junte salsa finamente picada e uma pitada de sal fino, misture e reserve.

Arranje os frangos, tempere com sal grosso e leve-os a grelhar, num grelhador ou placa pré-aquecida, durante cerca de 20 minutos. Quando estiverem quase no ponto, pincele os frangos com o molho anterior.
De seguida, retire, corte os frangos em pedaços e disponha-os numa travessa. Pincele novamente com o molho, decore com salsa e meias-luas de limão e sirva acompanhado de batatas fritas.

guimaraes-sponge-cake-teleculinaria.name: Guimarães Sponge Cake
instructions: Para preparar este pão de ló, forre uma forma de buraco com papel. Ligue o forno a 180 graus.

Numa tigela, junte as gemas com o açúcar e a raspa de limão e bata durante 20 minutos. Bata depois as claras em castelo bem firme, adicione-as à mistura das gemas e bata mais um pouco. Junte então a farinha peneirada e misture delicadamente, sem bater.
Verta a mistura anterior para a forma e leve ao forno durante 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer, desenforme com o papel e sirva.

guinness-affogato.name: Guinness Affogato
instructions: Place ice cream in a tall glass. Pour espresso over and top off with Guinness. Serve with a straw and a long spoon.

guinness-beer-cheese-dip.name: Guinness Beer Cheese Dip
instructions: Heat cheese in slow cooker on High until melted, about 20 minutes.
Stir beer, salsa, Worcestershire sauce, chili powder, onion powder, and cayenne pepper into cheese until smooth and heated through, stirring frequently, about 10 minutes.

guinness-bread.name: Guinness Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Grease an 8x8-inch baking pan.

Mix oats, flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl. Stir butter, vanilla, buttermilk, and Guinness together in a separate large bowl. Pour flour mixture into beer mixture, and gently stir until well combined. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan, and sprinkle with additional oats if desired.

Bake in preheated oven for 30 minutes, then turn the temperature down to 204°C (200 degrees C), and bake for an additional 30 minutes. Turn the oven off, open the door, and allow to cool for 30 minutes in the oven before turning out onto a wire rack.

guinness-cake-with-cream-cheese-frosting.name: Guinness Cake With Cream Cheese Frosting
guinness-cake-with-cream-cheese-frosting.original_name: Tarta Guinness clásica con frosting de queso crema

ingredients.item: 75 g de cacao puro en polvo sin azúcar
140 g de crema agria (o 140 g de nata para montar + 2 cucharadas de zumo de limón)
275 g de harina repostería (o 175 g de harina todo uso y 100 g de harina de maíz tipo maicena)

instructions: Untamos un molde desmontable de 22cm con mantequilla y reservamos.
Precalentamos el horno a 180ºC, calor arriba y abajo.
Ponemos la mantequilla y la cerveza en un cazo. Calentamos hasta que la mantequilla se haya derretido, teniendo cuidado que no hierva.
Echamos el cacao y el azúcar en un cuenco y mezclamos.

Vertemos la mantequilla junto la cerveza negra y mezclamos. Mezclamos con unas varillas la crema agria (si no la consigues más adelante te explicamos cómo se hace en casa), la vainilla y los huevos; lo vertemos en el cuenco donde tenemos el azúcar junto el cacao, cerveza y mantequilla.
Tamizamos la harina y el bicarbonato y lo añadimos. Mezclamos con una espátula hasta conseguir una mezcla suave y sin grumos.

Vertemos la mezcla en el molde que tenemos reservado y llevamos al horno precalentado a 180ºC, calor arriba y abajo. Horneamos durante 45 minutos a 1 hora. Para saber si está listo hacemos la prueba del palillo.

Transcurrido el tiempo retiramos el bizcocho del horno, dejamos reposar dentro del molde sin desmoldar 5 minutos. Una vez pasen los 5 minutos, desmoldamos con cuidado y lo dejamos reposar sobre una rejilla para que enfríe por completo.
Batimos bien 300 g de queso crema, 150 g de azúcar glass y 125 g de nata. Reservamos.
Ponemos el bizcocho sobre una base para tartas y cubrimos la superficie con la cobertura de queso, nata y azúcar glas. Ya solo nos queda servir y probar nuestra tarta Guinness.

guinness-cupcakes-with-espresso-frosting.name: Guinness Cupcakes With Espresso Frosting
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 muffin tins with paper liners.

Combine stout beer, butter, and vanilla extract in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir occasionally until butter is melted. Pour into a large mixing bowl and set aside to cool for at least 10 minutes.

Whisk flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in another large bowl. Pour gradually into the beer mixture, beating with an electric mixer on medium speed. Beat in sour cream and eggs, one at a time, until batter is smooth.
Divide batter among the lined muffin cups, filling each one 3/4 of the way.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 22 to 28 minutes. Leave in the tins for 5 minutes. Transfer to a cooling rack to cool completely.

Meanwhile, make the frosting. Combine powdered sugar and butter in a bowl. Beat on low speed until creamy. Mix water and espresso powder in a bowl until espresso is dissolved. Pour into the bowl and beat frosting on medium-high speed until fluffy.
Cover tops of cooled cupcakes with frosting.

guinness-mustard.name: Guinness Mustard

ingredients.item: Guinness stout or other stout or porter

instructions: Whisk all ingredients in small bowl to blend. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep refrigerated.

guinness-short-rib-chili.name: Guinness Short Rib Chili
instructions: Cut the short ribs into ½-inch (2.5 cm) pieces. Season with 1 teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon pepper.
Heat the canola oil in a large pot over high heat. Add the short ribs and sear for 2–3 minutes, until a golden brown crust forms.
Add 1 teaspoon salt, the onion, garlic, paprika, cumin, star anise, and dried harissa. Reduce the heat to medium-high and cook, stirring for 5 minutes, or until the spices are fragrant.
Add the garlic powder, onion powder, bay leaves, chipotle peppers, and Guinness® Stout. Simmer for 10 minutes, or until the liquid is reduced by half.
Add the beef broth, reduce the heat to low, and cook uncovered for 45–60 minutes, or until the meat is tender and liquid is reduced by one third.
Add the tomato paste, increase the heat to medium, and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the chili has thickened.
Add the black beans, remaining teaspoon of salt, and remaining ¼ teaspoon pepper, and simmer for another 5 minutes until the beans are warmed through.
Remove the bay leaves and star anise pods, then ladle the chili into 4 bowls. Top with sour cream, red onion, cilantro, and sliced jalapeño. Serve with cold glasses of Guinness® Stout.
Enjoy!

gulab-jamun-brulee.name: Gulab Jamun Brûlée
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C
In a medium bowl, whisk together the egg yolk, sugar, vanilla extract and saffron until thick and creamy. Add the cardamom powder.
Place the cream into a saucepan and warm it. Then pour the cream into the egg yolk mixture.
Cut the Gulab jamun into small pieces.
Place the ramekins on a baking tray. Place the Gulab jamun in the ramekins and pour the cream mixture over them.
Pour hot water in the baking tray until it is half submerged. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes.
Remove the ramekins and let cool to room temperature. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Before serving,spread 1 Tbsp sugar on top of each ramekin. Use the torch to melt the sugar and create a crispy exterior.

gulab-jamun-cake-as-made-by-hetal-vasava.name: Gulab Jamun Cake As Made By Hetal Vasavada
instructions: Make the cardamom cake: Preheat the oven to 163°C (163°C). Grease a 10-cup Bundt pan liberally with 1 tablespoon of butter. In a medium bowl, whisk the flour and milk powder together until well combined.

Add the butter, sugar, and ground cardamom to a separate large bowl and mix with a hand mixer for 5-7 minutes; the butter will turn pale and fluffy. Add the salt and vanilla and stir to combine. Add 1 egg at a time, beating well between each addition. Add the flour mixture. Mix until the dry ingredients are just incorporated.
Spoon the batter into the Bundt pan and tap the pan on the counter 3–5 times to remove air bubbles.
Bake the cake for 35–40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.

10 minutes before the cake is done baking, make the syrup: Add the water, granulated sugar, saffron, cardamom pods, and cinnamon stick to a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat and simmer for 2 minutes. Remove the pot from the heat and whisk in the rose water and lime juice. Remove the cinnamon stick and cardamom pods from the syrup and discard. Reserve ¼ cup (60 ml) of the syrup and set aside.

Poke holes in the bottom of the Bundt cake with a fork. Pour the rest of the syrup over the Bundt cake while it is still warm in the pan. It will look like a lot of syrup, but the cake will soak it all up. Let the cake rest for 10 minutes, then invert it onto a serving platter.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the powdered sugar and reserved syrup to make a glaze.
Pour the glaze over the Bundt cake. Sprinkle with the dried rose petals, if using, and pistachios.
Slice and serve.
Enjoy!

gulab-jamun-or-kala-jam-waffle-balls.name: Gulab Jamun Or Kala Jam (waffle Balls)
instructions: Combine water, sugar, cardamom, rose water, and saffron in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until consistency is syrupy, 5 to 10 minutes.

Mix milk powder, flour, and baking soda in a bowl until well-combined. Slowly mix in butter and yogurt until dough comes together. Let gulab dough rest for 5 minutes. Shape into smooth balls the size of pennies.

Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C). Test the temperature of the oil by dropping in a small piece of dough. When it sits at the bottom of the pan for 1 minute before coming to the surface, the oil is ready.
Fry 4 gulab balls at a time, stirring carefully, until dark golden brown on all sides, about 2 minutes. Drain on a paper-towel lined plate. Repeat with remaining gulab.
Bring syrup back up to a boil and drop in fried gulab. Remove from heat and let them soak in the syrup, covered, 45 minutes to 1 hour.

gulabiye-lezzet.name: Gulabiye
instructions: 1. Bademleri sıcak suda bekletip kabuklarını soyun.
2.  Tepsiye yayıp sıcak fırında renkleri hafifçe değişene kadar bekletin.
3. Balı tencereye alıp kısık ateşte ısıtın.
4.  Tereyağını ekleyip karıştırın ve tencereyi ocaktan alın.
5.  Nişastayı bir bardak suyla karıştırıp inceltin.
6.  Nişastalı suyu tencereye aktarın.
7. Tenceredeki harcı iyice karıştırdıktan sonra bademleri ve gül suyunu ilave edin.
8.  Tencereyi tekrar ocağa alıp helvayı karıştırarak pişirin.
9.  Helvayı bir tepsiye döküp soğumaya bırakın ve dilimleyin.
10.  Kurutulmuş gül yapraklarıyla süsleyip servis yapın.

gulbasi-argiro.name: Gulbasi

ingredients.item: 1 ½ kgχοιρινό μπούτι κομμένο σε μπουκιές
1 ½ kgχοιρινό μπούτι κομμένο σε μπουκιές

instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 170°C στις αντιστάσεις για να ψήσουμε το χοιρινό γκιούλμπασι στη λαδόκολλα.
Απλώνουμε σταυρωτά δύο μεγάλα κομμάτια σπάγκο ψησίματος.
Βάζουμε πάνω 2 μεγάλες λαδόκολλες (θα τυλίξουμε σε πακέτο το φαγητό).
Βάζουμε σε μπολ το χοιρινό, τα κρεμμύδια, τα σκόρδα, τις πιπεριές, τις πατάτες, το τυρί, τη ρίγανη, τις πιπερίτσες, το ελαιόλαδο, το αλάτι και το πιπέρι και τα ανακατεύουμε όλα μαζί πολύ καλά.
Τα βάζουμε στις απλωμένες λαδόκολλες.
Τυλίγουμε σε πακέτο και δένουμε σταυρωτά το σπάγκο.
Απλώνουμε αλουμινόχαρτο στο ταψί και βάζουμε πάνω το πακέτο.
Ψήνουμε για 2 ώρες και 30΄στους 170°C χωρίς να ανοιγοκλείνουμε το φούρνο.
Το γκιούλμπασι θα ψηθεί στο δικό του ζουμί και θα γίνει υπέροχο.
Μπορούμε να το ετοιμάσουμε από την προηγούμενη μέρα και να το αφήσουμε στο ψυγείο. Πριν το ψήσιμο το αφήνουμε να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου για 30΄.
Το σερβίρουμε με πράσινη σαλάτα.

gullac-recipe-for-portions-lezzet.name: Gullac Recipe For Portions

ingredients.item: Ceviz yerine fındık, badem veya antep fıstığı kullanarak farklı bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Toz şeker yerine bal veya hurma özü kullanarak tatlıyı farklı bir lezzetle hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Vanilin yerine süte portakal kabuğu rendesi veya birkaç damla gül suyu ekleyebilirsiniz.
Güllaç katlarının arasına muz dilimleri veya çilek parçaları ekleyerek meyveli bir tatlı hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun bir lezzet için güllacın arasına kaymak veya labne peyniri ekleyebilirsiniz.
Süt yerine badem sütü veya laktozsuz süt kullanarak farklı beslenme tercihleri için uygun bir tatlı hazırlayabilirsiniz.
üzerini süslemek için nar taneleri, frambuaz veya böğürtlen kullanabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Sütü küçük bir tencereye alın ve içerisine toz şekeri ekleyerek karıştırın.
2.  Sütü kaynatmadan hafifçe ısıtın ve şekerin tamamen erimesini sağlayın.
3. Ilınan süte vanilini ekleyip karıştırın.
4. Güllaç yapraklarını servis kaselerine uygun olacak şekilde küçük parçalara bölün.
5. Her kasenin tabanına bir parça güllaç yaprağı yerleştirin ve üzerine birkaç kaşık süt dökerek yumuşamasını sağlayın.
6. Üzerine biraz dövülmüş ceviz serpiştirin.
7. Tekrar güllaç yaprağı yerleştirip süt ekleyin.
8.  Bu işlemi kaseler dolana kadar kat kat devam ettirin.
9. En üst kısmına biraz daha süt gezdirip güllacı buzdolabında yaklaşık 30 dakika dinlendirin.
10. Servis ederken üzerine toz Antep fıstığı serpiştirin ve çilek dilimleri ile süsleyerek servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

gum-mastic-profiterole-lezzet.name: Gum Mastic Profiterole
instructions: 1. Hamuru için su ve margarini bir tencereye alın ve erimeye bırakın.
2.  Unu bir kerede ekleyip iyice karıştırın ve birkaç dakika pişirin.
3.  Ocaktan alıp 5 dakika bekledikten sonra yumurtaları teker teker ekleyip mikserle çırpın.
4.  Hamuru sıkma torbasına doldurun ve yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye aralıklı olarak cevizden büyük parçalar halinde sıkın.
5.  190 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
6.  Fırını kapatıp kapağını açmadan soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Kreması için, süt, şeker, yumurta, vanilya ve unu bir tencereye alıp iyice karıştırın.
8.  Damla sakızını döverek toz haline getirin ve karışıma ekleyin.
9. Orta ateşte koyulaşıncaya kadar karıştırın.
10.  Ocaktan alıp margarini ekleyin ve eriyinceye kadar karıştırın.
11.  Ara ara karıştırarak ılınmaya bırakın.
12.  Kremayı düz ve uzun uçlu sıkma torbasına aktarın ve profiterol toplarının altından batırarak içlerini doldurun.
13.  Üzerine çikolata sos gezdirerek servis yapın.

gumbo.name: Gumbo
instructions: For the roasted okra: Preheat the oven to 177°C.
Toss the okra with some olive oil, then spread in a baking sheet. Bake until cooked through, about 15 minutes.
For the blackening spice: Stir together the paprika, salt, pepper, cayenne, garlic powder, onion powder, oregano and thyme in a jar.
For the gumbo: Saute sausage, garlic, celery, onion and peppers in 1/2 cup olive oil in a saucepot until veggies are soft.

Mix flour with canola oil and remaining 1/2 cup olive oil in a saute pan over medium heat and cook until dark brown, then add to veggie pot. Add 1/4 cup blackening spice (save the remainder for another use). Add stock, chicken, pork, tomatoes, file, oregano, thyme and bay leaf, then add salt and pepper to taste. Bring to a boil and let simmer for 45 minutes.
Mix the okra in with the rest of the gumbo. Serve with rice or cornbread.

gumbo-zherbes.name: Gumbo Z'herbes
instructions: Cut leeks in half lengthwise, then slice both white and green parts crosswise into 1/4-inch thick pieces. Remove and discard stems from collard greens, turnip greens, kale, and chard; chop all greens, keeping them separate. Dice celery stalks and reserve leaves for garnish.

Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add leeks and 1 tablespoon thyme; cook, stirring frequently, until leeks are tender and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add collard greens, turnip greens, and cabbage; cook, stirring frequently, until greens are wilted, about 5 minutes. Add kale, chard, and 1 tablespoon salt; cook, stirring frequently, until all greens are wilted, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking greens, stirring frequently, until tender and no longer bitter, about 10 minutes. Remove greens from the pot and transfer to a large bowl; set aside until ready to use.

Wipe out the pot and melt remaining 4 tablespoons butter over medium heat. Whisk in flour and cook, stirring constantly, until flour mixture is dark brown in color and very aromatic (try to get this mixture as dark as possible without burning it), about 5 minutes. Add bell pepper, onion, and diced celery; cook, stirring frequently, until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and remaining 1 tablespoon thyme; cook, stirring constantly, until tender and fragrant, about 1 minute.

Whisk in vegetable broth. Add reserved braised greens, add bay leaves, black pepper, file powder, and crushed red pepper. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat to low, and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened and vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes. Season with remaining 1 tablespoon salt.
Serve over cooked rice and garnish with reserved celery leaves, if desired.

gumbo-new-orleans-recipe-comedera.name: Gumbo, New Orleans Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cdta de especias cajún  ((cayena, ajo, cebolla, pimentón ahumado, pimienta negra, comino y tomillo))

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta haciendo el roux, el cual le dará el color a nuestra receta.

Calienta un sartén con los 50 ml de aceite. Cuando esté caliente, le añadirás la harina de trigo, mezclarás y dejarás cocinar a fuego bajo sin dejar de remover, hasta obtener un color oscuro como si fuese caramelo. Apaga y reserva.
Ahora, calienta otro sartén con un poco de aceite de oliva y saltearás tus salchichas que deben estar cortadas en rodajas. Retira y reserva.
En ese mismo sartén, añadirás las gambas previamente limpias y sin cáscara. Saltea hasta que tomen color.
Toma tu cebolla y pimientos y los vas a cortar en brunoise o cuadritos pequeños. Saltea en el mismo sartén hasta blanquear.
Toma tus okras y las vas a cortar en rodajas, agrégalas al sartén. Mezcla y deja cocinar por 5 minutos.
Es momento de incorporar el roux, junto a las dos cucharadas de condimento cajún. Mezcla hasta que se integren.
Añade el caldo de pescado y deja cocinar por 45 minutos aproximadamente a fuego medio.
Pasado ese tiempo, incorpora las gambas y termina de cocinar por 5 minutos más.
Apaga, deja reposar y sirve acompañado de arroz.

gummy-and-curd-cheese-cookies-lezzet.name: Gummy And Curd Cheese Cookies
instructions: 1. Karbonatı limon suyunda eritin.
2.  Tatlı lor peyniri, bir yumurta ve diğer yumurtanın sarısı, şeker ve zeytinyağını hamur yoğurma kabına alıp karıştırın.
3.  Karbonatlı karışım ve unu lor peynirli karışıma ekleyip yoğurun.
4.  Hazırladığınız yumuşak kıvamlı hamura havanda dövülmüş sakızı ekleyip tekrar yoğurun.
5.  Hamurdan mandalina büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp yuvarlayın.
6.  Çırpılmış yumurta akına ve susama bulayıp fırın tepsisine dizin.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 30 dakika pişirin.
8.  Ilındıktan sonra servis yapın.

gummy-cherry-pudding-lezzet.name: Gummy Cherry Pudding
instructions: 1. Dondurulmuş vişneleri tel süzgece alıp çözülmeleri sağlayın.
2.  Eriyen suyu bir kapta toplayın.
3.  Süt, şeker, un ve vişne suyunu tencerede iyice karıştırıp muhallebi kıvamına gelene kadar sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
4. Ufalanmış sakızı ve tereyağını ekleyip mikserle çırpın.
5.  Vişne tanelerinden birazını minik bardakların içine paylaştırın.
6.  Üzerine muhallebi ilave edin.
7.  Tekrar vişne tanelerinden ekleyin.
8.  Son olarak üzerini rulo gofret ve bademlerle süsleyip servis yapın.

gummy-custard-recipe-lezzet.name: Gummy Custard Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 yemek kaşığı buğday nişastası veya pirinç unu
1 yemek kaşığı un (isteğe bağlı, kıvam için)
1 çay kaşığı damla sakızı (toz veya ezilmiş, isteğe bağlı)
1 paket vanilin veya 1 çay kaşığı toz vanilya

instructions: 1. Orta boy bir tencerede sütü alın ve içine şekeri ekleyin.
2.  Şeker eriyene kadar orta ateşte karıştırın.
3. Nişasta ve unu, 2-3 yemek kaşığı soğuk süt ile pürüzsüz bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırın.
4. Hazırladığınız nişastalı karışımı sıcak süte ekleyin ve sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
5. Muhallebi kıvam aldıktan sonra damla sakızı ve vanilini ekleyin.
6.  1–2 dakika daha karıştırarak pişirin.
7. Muhallebiyi kaselere dökün.
8.  Oda sıcaklığına geldikten sonra buzdolabında en az 1 saat soğutun.
9. Servis yapmadan önce üzerine tarçın, file fındık veya hindistan cevizi serpebilirsiniz.

gummy-dessert-with-cherry-sauce-lezzet.name: Gummy Dessert With Cherry Sauce
instructions: 1. Un, süt, şeker, vanilyayı tencereye alın ve orta ateşte karıştırarak koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
2.  Damla sakızlarını ekleyip eriyinceye kadar pişirmeye devam edin.
3.  Karışımı mutfak robotuna aktarın.
4.  Margarini ekleyip 6-7 dakika yüksek hızda karıştırın.
5.  Kelepçeli kek kalıbına aktarıp buzdolabında birkaç saat bekletin.
6.  Sos için vişne, şeker, nişasta, vanilyayı tencereye alıp karıştırın ve 15-20 dakika bekletin.
7.  Ocağa alıp koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin ve ılınmaya bırakın.
8.  Sosu tatlının üzerine yayın ve dilimleyerek servis yapın.

gummy-kebab-lezzet.name: Gummy Kebab
instructions: 1. Sakızlı kebap tarifi için öncelikle Etleri yemeklik doğranmış soğanla karıştırıp marine edin ve bir tencerede kavurun.
2. Damla sakızını havanda ezin ve bir kaseye aktarın.
3.  Sarımsakları tuzla birlikte havanda ezip, damla sakızlı karışıma ilave edin.
4. Başka bir kasede un ve suyu karıştırıp, damla sakızlı karışımı ekleyin ve iyice çırpın.
5. Kavrulmuş etlerin üzerine hazırladığınız sosu, tarçın, karabiber, yenibahar ve tuz ekleyip karıştırın, ardından kapağını kapatıp 5 dakika daha pişirin.
6. Patates püresi için patateslerin kabuklarını soyun ve iyice yıkayın.
7.  Patatesleri iri iri doğrayın ve bir tencereye alın.
8. Üzerini geçecek kadar su ve 1 çay kaşığı tuz ekleyin.
9.  Patatesleri yumuşayana kadar haşlayın.
10.  Haşlanan patateslerin suyunu süzün.
11. Sıcak patateslerin üzerine hemen tereyağı ekleyin ve patatesleri ezerek püre haline getirin.
12.  Kaşar rendesini ekleyin ve çatalla iyice karıştırın.
13.  Son olarak sütü kontrollü bir şekilde ilave edin ve karışımı blendırdan geçirin.
14.  Pürüzsüz bir patates püresi elde edin.
15. Patates püresini sunum tabağındaki sakızlı kebabın yanında servis edin.

gwyneth-paltrows-corn-vichyssoise.name: Gwyneth Paltrow's Corn Vichyssoise

ingredients.prep: white and light-green parts only, coarsely chopped (about 1 1/2 cups)
kernels cut from cobs, cobs reserved

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add leeks and cook, stirring occasionally, until they begin to soften, about 5 minutes. Add corn kernels, reserved cobs, potato, and stock. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Increase heat to high and bring soup to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer, cover with lid slightly ajar, and cook until the vegetables are very soft, about 35 minutes.

Discard corn cobs; let soup cool slightly. Working in batches, purée soup in a blender until very smooth. Set a fine-mesh strainer over a large bowl; strain, discarding solids. Chill soup until cold. If too thick, thin with water by 1/4-cupfuls. Stir in lemon juice, and season with salt and pepper. Spoon a dollop of crème fraîche atop each serving and sprinkle with chives.

gwyneth-paltrows-grilled-chicken-with-pe.name: Gwyneth Paltrow's Grilled Chicken With Peach Bbq Sauce

ingredients.item: Chopped peeled fresh peaches or 9-10 ounces frozen sliced peaches
Adobo sauce from canned chipotle chiles in adobo or 1 teaspoon soy sauce
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a small saucepan. Season lightly with salt and pepper and bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to low; simmer until peaches are very soft and flavors meld, about 10 minutes. Remove pan from heat; let cool. Pour peach mixture into a blender and purée until smooth. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Place half the sauce in a medium bowl; add the chicken and turn to coat. Let marinate at room temperature for 20 minutes, or cover and chill for up to 8 hours, turning occasionally. Cover and refrigerate remaining sauce.

Prepare a grill to medium-high heat. Brush grill rack with oil. Grill chicken until browned and almost cooked through, 4-5 minutes per side. Brush on all sides with reserved sauce; grill until glazed and cooked through, 1-2 minutes per side. Slice crosswise. Serve remaining sauce alongside.

gwyneth-paltrows-grilled-halibut-with-ma.name: Gwyneth Paltrow's Grilled Halibut With Mango-avocado Salsa

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Prepare a grill to medium-high heat. Gently combine the avocado, mango, tomatoes, basil, 1 tablespoon oil, and 1 tablespoon lime juice in a large mixing bowl. Season salsa to taste with salt and pepper and set aside at room temperature, gently tossing occasionally.

Place fish fillets in a 13x9x2" glass baking dish. Drizzle remaining 2 tablespoon oil and 2 tablespoon lime juice over. Season fish with salt and pepper. Let marinate at room temperature for 10 minutes, turning fish occasionally.
Brush grill rack with oil. Grill fish until just opaque in center, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to plates. Spoon mango-avocado salsa over fish. Squeeze a lime wedge over each and serve.

gwyneth-paltrows-peach-cooler.name: Gwyneth Paltrow's Peach Cooler
instructions: Using a muddler or wooden spoon, mash peaches with liqueur and lemon juice in a large pitcher. Stir in vodka. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

Cut 1/3 of cucumber lengthwise into 4 spears for garnish. Thinly slice remaining cucumber. Stir Prosecco, soda water, mint, and sliced cucumber into pitcher. Fill glasses with ice. Pour cooler into glasses; garnish with cucumber spear.

gwyneth-paltrows-roasted-tomato-and-anch.name: Gwyneth Paltrow's Roasted Tomato And Anchovy Oreganata Pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Place 2 cups tomatoes in an 8x8x2" glass baking dish. Stir in 1 Tbsp. oil and a large pinch of salt. Roast, stirring occasionally, at least 3 hours and up to 8 hours (the longer they roast, the sweeter and more concentrated the flavor). Set aside.

Increase oven temperature to 400°. Line a small baking sheet with parchment paper. Place breadcrumbs and herbs in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. oil over; stir until mixture resembles damp sand. Lay anchovies about 1/4" apart on prepared sheet. Evenly pack breadcrumb mixture over; drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil. Bake until golden brown, 3-5 minutes; set anchovy oreganata aside.
Cook spaghetti in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until tender but still firm to the bite. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, place remaining 2 cups tomatoes in a large bowl. Crush tomatoes with your hands. Heat 4 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic; cook, stirring, 30 seconds. Add crushed tomatoes and a pinch of salt; cook, stirring occasionally, until juices thicken, 6-7 minutes. Add roasted tomatoes.

Add drained spaghetti to skillet; toss to coat, adding reserved pasta water by 1/4-cupfuls if dry. Remove from heat; stir in basil. Drizzle with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil. Divide among bowls. Top each with 1/4 of the anchovy oreganata.

gyeran-mari.name: Gyeran Mari
instructions: Whisk eggs, mirin, soy sauce, and salt in a 2-cup measuring glass. Heat oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-low. Pour in one third of egg mixture, rotating skillet to evenly distribute. Cook until egg is mostly cooked, about 1 minute. Scatter one third of Parmesan over and shingle 2 seaweed snacks vertically down the center. Using a rubber spatula and starting from one side, fold egg up and over itself to roll up tightly; push to one side. Repeat cooking process with half of remaining egg mixture, Parmesan, and seaweed snacks, then flip existing egg roll over onto flat egg and roll up again. Repeat one more time with remaining ingredients. Transfer gyeran mari to a plate and let cool 5 minutes. Slice into ½"-thick pieces.

gyoza.name: Gyoza

ingredients.prep: soaked in hot water and finely chopped

instructions: Dice cabbage finely and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt. Give it a bit of a massage. Leave for 10–15 minutes and then squeeze with your hands to remove any moisture.
With your hands thoroughly mix together cabbage, ground meat, chives, mushrooms, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, and pinch of salt.
Dry your hands completely (or wrappers will stick). Place a gyoza wrapper on one hand and put 1 teaspoon filling in center of wrapper.
Brush edge of half the wrapper with cold water. Make a semi-circle by folding the wrapper in half. Pinch open sides of wrapper together with your fingers and seal the top.

Place a large frying pan over medium-high heat, add 2 teaspoons sesame oil and arrange 20–25 gyoza in pan. Add 200ml water to cover bottom of pan, cover with lid and cook on medium-high heat for 6–7 minutes or until translucent, cooked and no liquid is left in pan. Take off lid and cook for another 30–60 seconds for the bottoms to go crunchy. Cook remaining gyoza or freeze them.
Mix together soy sauce, vinegar and chili oil, if using. Serve gyoza hot with dipping sauce.

gyoza-japanese-potstickers.name: Gyoza (japanese Potstickers)
instructions: Prepare the potstickers: Combine ground pork, napa cabbage, green onions, egg, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, Sriracha, and sesame oil in a bowl.

Arrange gyoza wrappers on a flat work surface. Place 1 teaspoon of pork mixture in the middle of each wrapper. Wet edges with your finger or a brush. Fold up sides to form a semicircle; pinch edges to seal.

Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add 12 to 15 gyoza to the skillet. Cook until golden brown on the bottom, about 2 minutes. Pour in 1/2 cup water; cover and cook until water is absorbed, 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer gyoza to a plate. Repeat with remaining gyoza.
Make the dipping sauce: Mix soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and Sriracha together. Serve dipping side alongside gyoza.

gyoza-and-greens-with-chile-butter.name: Gyoza And Greens With Chile Butter

ingredients.item: Labneh or plain whole-milk greek yogurt
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn

instructions: Mix together 1 cup labneh or plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Spread mixture on a platter. Set aside.
Toast 2 Tbsp. pine nuts in a dry large skillet over medium heat, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl; let cool.

Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in same skillet. Working in 2 batches and adding remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil between batches, cook 24 store-bought beef, chicken, or vegetable gyoza in a single layer, undisturbed, until golden underneath, about 2 minutes. Pour 3 Tbsp. water into skillet, quickly cover, and cook until gyoza are cooked through and deep golden brown on bottom, about 3 minutes. Transfer gyoza to reserved platter with labneh mixture.

Reduce heat to low and melt 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter in skillet. Cook 1 tsp. Aleppo-style pepper, ½ tsp. ground cumin, ¼ tsp. smoked paprika, and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, swirling pan, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Pour half of chile butter into a small bowl; set aside.

Add 1 bunch Tuscan kale, ribs and stems removed, leaves torn, a pinch of salt, and 2 Tbsp. water to chile butter in pan; cook, stirring occasionally, until kale is wilted, about 2 minutes. Spoon over gyoza.
Spoon reserved chile butter over gyoza; top with pine nuts and 2 Tbsp. torn mint leaves.

gyoza-dumplings.name: Gyoza Dumplings
instructions: Put pork, sake, salt, and sugar in a bowl. Mix until meat is sticky.
Combine garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, potato starch, cabbage, and chive. Mix them very well in a bowl.
Scoop a spoonful of filling onto the middle of the gyoza skin.
Apply water for skin edge with your finger. Fold in half and pinch pleats into the edges, then wrap up.
Heat sesame oil in the pan and lay gyoza in single layer. Keep on medium heat for 2 minutes.
When gyoza turns brown, pour in slurry and put the lid on. Steam for 3 minutes.
Take off the lid, put more sesame oil and cook over low heat.
Cover a pan with a plate, turn over a pan.
Enjoy!

gateau-basque.name: Gâteau Basque

ingredients.item: . fresh or frozen pitted sweet cherries
Butter and flour for the tart pan

ingredients.prep: split lengthwise and seeds scraped, or 1 0.5 tsp vanilla extract or paste

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine the cherries, kirsch, and sugar and cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally to dissolve the sugar, until the cherries have released their juices, about 5 minutes. Continue to simmer briskly, swirling the saucepan occasionally and adjusting the heat if necessary, until the cherries are soft and the juices are reduced to a thick syrup, 10 to 15 minutes. In a small bowl, stir together the lemon juice and cornstarch with a fork until smooth, then stir into the cherry mixture and bring to a simmer again for 20 seconds, just to activate the cornstarch. Remove the compote from the heat, stir in the lemon zest, and transfer to a 2-cup heatproof glass measuring cup. You should have about 1¼ cups of compote—a bit less is fine, but if you have more than an extra tablespoon or two, return it to the saucepan and cook it a bit longer. Cover and refrigerate until the compote is cold and thickened, at least 1 hour or up to 1 week. (Use good-quality cherry preserves in place of the cherry compote if you feel like eliminating this step.)
In a medium bowl, whisk the flour, baking powder, and salt to combine. Set aside.

In a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment (or in a large bowl using a hand mixer), combine the butter and sugar and beat on medium-high speed, scraping down the sides of the bowl occasionally, until the mixture is light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Turn off the mixer and scrape down the sides of bowl, then add the yolk, 1 whole egg, and the almond extract. Beat on medium-high until the mixture has increased in volume and is lighter than before, about 2 minutes. Reduce the mixer speed to low and add the flour mixture in 2 additions, beating briefly in between to incorporate. Continue to mix just until no floury spots remain, about 20 seconds.

Knead the dough inside the bowl a couple of times to make sure it’s homogenous, then divide it in half, making one piece slightly larger than the other. Wrap each piece in plastic, pressing the dough into ½-inch-thick disks, and refrigerate until cold, at least 2 hours or up to 3 days.
Place a fine mesh sieve over the top of a large heatproof bowl and set aside.

Combine the milk, vanilla seeds and pod, and salt in a medium, heavy-bottomed saucepan. Set the saucepan over medium-low heat and let the mixture come slowly to a simmer, whisking occasionally, to allow the vanilla to infuse into the milk.

Beat the yolks, sugar, and cornstarch: While the milk is heating, combine the granulated sugar, cornstarch, and yolks in a large bowl. Whisk vigorously until the mixture is very pale, light in texture, and thick, about 2 minutes (it will seem too thick to whisk at first but will thin out as you work it). Using a ladle and whisking constantly, slowly stream about half of the hot milk into the bowl with the egg mixture (this gradually raises the temperature of the eggs so they don’t curdle). Whisking constantly, quickly stream the egg mixture back into the saucepan with the remaining warm milk.

Increase the heat to medium and continue to cook, whisking constantly, until the foam has subsided and the pastry cream is thick like pudding and easily holds the marks of the whisk, about 3 minutes (but possibly several minutes longer depending on the strength of your stove and the sturdiness of your saucepan). It’s important that the mixture comes to a boil in order to activate the cornstarch, but at the same time you don’t want to overcook the pastry cream—when you pause whisking for about 5 seconds, a few thick bubbles should form beneath the surface and then pop. If this isn’t happening or the cream isn’t thickening, raise the heat slightly and keep whisking, pausing every 30 seconds to check if it’s bubbling.

Strain and incorporate the butter: Scrape the cooked pastry cream into the mesh sieve and use the whisk to press the mixture through the mesh into the bowl below (discard any solids). Whisk the cold butter into the hot pastry cream one piece at a time until smooth. Press a sheet of plastic wrap directly onto the surface of the pastry cream and refrigerate until it’s cold, at least 4 hours.
The pastry cream, covered and refrigerated, will keep for up to 5 days.
Lightly butter the bottom and sides of the tart pan, then dust it all over with flour. Tap out the excess and set the pan aside.

Press the bottom crust into the tart pan: Remove the larger piece of dough from the refrigerator (you’re going to press this piece into the bottom of the pan; leave the other piece of dough in the refrigerator for the top). Use a knife or bench scraper to cut the dough in half, then cut one half into 6 pieces. Roll the pieces beneath your palms on the work surface to form ropes that are about ½-inch thick, then arrange the strips around the inside perimeter of the prepared pan, overlapping slightly so there are no gaps. Using a lightly floured straight-sided 1-cup dry measure, press the dough against the sides all the way around so it extends slightly above the top of the pan. Using lightly floured hands, press the other half of the dough into and across the bottom of the pan in an even layer. Where the bottom meets the sides, smooth and press the dough together to seal. For an extra smooth surface or if you see an unevenness, use a floured, straight-side 1-cup dry measure to flatten the bottom. Refrigerate the pan until the pastry is cold, about 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, roll out the second disk of dough on a lightly floured piece of parchment paper into a 10-inch round, frequently flipping the dough and dusting with more flour as needed (this dough is delicate and will soften quickly; if it starts to stick, put it back in the refrigerator). Slide the dough, still on the parchment paper, onto a plate and refrigerate while you assemble the tart.
Arrange an oven rack in the center position and preheat the oven to 177°C. Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil.
Scrape the cold cherry mixture into the bottom of the chilled tart crust, arranging the cherries and syrup evenly across the surface.

Whisk the pastry cream until it’s smooth and then dollop it over the cherries, spreading with the back of a spoon or a small offset spatula into an even layer all the way to the edges (it’s okay if some syrup pools around the sides). Beat the remaining whole egg in a small bowl. Use a pastry brush to lightly coat the  inner edge of tart dough with a thin layer of egg (just above the pastry cream). Slide the cold dough round off the parchment paper onto the tart. Press gently on the center, moving out to the edges to eliminate air pockets between the pastry and the cream. Press firmly on the edges of the dough so the top crust adheres to the sides, and pinch off the overhang. Brush more egg across the surface of the top crust, then gently scrape the tines of a fork across the top to create a decorative crosshatch pattern. Refrigerate the tart again until cold (I know, it’s a process!), 15 to 20 minutes.

Bake the tart on the lined baking sheet until the top of the tart is shiny and deep golden brown, 45 to 55 minutes. Let the tart cool completely (preferably up to a full day) before removing the outer ring and serving.

gateau-breton-aux-pommes.name: Gâteau Breton Aux Pommes

ingredients.prep: melted, slightly cooled, divided, plus more, room temperature

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for pan

ingredients.prep: tart apples (such as Pink Lady or Braeburn; about 2 lb.), peeled, cored, sliced  0.5” thick

instructions: An 8"-diameter cake pan

Bring sugar and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Boil, swirling pan occasionally and brushing down sides with a wet pastry brush, until mixture turns a deep amber color, 8–10 minutes. Remove from heat and slowly add cream (mixture will bubble vigorously). Return to medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until smooth, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in butter and salt. Pour caramel sauce into a small heatproof jar or bowl; let cool.
DO AHEAD: Caramel sauce can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Place rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Butter and flour cake pan; set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. melted butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add apples, sprinkle with 2 Tbsp. sugar, and cook, tossing occasionally, until apples are golden brown, 10–12 minutes. Arrange half of the apples in the bottom of prepared cake pan so most of it is covered (a few gaps are okay).
Whisk baking powder, salt, lemon zest, 1¼ cups flour, and remaining 1 cup sugar in a large bowl. Whisk in eggs and remaining 10 Tbsp. melted butter until smooth.

Pour half of batter over apples in cake pan, top with remaining apples, then pour remaining batter over. Bake cake until top is golden and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 40–50 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool slightly; turn out onto rack and let cool.
Serve cake with caramel sauce and crème fraîche.
DO AHEAD: Cake can be baked 1 day ahead. Keep wrapped tightly at room temperature.

gateau-de-sirop.name: Gâteau De Sirop
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Butter and flour 13x9x2-inch metal baking pan. Sift flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and 1 teaspoon salt into medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter in large bowl until smooth. Add sugar and beat until blended. Beat in eggs, 1 at a time. Beat in 13/4 cups syrup, then evaporated milk and sour cream (batter may look curdled). Add dry ingredients and beat on lowest speed until blended. Transfer cake batter to prepared pan.

Bake cake until tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 50 minutes. Cool cake in pan on rack. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover pan tightly with foil and store cake at room temperature.
Beat cream in medium bowl until peaks form. Cut cake into squares. Place on plates. Spoon whipped cream alongside; drizzle with additional syrup. Dust with powdered sugar, if desired.

gokcesu-rice-lezzet.name: Gökçesu Rice
instructions: 1. Nohudu 1 gece önceden suda bekletin.
2.  Üzerini geçecek kadar su ekleyip haşlayın.
3.  Pirinci bol suyla yıkayıp ılık tuzlu suda 20 dakika bekletin ve suyunu süzün.
4.  Tereyağı ile birlikte tencereye alıp kavurun.
5.  Et suyunu ekleyip kaynatın.
6.  Şeker, limon suyu, tuz ve kıyılmış dereotunu ilave edip karıştırın.
7.  Kaynayınca nohutu ve rendelenmiş havucu ekleyin.
8.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatın ve kısık ateşte pişirin.
9.  Üzerine susam serpip servis yapın.

gozleme-with-kale-and-cheddar.name: Gözleme With Kale And Cheddar

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Mix 1¼ cups (156 g) all-purpose flour, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. baking powder in a medium bowl to combine. Massage 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, room temperature, into dry ingredients with your fingers until mixture looks shaggy. Pour in ⅓ cup room-temperature water and stir until a soft dough forms (if it feels very sticky, add up to 2 Tbsp. additional flour). Cover dough and let sit 10 minutes.
Knead dough until smooth, about 3 minutes. Divide into 4 pieces, cover, and let sit while you make the filling.

Squeeze one 16-oz. package frozen kale, thawed, in a fine-mesh sieve over the sink until very dry; transfer to a medium bowl. Add 1 bunch scallions, trimmed, finely chopped, 2 garlic cloves, finely chopped, zest of 1 lemon, 8 oz. extra-sharp white cheddar, coarsely grated (about 2 cups), 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and toss to combine. Divide mixture into 4 portions (divide in bowl to save washing up; eyeballing is fine).

Place some all-purpose flour in a small bowl. Working one at a time and keeping remaining balls covered, toss dough balls in flour, shaking off excess. Roll out on a lightly floured surface, dusting with more flour as needed, to a ¹⁄₁₆"-thick round, 9"–10" in diameter (it’s okay if it’s not a perfect circle). Place a portion of filling in center of dough (it will look like a lot). Fold 2 opposite edges of dough up and over filling, then fold remaining 2 edges up and over to completely encase filling (it should look like a square package). Press seam to close. Lightly press package down with your fingers or rolling pin to flatten to about ½" thick (it’s okay if the dough tears a little in some spots). Transfer gözleme to a parchment-lined baking sheet.

Heat a medium cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Cook a gözleme until golden brown and puffy with a few charred spots underneath, about 2 minutes. Turn and cook on other side until golden brown, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a plate. Repeat with remaining 3 gözleme.

gullac-pastry-lezzet.name: Güllaç Pastry
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları kaseye kırın.
2.  Ilık süt, tuz ve yağı ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Yuvarlak bir fırın tepsisini yağlayın.
4.  Güllaç yapraklarının yarısını iri parçalar halinde kırın ve aralarına hazırladığınız karışımdan dökerek tepsiye dizin.
5.  Kırmızı biberleri ince şeritler halinde doğrayıp 2 yemek kaşığı ayçiçeği yağı ile soteleyin.
6.  Lor peyniri, tuz ve karabiber ekleyip karıştırın.
7.  Karışımı tepsideki güllaçların üzerine yayın.
8.  Kalan güllaç yapraklarını da kırarak ve sos ile ıslatarak üzerine kapatın.
9.  Kalan sosu üzerine gezdirin.
10.  180 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
11.  Dilimleyerek servis yapın.
12. Güllaç yapraklarını tatlı yapımında kullanmak istiyorsanız, Ramazan'ın şenlikçisi nefis cevizli güllaç tarifine göz atın.

gullac-recipe-lezzet.name: Güllaç Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı çekilmiş ceviz veya fındık içi

instructions: 1. Sütü tencereye alın, toz şekeri ekleyin ve şeker tamamen eriyene kadar karıştırarak ısıtın.
2.  Kaynamamasına dikkat edin; ılık-sıcak arası olmalı.
3. Geniş bir tepsiye bir güllaç yaprağını serin, üzerine 1-2 kepçe ılık süt gezdirin.
4.  Her yaprağın üzerine aynı işlemi uygulayarak kat kat dizin.
5. Beşinci yapraktan sonra araya ceviz veya fındık serpiştirin.
6.  Kalan yaprakları da aynı şekilde sütle ıslatarak yerleştirin.
7. Tüm sütü döktükten sonra tepsinin üzerini örtün ve oda sıcaklığında 15 dakika dinlendirin.
8.  Ardından buzdolabına alın, en az 2 saat soğutun.
9. Soğuyan güllacı dilimleyin, üzerine nar taneleri ve Antep fıstığı serpiştirerek servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

gullac-recipe-tastes-like-cold-baklava-l.name: Güllaç Recipe Tastes Like Cold Baklava

ingredients.item: Sütün bir kısmı yerine krema (½ su bardağı) eklenerek daha yoğun bir kıvam elde edilebilir.
Daha hafif bir versiyon için yarım yağlı süt tercih edilebilir.
Aromatik tat için süte çok az vanilya özütü eklenebilir.
Antep fıstığı yerine ince çekilmiş fındık kullanılabilir.
Fıstık + ceviz karışımı ile daha zengin bir iç kat hazırlanabilir.
Daha yoğun baklava hissi için ara katlara ekstra fıstık serpilebilir.
Sütlü çikolata yerine bitter çikolata (daha dengeli ve az tatlı bir sonuç için)
Kakao oranı artırılarak daha yoğun çikolatalı bir aroma elde edilebilir.
Toz şeker miktarı yarım çay bardağı azaltılarak daha hafif yapılabilir.
Bir kısmı yerine bal veya hindistan cevizi şekeri tercih edilebilir.
üzerine ince çekilmiş kakao + pudra şekeri karışımı elenebilir.
Servis sırasında küçük bir parça kaymak eklenebilir.

instructions: 1. Sütü tencereye alın ve toz şekeri ekleyerek karıştırın.
2.  Kısık ateşte sadece şeker eriyene kadar ılıtın; kaynatmayın.
3. Geniş bir tepsiye ilk güllaç yaprağını parlak yüzeyi üste gelecek şekilde yerleştirin.
4.  Üzerine kepçe yardımıyla ılık sütten gezdirin.
5. Aynı işlemi üç yaprak olacak şekilde tekrarlayın.
6.  Üçüncü katın üzerine kakaoyu eleyerek serpin ve ince çekilmiş Antep fıstığının yarısını yayın.
7. Kalan üç güllaç yaprağını da sütle ıslatarak üst üste yerleştirin.
8. Tatlıyı buzdolabında en az 2–3 saat dinlendirerek sütü tamamen çekmesini sağlayın.
9. Servis öncesinde sütlü çikolatayı rendeleyip üzerine serpin ve kalan fıstıkla süsleyin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

gulsulu-dessert-lezzet.name: Gülsulu Dessert
instructions: 1. Denenmiş yemek tarifleri sunan Lezzet'tin tatlı tarifleri listesinden iyi bir seçim.
2.  Cevizi mutfak robotuna alıp toz haline getirin.
3.  Yumurtaların sarılarını aklarından ayırın.
4.  Yumurta aklarını ve bir tutam tuzu bir kaseye alıp iyice çırpın.
5.  Yumurtaların sarılarını ve şekeri başka bir kaba alıp karıştırın.
6.  Un, gülsuyu ve cevizi ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
7.  Yumurta akını yavaş yavaş unlu karışıma ilave edip karıştırın.
8.  Fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serip hamuru dökün.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
10.  Şurup için, şeker ve suyu tencereye alıp kıvamı koyulaşıncaya kadar kaynatın.
11.  Limon suyu ekleyip ocaktan alın ve soğumaya bırakın.
12.  Şurubu tatlının üzerine gezdirin ve kare şeklinde dilimleyin.
13.  Üzerini kaymak ve kiraz şekerlemesiyle süsleyip servis yapın.

grara-split-vaccine-lezzet.name: Gırara (split Vaccine)
instructions: 1. Soğanı ince doğrayın.
2.  Buğdayları soğanla birlikte tencereye alın ve üzerini iki parmak geçecek kadar su ilave edin.
3.  1 saat pişirin.
4.  Pişen buğdayları daha büyük bir tencereye aktarın.
5.  Pişerken katılaşan buğday soğan karışımını suyla kısık ateşte karıştırarak inceltin.
6.  Kaynayınca doğranmış pazıları ve ufak doğranmış kabakları ekleyin.
7.  Tuzla tatlandırın.
8.  Sebzeler pişince ocaktan alın.
9.  Bir kapta yoğurt, yumurta ve sütü mikserle çırpın.
10.  Buğdaylı karışımdan tane gelmeyecek şekilde birkaç yemek kaşığı su alın ve yoğurtlu karışıma ekleyip karıştırın.
11.  İki karışımı birleştirip sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
12.  Ocaktan alıp ince kıyılmış reyhan ve ince doğranmış sarımsakları ilave edin.
13.  Cezvede tereyağını ısıtıp, nane ve kırmızıbiberi ilave edin.
14.  Yemeğin üzerine gezdirip sıcak servis yapın.

goi-tom-bap-cai.name: Gỏi Tôm Bắp Cải
instructions: Combine sugar and 7 Tbsp. warm water in a small bowl and whisk until sugar is dissolved. Stir in chiles, garlic, lime juice, and fish sauce. Set nuóc cham aside.

Bring coconut milk, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and add shrimp. Cover and let sit until shrimp are opaque and pink, about 4 minutes. Drain and chill until ready to use.

Toss cabbage, carrots, onion, cilantro, and mint in a large bowl. Pour half of reserved nuóc cham over and gently massage into vegetables until evenly distributed. Top with chilled shrimp, fried shallots, and peanuts. Serve with remaining nuóc cham alongside.
Do ahead: Nuóc cham can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

5-grain-porridge-with-bee-pollen-apples-.name: 5-grain Porridge With Bee Pollen, Apples, And Coconut

ingredients.item: Flaky sea salt (such as maldon) and bee pollen
Bee pollen is available at health food stores

instructions: Bring brown rice, quinoa, amaranth, millet, wheat bran, salt, and 6 cups water to a boil in a medium pot. Reduce heat, partially cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until cereal is the consistency of porridge (softer and thicker than the usual bowl of oatmeal) and water is absorbed, 40–50 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Porridge can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.
Heat coconut oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Cook coconut flakes, stirring often, until toasted, 2 minutes; transfer to a plate.
Add apple, cinnamon, and 2 Tbsp. honey to skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until apples are browned in spots and tender, about 3 minutes.
Serve porridge topped with apples, coconut, sea salt, bee pollen, and a drizzle of honey, if you like.

50-garlic-clove-potatoes-au-gratin.name: 50 Garlic Clove Potatoes Au Gratin
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Grease an 8x8-inch square baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.

Use a sharp knife to cut off the tops of the garlic heads and place them cut-side up on a large piece of foil. Drizzle the exposed garlic cloves with olive oil and season with salt. Bring up the corners of the foil around the garlic, then roll closed to form a tight packet. Place the packet on a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for about 45 minutes, or until the garlic is caramelized. Remove from the oven and let sit for about 15 minutes, or until cool enough to handle.

Unwrap the foil packet and squeeze the heads to release the roasted garlic cloves into an upright blender. Add the half-and-half, heavy cream, and cream cheese, followed by ½ cup Gruyère, ½ cup cheddar, 2 tablespoons Parmesan, and ½ teaspoon kosher salt. Blend until the sauce is smooth.
Arrange the sliced potatoes in even rows in the prepared baking dish.
Pour the sauce over the potatoes, making sure to get in between the potato slices.
Evenly top the potatoes with the remaining ½ cup Gruyère, ½ cup cheddar, and 2 tablespoons Parmesan. Season with thyme and freshly ground black pepper.
Cover the baking dish with foil and bake in the preheated oven for 40 minutes. Remove the foil and cook for another 15-20 minutes, until the potatoes are tender and the cheese is evenly browned.
Let cool slightly, then garnish with chives to serve.
Enjoy!

50-garlic-clove-shrimp-scampi.name: 50 Garlic Clove Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a rapid boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente. Reserve about 1 cup of the pasta water then drain into a colander and set aside.
Pat the shrimp dry with paper towels and generously season with creole seasoning.
Heat olive oil in a large stick over medium heat. Add the shrimp and cook until about 1 to 2 minutes per side, or until they just begin to turn pink. Remove the shrimp and set aside.
Add butter to the skillet the shrimp was cooked in. Once the butter is melted, add the minced garlic and red pepper flakes. Cook until garlic is fragrant and softened, about 5 minutes.

Increase the heat to medium high then add in the wine and lemon juice. Use a spatula to scrape up any of the browned bits on the bottom. Continue to cook until the mixture is reduced by half, about 2 to 3 minutes.

Add the seared shrimp, cooked pasta and ½ cup reserved pasta water. Cook over high heat until everything is evenly combined and the sauce has thickened.  Add more pasta water as needed to achieve desired consistency.
Remove from heat and stir in the parsley and lemon zest. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

50-garlic-clove-beef-bulgogi-onigiri.name: 50-garlic Clove Beef Bulgogi Onigiri
instructions: Make the garlic rice: Place the room-temperature avocado oil and garlic in a nonstick skillet. Place the skillet over high heat, and cook, stirring constantly, until garlic turns amber color, 7–10 minutes.

Immediately pour the fried garlic mixture through a fine mesh strainer into a heatproof bowl; discard the oil. Transfer the fried garlic to a paper towel to absorb any excess oil. Stir about half of the crispy garlic into the hot cooked rice until evenly combined. Set aside the remaining crispy garlic.

Make the beef bulgogi: Place the pear, soy sauce, brown sugar, sesame oil, gochujang, garlic, ginger, and 2 tablespoons of the canola oil in a blender. Process on high speed for 2–3 minutes, until you achieve a smooth consistency.
Place the beef and marinade in a large bowl, and stir to coat the meat. Cover with plastic wrap, and let marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes or up to 2 hours in the fridge.

Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon canola oil in a large skillet over high heat until it shimmers. Add the marinated bulgogi to the skillet, and cook for about 4 minutes, or until browned. Flip and cook for 1–2 minutes, until browned on the other side and fully cooked through. Transfer the bulgogi to a plate, and let cool for about 5 minutes.

Wet your palms with water. Take a handful of the garlic rice, and make an indentation in the middle. Place a little bit of beef bulgogi in the indentation. Wrap the rice around the beef, and use your hands to form the rice into a triangle shape. (If using an onigiri mold, place the rice mixture in the mold, press lightly, and release for a perfect triangle.)

Place the reserved crispy garlic on a plate. Roll the outer edges of each rice triangle in the garlic. Wrap a strip of nori around the rice triangle. Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients.
Enjoy!

agueda-sequilhos-teleculinaria.name: Águeda Sequilhos
instructions: Prepare a massa: bata as claras em castelo. À parte, bata o açúcar com as gemas, envolva as claras batidas e depois a farinha, previamente misturada com o fermento.
Polvilhe um tabuleiro com farinha e nele disponha a massa anterior, auxiliando-se de uma colher de sopa. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºC, até a massa ficar seca e dourada.
Entretanto, prepare a cobertura: leve ao lume o açúcar com a água, até obter ponto de fio. Cubra os sequilhos com esta calda, deixe secar e sirva.
Retire um pouco da calda para um prato, molhe nela a ponta do dedo indicador e encoste-a à do polegar. Afaste os dedos e veja se a calda forma um fio.
